lib/src/core/services/auth_service.dart\nimport 'package:shared_preferences/shared_preferences.dart';\nimport '../api/api_client.dart';\n\n/// Authentication service for managing user login/logout state\nclass AuthService {\n  static const String _keyAuthenticated = 'is_authenticated';\n  static const String _keySeenSplash = 'seen_splash';\n  static const String _keyUserEmail = 'user_email';\n  static const String _keyUserName = 'user_name';\n  static const String _keyAccessToken = 'access_token';\n  static const String _keyRefreshToken = 'refresh_token';\n  static const String _keyUserId = 'user_id';\n\n  // Test credentials for development (matching database users table)\n  // Database role_id mapping: 1=Admin, 2=Instructor, 3=Learner\n  static const Map<String, Map<String, String>> _testCredentials = {\n    'admin@hosiafrica.com': {\n      'password': 'admin1234',\n      'name': 'Admin User',\n      'role': 'admin', // role_id = 1\n      'role_id': '1',\n      'id': '1',\n    },\n    // New Admin Roles\n    'payment.admin@hosi.academy': {\n      'password': 'Payment@2027',\n      'name': 'Payment Admin',\n      'role': 'payment_admin',\n      'role_id': '1',\n      'id': '117',\n    },\n    'hr.admin@hosi.academy': {\n      'password': 'HRAdmin@2027',\n      'name': 'HR Admin',\n      'role': 'hr_admin',\n      'role_id': '1',\n      'id': '118',\n    },\n    'executive.admin@hosi.academy': {\n      'password': 'Executive@2027',\n      'name': 'Executive Admin',\n      'role': 'executive_admin',\n      'role_id': '1',\n      'id': '119',\n    },\n    'sam@hosiafrica.com': {\n      'password': '2222',\n      'name': 'Sam Instructor',\n      'role': 'instructor', // role_id = 2\n      'role_id': '2',\n      'id': '2',\n    },\n    'student@hosiafrica.com': {\n      'password': '1111',\n      'name': 'John Doe',\n      'role': 'learner', // role_id = 3\n      'role_id': '3',\n      'id': '3',\n    },\n    // Superuser from database (takawira)\n    'mazandotakawira@gmail.com': {\n      'password': 'admin',\n      'name': 'Takawira Mazando',\n      'role': 'admin', // role_id = 1\n      'role_id': '1',\n      'id': '4',\n    },\n    'richard.masukume@hosiacademy.co.za': {\n      'password': 'password123',\n      'name': 'Richard Masukume',\n      'role': 'learner', // role_id = 3\n      'role_id': '3',\n      'id': '5',\n    },\n  };\n\n  /// Login with email and password\n  /// Returns true if credentials are valid, false otherwise\n  /// 🔐 Blockchain-ready: Credentials verified and encrypted on-chain\n  static Future<bool> login({\n    required String email,\n    required String password,\n  }) async {\n    final trimmedEmail = email.trim();\n    final trimmedPassword = password.trim();\n\n    print('🔗 BLOCKCHAIN: Initiating authentication...');\n\n    // 1. Try Backend Authentication First (Production Ready)\n    try {\n      final response = await ApiClient.post(\n        '/api/v1/auth/login/',\n        data: {\n          'username': trimmedEmail,\n          'password': trimmedPassword,\n        },\n      );\n\n      if (response.statusCode == 200) {\n        final data = response.data;\n        final accessToken = data['access'];\n        final refreshToken = data['refresh'];\n\n        if (accessToken != null) {\n          final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n          await prefs.setBool(_keyAuthenticated, true);\n          await prefs.setBool(_keySeenSplash, true);\n          await prefs.setString(_keyUserEmail, trimmedEmail);\n\n          await prefs.setString(_keyAccessToken, accessToken);\n          await prefs.setString(_keyRefreshToken, refreshToken);\n\n          // 2. Fetch Real Profile Data from Backend\n          try {\n            final profileResponse =\n                await ApiClient.get('/api/v1/auth/profile/');\n            if (profileResponse.statusCode == 200) {\n              final profile = profileResponse.data;\n              final realName =\n                  profile['full_name'] ?? profile['name'] ?? 'User';\n              final roleId = profile['role_id']?.toString() ?? '3';\n              final roleName = profile['role_name']?.toLowerCase() ?? 'learner';\n              final userId = profile['id']?.toString();\n\n              await prefs.setString(_keyUserName, realName);\n              await prefs.setString('user_role', roleName);\n              await prefs.setString('user_role_id', roleId);\n              if (userId != null) {\n                await prefs.setString(_keyUserId, userId);\n              }\n\n              print('✅ LOGIN SUCCESS: Backend Authenticated & Profile Synced');\n              return true;\n            }\n          } catch (profileError) {\n            print('⚠️ Profile sync failed: $profileError');\n            // Continue with default/test data if profile fetch fails\n          }\n\n          // Fallback role mapping for known test accounts (if profile fetch failed or returned partial data)\n          if (_testCredentials.containsKey(trimmedEmail)) {\n            final testAccount = _testCredentials[trimmedEmail]!;\n            await prefs.setString(_keyUserName, testAccount['name']!);\n            await prefs.setString('user_role', testAccount['role']!);\n            await prefs.setString('user_role_id', testAccount['role_id']!);\n            if (testAccount.containsKey('id')) {\n              await prefs.setString(_keyUserId, testAccount['id']!);\n            }\n            print(\n                '✅ LOGIN SUCCESS: Backend Authenticated + Local Role Mapping');\n            return true;\n          }\n\n          print('✅ LOGIN SUCCESS: Backend Authenticated (Incomplete Profile)');\n          return true;\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      print('⚠️ Backend login failed: $e');\n      print('⚠️ Falling back to dev/test credentials...');\n    }\n\n    // Simulate blockchain verification delay\n    await Future.delayed(const Duration(milliseconds: 300));\n    print('🔗 BLOCKCHAIN: Verifying credentials on-chain...');\n\n    // Check if credentials match any test account\n    if (_testCredentials.containsKey(trimmedEmail)) {\n      final testAccount = _testCredentials[trimmedEmail]!;\n      if (testAccount['password'] == trimmedPassword) {\n        print('🔗 BLOCKCHAIN: Credentials verified ✓');\n        print('🔗 BLOCKCHAIN: Encrypting session token...');\n\n        // Valid test credentials - save authentication state\n        final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n        await prefs.setBool(_keyAuthenticated, true);\n        await prefs.setBool(_keySeenSplash, true);\n        await prefs.setString(_keyUserEmail, trimmedEmail);\n        await prefs.setString(_keyUserName, testAccount['name']!);\n        await prefs.setString('user_role', testAccount['role']!);\n        await prefs.setString('user_role_id', testAccount['role_id']!);\n        if (testAccount.containsKey('id')) {\n          await prefs.setString(_keyUserId, testAccount['id']!);\n        }\n\n        print('🔗 BLOCKCHAIN: Session stored on distributed ledger');\n        print(\n            '✅ DEV LOGIN SUCCESS: $trimmedEmail (${testAccount['role']}, role_id=${testAccount['role_id']})');\n        return true;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // TODO: Add real backend authentication here for production\n    // For now, reject any credentials not in test list\n    print('❌ LOGIN FAILED: Invalid credentials for $trimmedEmail');\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  /// Logout the current user\n  static Future<void> logout() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    await prefs.setBool(_keyAuthenticated, false);\n    await prefs.remove(_keyUserEmail);\n    await prefs.remove(_keyUserName);\n    await prefs.remove(_keyUserId);\n    await prefs.remove(_keyAccessToken); // Clear tokens\n    await prefs.remove(_keyRefreshToken);\n    await prefs\n        .remove('user_role'); // CRITICAL: Remove role to prevent stale state\n    // Keep seen_splash as true so they don't see splash again\n    print('🔓 LOGOUT: Cleared all user data');\n  }\n\n  /// Check if user is authenticated\n  static Future<bool> isAuthenticated() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getBool(_keyAuthenticated) ?? false;\n  }\n\n  /// Get current user email\n  static Future<String?> getUserEmail() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getString(_keyUserEmail);\n  }\n\n  /// Get current user name\n  static Future<String?> getUserName() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getString(_keyUserName);\n  }\n\n  /// Get current user ID\n  static Future<String?> getUserId() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getString(_keyUserId);\n  }\n\n  /// Get current user role (admin, instructor, learner, facilitator)\n  static Future<String?> getUserRole() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getString('user_role');\n  }\n\n  /// Get current user role ID (1=Admin, 2=Instructor, 3=Learner)\n  static Future<int?> getUserRoleId() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    final roleId = prefs.getString('user_role_id');\n    return roleId != null ? int.tryParse(roleId) : null;\n  }\n\n  /// Get current access token\n  static Future<String?> getAccessToken() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getString(_keyAccessToken);\n  }\n\n  /// Get current refresh token\n  static Future<String?> getRefreshToken() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getString(_keyRefreshToken);\n  }\n\n  /// Mark splash as seen\n  static Future<void> markSplashSeen() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    await prefs.setBool(_keySeenSplash, true);\n  }\n\n  /// Check if splash has been seen\n  static Future<bool> hasSeenSplash() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    return prefs.getBool(_keySeenSplash) ?? false;\n  }\n\n  /// Clear all authentication data (for testing/reset)\n  static Future<void> clearAll() async {\n    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n    await prefs.clear();\n  }\n}\n","numLines":282,"startLine":1,"totalLines":282}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"ba88f016-497e-44e8-8fdb-799fbbf9e8e7"}

{"parentUuid":"bf8510dc-b670-424e-bc05-ab7e357b60cf","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Lp1jzWCuZ4Wq1iQ4tFdQX9","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"The backend uses JWT authentication via `rest_framework_simplejwt`. With no users in the database, the `TokenObtainPairView` will return a 401 error. The ApiClient in the frontend probably doesn't throw exceptions for 4xx responses, so the `catch(e)` block won't be triggered, and the code will fall through to check if `response.statusCode == 200`. Since 401 != 200, it won't enter that block either. Then it falls to the `catch(e)` block... wait, no, if there's no exception thrown it falls through to after the try block.\n\nLet me re-read the code flow:\n\n\nThe request completes without throwing an exception, so it skips the catch block entirely and falls through to the test credentials check. If the backend returns a non-200 status, the code doesn't handle it in the try block, so it proceeds to check if the email exists in the test credentials dictionary. So the test credential fallback should work either way—whether the API throws an exception or just returns a non-200 status. The real question is whether Richard is actually using the correct email and password from the test credentials, or if there's something else blocking access to the AICERTS course even after successful login.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":746,"cache_read_input_tokens":37639,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":746,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYc9Cf9P1pZ4s8kg4vSaA","type":"assistant","uuid":"8674e67e-1151-421b-b647-4a5c31ed9026","timestamp":"2026-03-01T09:42:49.513Z"}

{"parentUuid":"4247632f-933f-40f9-babe-75fc9e5195b7","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019usSLWho6bdzVFX2bHzb2o","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→// lib/src/core/api/api_client.dart\n     2→\n     3→import 'package:dio/dio.dart';\n     4→import 'package:pretty_dio_logger/pretty_dio_logger.dart';\n     5→\n     6→import '../config/environment.dart';\n     7→import '../services/auth_service.dart';\n     8→import '../../data/models/masterclass.dart';\n     9→import '../../data/models/course.dart';\n    10→import '../../data/models/learnership.dart';\n    11→\n    12→class ApiClient {\n    13→  static final Dio _dio = Dio(\n    14→    BaseOptions(\n    15→      baseUrl: Environment.apiBaseUrl,\n    16→      connectTimeout: Duration(seconds: Environment.apiTimeout),\n    17→      receiveTimeout: Duration(seconds: Environment.apiTimeout),\n    18→      headers: {\n    19→        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n    20→        'Accept': 'application/json',\n    21→      },\n    22→    ),\n    23→  );\n    24→\n    25→  static void initialize() {\n    26→    // Add Authentication Interceptor\n    27→    _dio.interceptors.add(\n    28→      InterceptorsWrapper(\n    29→        onRequest: (options, handler) async {\n    30→          // Skip auth header for login endpoint to prevent potential issues\n    31→          if (!options.path.contains('/auth/login')) {\n    32→            final token = await AuthService.getAccessToken();\n    33→            if (token != null && token.isNotEmpty) {\n    34→              options.headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer $token';\n    35→            }\n    36→          }\n    37→          return handler.next(options);\n    38→        },\n    39→      ),\n    40→    );\n    41→\n    42→    _dio.interceptors.add(\n    43→      PrettyDioLogger(\n    44→        requestHeader: true,\n    45→        requestBody: true,\n    46→        responseBody: true,\n    47→        responseHeader: false,\n    48→        error: true,\n    49→        compact: true,\n    50→        maxWidth: 90,\n    51→      ),\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→\n    55→  // Generic GET\n    56→  static Future<Response> get(\n    57→    String path, {\n    58→    Map<String, dynamic>? queryParameters,\n    59→    Options? options,\n    60→  }) async {\n    61→    try {\n    62→      return await _dio.get(\n    63→        path,\n    64→        queryParameters: queryParameters,\n    65→        options: options,\n    66→      );\n    67→    } on DioException catch (e) {\n    68→      print('GET $path failed: ${e.message}');\n    69→      if (e.response != null) {\n    70→        print('Status: ${e.response?.statusCode}');\n    71→        print('Data: ${e.response?.data}');\n    72→      }\n    73→      rethrow;\n    74→    }\n    75→  }\n    76→\n    77→  // Generic POST\n    78→  static Future<Response> post(\n    79→    String path, {\n    80→    dynamic data,\n    81→    Map<String, dynamic>? queryParameters,\n    82→    Options? options,\n    83→  }) async {\n    84→    try {\n    85→      return await _dio.post(\n    86→        path,\n    87→        data: data,\n    88→        queryParameters: queryParameters,\n    89→        options: options,\n    90→      );\n    91→    } on DioException catch (e) {\n    92→      print('POST $path failed: ${e.message}');\n    93→      rethrow;\n    94→    }\n    95→  }\n    96→\n    97→  // ==============================\n    98→  // PAYMENT & ENROLLMENT METHODS\n    99→  // ==============================\n   100→\n   101→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getAvailablePaymentProviders({\n   102→    String? country,\n   103→    double? amount,\n   104→    String? currency,\n   105→  }) async {\n   106→    final queryParams = <String, dynamic>{};\n   107→    if (country != null) queryParams['country'] = country;\n   108→    if (amount != null) queryParams['amount'] = amount;\n   109→    if (currency != null) queryParams['currency'] = currency;\n   110→\n   111→    final response = await get(\n   112→      '/api/v1/payments/providers/',\n   113→      queryParameters: queryParams,\n   114→    );\n   115→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> initiatePayment({\n   119→    required String programId,\n   120→    required String type,\n   121→    required double amount,\n   122→    required Map<String, dynamic> metadata,\n   123→    String? orderId,\n   124→    String? provider,\n   125→    String? country,\n   126→    String? currency,\n   127→  }) async {\n   128→    final payload = {\n   129→      'program_id': programId,\n   130→      'type': type,\n   131→      'amount': amount,\n   132→      'metadata': metadata,\n   133→      if (orderId != null) 'order_id': orderId,\n   134→      if (provider != null) 'provider_code': provider,\n   135→      if (country != null) 'country': country,\n   136→      if (currency != null) 'currency': currency,\n   137→      ...metadata,\n   138→    };\n   139→\n   140→    final response = await post('/api/v1/payments/initiate/', data: payload);\n   141→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   142→  }\n   143→\n   144→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createEnrollment(\n   145→      Map<String, dynamic> data) async {\n   146→    final response = await post('/api/v1/payments/enrollments/', data: data);\n   147→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createBulkEnrollment(\n   151→      Map<String, dynamic> data) async {\n   152→    final response =\n   153→        await post('/api/v1/payments/bulk-enrollments/', data: data);\n   154→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   155→  }\n   156→\n   157→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> proceedToPayment({\n   158→    required int enrollmentId,\n   159→    bool isBulk = false,\n   160→  }) async {\n   161→    final path = isBulk\n   162→        ? '/api/v1/payments/bulk-enrollments/$enrollmentId/proceed_to_payment/'\n   163→        : '/api/v1/payments/enrollments/$enrollmentId/proceed_to_payment/';\n   164→    final response = await post(path, data: {});\n   165→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createProvisionalEnrollment({\n   169→    required String programId,\n   170→    required String type,\n   171→    required Map<String, dynamic> userData,\n   172→    required String method,\n   173→    required double amount,\n   174→  }) async {\n   175→    final payload = {\n   176→      'program_id': programId,\n   177→      'type': type,\n   178→      'method': method,\n   179→      'amount': amount,\n   180→      'user_data': userData,\n   181→      'status': 'provisional',\n   182→    };\n   183→\n   184→    final response =\n   185→        await post('/api/v1/enrollments/provisional/', data: payload);\n   186→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   187→  }\n   188→\n   189→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> finalizeEnrollment({\n   190→    required String reference,\n   191→    required String programType,\n   192→    required int programId,\n   193→    required Map<String, dynamic> metadata,\n   194→  }) async {\n   195→    final payload = {\n   196→      'reference': reference,\n   197→      'program_type': programType,\n   198→      'program_id': programId,\n   199→      'metadata': metadata,\n   200→    };\n   201→\n   202→    final response = await post('/api/v1/enrollments/finalize/', data: payload);\n   203→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   204→  }\n   205→\n   206→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> verifyPaymentStatus(\n   207→      String reference) async {\n   208→    final response = await get('/api/v1/payments/verify/$reference/');\n   209→    return response.data;\n   210→  }\n   211→\n   212→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> initiatePaystackPayment({\n   213→    required double amount,\n   214→    required String email,\n   215→    required String reference,\n   216→  }) async {\n   217→    final payload = {\n   218→      'amount': amount,\n   219→      'email': email,\n   220→      'reference': reference,\n   221→    };\n   222→    final response = await post('/api/v1/payments/initiate/', data: payload);\n   223→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   224→  }\n   225→\n   226→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> simulatePaymentSuccess(\n   227→      String transactionId) async {\n   228→    final response = await post(\n   229→        '/api/v1/payments/simulate-success/$transactionId/',\n   230→        data: {});\n   231→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   232→  }\n   233→\n apps.users.urls)\n   239→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createUser({\n   240→    required String firstName,\n   241→    required String lastName,\n   242→    required String email,\n   243→ 866→  }\n   867→\n   868→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getStudentProfile() async {\n   869→    final response = await get('/api/v1/student-portal/profile/me/');\n   870→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   871→  }\n   872→\n   873→  // --- Wishlist ---\n   874→\n   875→  static Future<List<dynamic>> getWishlist({String? trainingType}) async {\n   876→    final query = <String, dynamic>{};\n   877→    if (trainingType != null) query['type'] = trainingType;\n   878→\n   879→    final response =\n   880→        await get('/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/', queryParameters: query);\n   881→    return _extractList(response.data);\n   882→  }\n   883→\n   884→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> addToWishlist({\n   885→    required int contentTypeId,\n   886→    required int objectId,\n   887→    required String trainingType,\n   888→    String? notes,\n   889→  }) async {\n   890→    // Note: The backend view logic for 'add_to_wishlist' is on the catalog item viewset,\n   891→    // but the serializers expect a straight POST to wishlist endpoint or a detail action.\n   892→    // Let's use the catalog action if possible, or standard POST.\n   893→    // Based on backend code:\n   894→    // CourseCatalogViewSet has an action `add_to_wishlist` on detail route.\n   895→    // BUT we need the ID of the catalog item.\n   896→    // Alternatively, WishlistViewSet has a standard create. Let's use standard create.\n   897→\n   898→    final payload = {\n   899→      'content_type': contentTypeId,\n   900→      'object_id': objectId,\n   901→      'training_type': trainingType,\n   902→      if (notes != null) 'notes': notes,\n   903→    };\n   904→\n   905→    // Using standard POST to wishlist endpoint\n   906→    // Check if backend supports raw create on WishlistViewSet (it seems so, serializer has fields)\n   907→    // Wait, WishlistSerializer has read_only fields for content_type/object_id in Meta? No.\n   908→    // Let's try standard POST. If fails, we might need to use catalog endpoint.\n   909→\n   910→    final response =\n   911→        await post('/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/', data: payload);\n   912→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   913→  }\n   914→\n   915→  static Future<void> removeFromWishlist(int wishlistId) async {\n   916→    await _dio.delete('/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/$wishlistId/');\n   917→  }\n   918→\n   919→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> moveWishlistItemToCart(\n   920→      int wishlistId) async {\n   921→    final response = await post(\n   922→        '/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/$wishlistId/move_to_cart/',\n   923→        data: {});\n   924→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   925→  }\n   926→\n   927→  // --- Cart ---\n   928→\n   929→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getActiveCart() async {\n   930→    final response = await get('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/active/');\n   931→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   932→  }\n   933→\n   934→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> addToCart({\n   935→    required int cartId,\n   936→    required int contentTypeId,\n   937→    required int objectId,\n   938→    required String trainingType,\n   939→    bool fromWishlist = false,\n   940→  }) async {\n   941→    final payload = {\n   942→      'content_type_id': contentTypeId,\n   943→      'object_id': objectId,\n   944→      'training_type': trainingType,\n   945→      'from_wishlist': fromWishlist,\n   946→    };\n   947→\n   948→    final response = await post('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/add_item/',\n   949→        data: payload);\n   950→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   951→  }\n   952→\n   953→  static Future<void> removeFromCart(int cartId, int itemId) async {\n   954→    await _dio.delete(\n   955→      '/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/remove_item/',\n   956→      data: {\n   957→        'item_id': itemId\n   958→      }, // Using delete with body as per view implementation\n   959→    );\n   960→  }\n   961→\n   962→  static Future<void> clearCart(int cartId) async {\n   963→    await post('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/clear/', data: {});\n   964→  }\n   965→\n   966→  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> checkoutCart({\n   967→    required int cartId,\n   968→    bool usePreviousDetails = false,\n   969→    bool isCorporate = false,\n   970→  }) async {\n   971→    final payload = {\n   972→      'use_previous_company_details': usePreviousDetails,\n   973→      'is_corporate_enrollment': isCorporate,\n   974→    };\n   975→\n   976→    final response = await post('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/checkout/',\n   977→        data: payload);\n   978→    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   979→  }\n   980→}\n   981→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"uuid":"ad00eb28-2819-4e21-9445-d27ba5157572","timestamp":"2026-03-01T09:42:50.307Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend/lib/src/core/api/api_client.dart","content":"// lib/src/core/api/api_client.dart\n\nimport 'package:dio/dio.dart';\nimport 'package:pretty_dio_logger/pretty_dio_logger.dart';\n\nimport '../config/environment.dart';\nimport '../services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../data/models/masterclass.dart';\nimport '../../data/models/course.dart';\nimport '../../data/models/learnership.dart';\n\nclass ApiClient {\n  static final Dio _dio = Dio(\n    BaseOptions(\n      baseUrl: Environment.apiBaseUrl,\n      connectTimeout: Duration(seconds: Environment.apiTimeout),\n      receiveTimeout: Duration(seconds: Environment.apiTimeout),\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        'Accept': 'application/json',\n      },\n    ),\n  );\n\n  static void initialize() {\n    // Add Authentication Interceptor\n    _dio.interceptors.add(\n      InterceptorsWrapper(\n        onRequest: (options, handler) async {\n          // Skip auth header for login endpoint to prevent potential issues\n          if (!options.path.contains('/auth/login')) {\n            final token = await AuthService.getAccessToken();\n            if (token != null && token.isNotEmpty) {\n              options.headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer $token';\n            }\n          }\n          return handler.next(options);\n        },\n      ),\n    );\n\n    _dio.interceptors.add(\n      PrettyDioLogger(\n        requestHeader: true,\n        requestBody: true,\n        responseBody: true,\n        responseHeader: false,\n        error: true,\n        compact: true,\n        maxWidth: 90,\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Generic GET\n  static Future<Response> get(\n    String path, {\n    Map<String, dynamic>? queryParameters,\n    Options? options,\n  }) async {\n    try {\n      return await _dio.get(\n        path,\n        queryParameters: queryParameters,\n        options: options,\n      );\n    } on DioException catch (e) {\n      print('GET $path failed: ${e.message}');\n      if (e.response != null) {\n        print('Status: ${e.response?.statusCode}');\n        print('Data: ${e.response?.data}');\n      }\n      rethrow;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Generic POST\n  static Future<Response> post(\n    String path, {\n    dynamic data,\n    Map<String, dynamic>? queryParameters,\n    Options? options,\n  }) async {\n    try {\n      return await _dio.post(\n        path,\n        data: data,\n        queryParameters: queryParameters,\n        options: options,\n      );\n    } on DioException catch (e) {\n      print('POST $path failed: ${e.message}');\n      rethrow;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // PAYMENT & ENROLLMENT METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getAvailablePaymentProviders({\n    String? country,\n    double? amount,\n    String? currency,\n  }) async {\n    final queryParams = <String, dynamic>{};\n    if (country != null) queryParams['country'] = country;\n    if (amount != null) queryParams['amount'] = amount;\n    if (currency != null) queryParams['currency'] = currency;\n\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/payments/providers/',\n      queryParameters: queryParams,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> initiatePayment({\n    required String programId,\n    required String type,\n    required double amount,\n    required Map<String, dynamic> metadata,\n    String? orderId,\n    String? provider,\n    String? country,\n    String? currency,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'program_id': programId,\n      'type': type,\n      'amount': amount,\n      'metadata': metadata,\n      if (orderId != null) 'order_id': orderId,\n      if (provider != null) 'provider_code': provider,\n      if (country != null) 'country': country,\n      if (currency != null) 'currency': currency,\n      ...metadata,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post('/api/v1/payments/initiate/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createEnrollment(\n      Map<String, dynamic> data) async {\n    final response = await post('/api/v1/payments/enrollments/', data: data);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createBulkEnrollment(\n      Map<String, dynamic> data) async {\n    final response =\n        await post('/api/v1/payments/bulk-enrollments/', data: data);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> proceedToPayment({\n    required int enrollmentId,\n    bool isBulk = false,\n  }) async {\n    final path = isBulk\n        ? '/api/v1/payments/bulk-enrollments/$enrollmentId/proceed_to_payment/'\n        : '/api/v1/payments/enrollments/$enrollmentId/proceed_to_payment/';\n    final response = await post(path, data: {});\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createProvisionalEnrollment({\n    required String programId,\n    required String type,\n    required Map<String, dynamic> userData,\n    required String method,\n    required double amount,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'program_id': programId,\n      'type': type,\n      'method': method,\n      'amount': amount,\n      'user_data': userData,\n      'status': 'provisional',\n    };\n\n    final response =\n        await post('/api/v1/enrollments/provisional/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> finalizeEnrollment({\n    required String reference,\n    required String programType,\n    required int programId,\n    required Map<String, dynamic> metadata,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'reference': reference,\n      'program_type': programType,\n      'program_id': programId,\n      'metadata': metadata,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post('/api/v1/enrollments/finalize/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> verifyPaymentStatus(\n      String reference) async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/payments/verify/$reference/');\n    return response.data;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> initiatePaystackPayment({\n    required double amount,\n    required String email,\n    required String reference,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'amount': amount,\n      'email': email,\n      'reference': reference,\n    };\n    final response = await post('/api/v1/payments/initiate/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> simulatePaymentSuccess(\n      String transactionId) async {\n    final response = await post(\n        '/api/v1/payments/simulate-success/$transactionId/',\n        data: {});\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // NEW METHODS – added to support EnrollmentService\n  // ==============================\n\n  /// Creates a new user (via apps.users.urls)\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createUser({\n    required String firstName,\n    required String lastName,\n    required String email,\n    String? username,\n    String? password,\n    String? idNumber,\n    String? phone,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'first_name': firstName,\n      'last_name': lastName,\n      'name': '$firstName $lastName'.trim(),\n      'email': email,\n      'username': username ?? email,\n      'password': password ??\n          'Hosi@${DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch}', // Default password if none provided\n      if (idNumber != null) 'id_number': idNumber,\n      if (phone != null) 'phone': phone,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/users/create/',\n      data: payload,\n    );\n\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  /// Get current user's enrollments\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getMyEnrollments() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/payments/enrollments/');\n    if (response.data is List) {\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(response.data);\n    } else if (response.data is Map && response.data.containsKey('results')) {\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(response.data['results']);\n    }\n    return [];\n  }\n\n  /// Get SSO URL for an enrollment\n  static Future<String?> getEnrollmentSSOUrl(int enrollmentId) async {\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/payments/enrollments/$enrollmentId/get_sso_url/');\n    return response.data['sso_url'] as String?;\n  }\n\n  /// Get AICerts specific enrollments\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getAICertsEnrollments() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/aicerts/enrollments/');\n    if (response.data is List) {\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(response.data);\n    } else if (response.data is Map && response.data.containsKey('results')) {\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(response.data['results']);\n    }\n    return [];\n  }\n\n  /// Get SSO URL for an AICerts course enrollment\n  static Future<String?> getAICertsSSOUrl(int enrollmentId) async {\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/aicerts/enrollments/$enrollmentId/sso-url/');\n    return response.data['sso_url'] as String?;\n  }\n\n  /// Get Learnership enrollments with prerequisite status\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getLearnershipEnrollments() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/learnerships/enrollments/');\n    if (response.data is List) {\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(response.data);\n    } else if (response.data is Map && response.data.containsKey('results')) {\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(response.data['results']);\n    }\n    return [];\n  }\n\n  /// Get prerequisite status for a learnership enrollment\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getPrerequisitesStatus(\n      int learnershipEnrollmentId) async {\n    final response = await get(\n        '/api/v1/learnerships/enrollments/$learnershipEnrollmentId/prerequisites_status/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  /// Upload prerequisite evidence\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> uploadPrerequisiteEvidence({\n    required int enrollmentId,\n    required String prerequisiteKey,\n    required String prerequisiteName,\n    required dynamic file, // MultipartFile or similar\n    String? description,\n  }) async {\n    final formData = FormData.fromMap({\n      'enrollment': enrollmentId,\n      'prerequisite_key': prerequisiteKey,\n      'prerequisite_name': prerequisiteName,\n      'evidence_file': file,\n      if (description != null) 'evidence_description': description,\n    });\n\n    final response =\n        await post('/api/v1/learnerships/evidence/', data: formData);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  /// Checks if an email exists (via apps.users.urls)\n  static Future<bool> checkEmailExists(String email) async {\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/users/check-email/',\n      queryParameters: {'email': email},\n    );\n    final data = response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n    return data['exists'] as bool;\n  }\n\n  /// Creates a provisional learnership enrollment record\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createProvisionalLearnershipEnrollment({\n    required int programId,\n    required String userId,\n    required String transactionReference,\n    required int expiresInDays,\n    required bool isCorporate,\n    Map<String, dynamic>? companyData,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'program_id': programId,\n      'user_id': userId,\n      'transaction_reference': transactionReference,\n      'expires_in_days': expiresInDays,\n      'is_corporate': isCorporate,\n      if (companyData != null) 'company': companyData,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/enrollments/provisional/learnership/', // matches your apps.enrollments.urls\n      data: payload,\n    );\n\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  /// Confirms a provisional learnership enrollment (admin verification)\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> confirmProvisionalLearnershipEnrollment(\n    int provisionalId,\n  ) async {\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/enrollments/provisional/$provisionalId/confirm/',\n      data: {},\n    );\n\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  /// Retrieves details of a provisional learnership enrollment\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getProvisionalLearnershipEnrollment(\n    int provisionalId,\n  ) async {\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/enrollments/provisional/$provisionalId/',\n    );\n\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  /// Triggers a reimbursement/refund for a payment\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> reimbursePayment(\n    String transactionReference,\n  ) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'transaction_reference': transactionReference,\n      // Optional: add reason or amount if your backend requires it\n      // 'reason': 'Learnership prerequisites not met',\n    };\n\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/payments/reimburse/', // matches path(\"api/v1/payments/\", include(\"apps.payments.urls\"))\n      data: payload,\n    );\n\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // LOCATION DATA METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getAfricanCountries() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/localization/countries/');\n    final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(items);\n  }\n\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getAfricanCities(\n      int countryId) async {\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/localization/cities/',\n      queryParameters: {'country_id': countryId},\n    );\n    final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(items);\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // ADMIN METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getAdminPayments({\n    String? status,\n    String? filter,\n    String? searchQuery,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{};\n\n    if (status != null) query['status'] = status;\n    if (filter != null) query['filter'] = filter;\n    if (searchQuery != null && searchQuery.isNotEmpty) {\n      query['search'] = searchQuery;\n    }\n\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/payments/',\n      queryParameters: query,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> verifyPayment({\n    required String paymentId,\n    required String status,\n    String? notes,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'status': status,\n      if (notes != null) 'notes': notes,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/payments/$paymentId/verify/',\n      data: payload,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getOperationalAdminData({\n    String? searchQuery,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{};\n    if (searchQuery != null && searchQuery.isNotEmpty) {\n      query['search'] = searchQuery;\n    }\n\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/operations/data/',\n      queryParameters: query,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getMarketingAnalytics({int limit = 10}) async {\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/student-portal/analytics/marketing/',\n      queryParameters: {'limit': limit},\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> verifyProvisionalEnrollment({\n    required int enrollmentId,\n    required String status,\n    String? notes,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'status': status,\n      if (notes != null) 'notes': notes,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/operations/provisional/$enrollmentId/verify/',\n      data: payload,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getHRDashboardData() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/payments/admin/hr/dashboard/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getExecutiveAnalytics({\n    String? period,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{};\n    if (period != null) query['period'] = period;\n\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/executive/analytics/',\n      queryParameters: query,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getSalesMarketingAnalytics({\n    String? period,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{};\n    if (period != null) query['period'] = period;\n\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/sales-marketing/analytics/',\n      queryParameters: query,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getInstructorPayrollData() async {\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/payments/admin/hr/payroll/instructors/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> updateInstructorRate({\n    required int userId,\n    required double hourlyRate,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {'hourly_rate': hourlyRate};\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/payments/admin/hr/payroll/instructors/$userId/rate/',\n      data: payload,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n   final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(items);\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // FACILITATOR / INSTRUCTOR METHODS\n  // as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>>\n      getFacilitatorOvertimeRequests() async {\n    // MOCKED: Backend support removed temporarily\n    return [];\n METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  static Future<List<Masterclass>> getMasterclasses({\n    String? streamType,\n    String? tier,\n    String? focusArea,\n    double? minPrice,\n    double? maxPrice,\n    int page = 1,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{'page': page};\n\n    if (streamType != null) query['stream_type'] = streamType;\n    if (tier != null) query['tier'] = tier;\n    if (focusArea != null) query['focus_area'] = focusArea;\n    if (minPrice != null) query['min_price'] = minPrice;\n    if (maxPrice != null) query['max_price'] = maxPrice;\n\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/courses/masterclasses/', queryParameters: query);\n    final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return items.map((e) => Masterclass.fromJson(e)).toList();\n  }\n\n  static Future<List<Course>> getIndustryTraining({\n    String? industry,\n    String? roleType,\n    String? certificationLevel,\n    String? country,\n    int page = 1,\n    int pageSize = 50,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{\n      'page': page,\n      'page_size': pageSize,\n    };\n    if (industry != null) query['industry'] = industry;\n    if (roleType != null) query['role_type'] = roleType;\n    if (certificationLevel != null)\n      query['certification_level'] = certificationLevel;\n    if (country != null) query['country'] = country;\n\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/industry-training/active-courses/',\n        queryParameters: query);\n    final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return items.map((e) => Course.fromJson(e)).toList();\n  }\n\n  static Future<List<Learnership>> getLearnerships({\n    String? specialization,\n    String? country,\n    String? status,\n    String? nqfLevel,\n    String? deliveryMode,\n    int page = 1,\n    int pageSize = 50,\n  }) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{\n      'page': page,\n      'page_size': pageSize,\n    };\n    if (specialization != null) query['specialization'] = specialization;\n    if (country != null) query['country'] = country;\n    if (status != null) query['status'] = status;\n    if (nqfLevel != null) query['nqf_level'] = nqfLevel;\n    if (deliveryMode != null) query['delivery_mode'] = deliveryMode;\n\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/learnerships/programmes/', queryParameters: query);\n    final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return items.map((e) => Learnership.fromJson(e)).toList();\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // STUDENT PROFILE METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  /// Check if the current user is an existing student with prior enrollments\n  /// Returns student data to skip personal information collection\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> checkExistingStudent() async {\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/student-portal/profile/check_existing_student/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<void> enrollUserInCourse({\n    required String userId,\n    required int courseId,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'user_id': userId,\n      'course_id': courseId,\n    };\n    await post('/api/v1/enrollments/enroll/', data: payload);\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getFacilitatorMe() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/facilitators/profiles/me/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> clockIn({\n    required int profileId,\n    required int assignmentId,\n    String type = 'onsite',\n    double? latitude,\n    double? longitude,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'assignment_id': assignmentId,\n      'type': type,\n      'latitude': latitude,\n      'longitude': longitude,\n    };\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/facilitators/profiles/$profileId/clock_in/',\n      data: payload,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> clockOut({\n    required int profileId,\n    String? justification,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {'justification': justification};\n    final response = await post(\n      '/api/v1/facilitators/profiles/$profileId/clock_out/',\n      data: payload,\n    );\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getAttendanceLogs() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/facilitators/attendance/');\n    return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(_extractList(response.data));\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getExecutiveInsights() async {\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/facilitators/analytics/executive-insights/');\n    return Map<String, dynamic>.from(response.data);\n  }\n\n  static List<dynamic> _extractList(dynamic body) {\n    if (body is Map<String, dynamic>) {\n      if (body.containsKey('results')) return body['results'] as List<dynamic>;\n      if (body.containsKey('data')) return body['data'] as List<dynamic>;\n      if (body.containsKey('countries'))\n        return body['countries'] as List<dynamic>;\n      if (body.containsKey('states')) return body['states'] as List<dynamic>;\n      if (body.containsKey('cities')) return body['cities'] as List<dynamic>;\n    }\n    if (body is List<dynamic>) return body;\n    return [];\n  }\n\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getPublicInstructors() async {\n    final response = await get(\n      '/api/v1/facilitators/profiles/public_list/',\n      queryParameters: {'limit': 20, 'offset': 0},\n    );\n    final items = _extractList(response.data);\n    return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(items);\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // TEST USER METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  static Future<List<Map<String, dynamic>>> getTestUsers() async {\n    try {\n      final response = await get('/api/v1/users/test-users/');\n      return List<Map<String, dynamic>>.from(_extractList(response.data));\n    } catch (e) {\n      // Return empty list if endpoint not implemented yet\n      return [];\n    }\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createTestStudent({\n    required String email,\n    required String firstName,\n    required String lastName,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'email': email,\n      'first_name': firstName,\n      'last_name': lastName,\n      'role': 'learner',\n    };\n    final response =\n        await post('/api/v1/users/test-users/hosi-student/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> createTestInstructor({\n    required String email,\n    required String firstName,\n    required String lastName,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'email': email,\n      'first_name': firstName,\n      'last_name': lastName,\n      'role': 'instructor',\n    };\n    final response =\n        await post('/api/v1/users/test-users/hosi-instructor/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<void> deleteTestUser(String email) async {\n    try {\n      await _dio.delete(\n        '/api/v1/users/test-users/',\n        queryParameters: {'email': email},\n      );\n    } catch (e) {\n      throw Exception('Failed to delete user: $e');\n    }\n  }\n\n  // ==============================\n  // STUDENT PORTAL METHODS\n  // ==============================\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getContentTypes() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/student-portal/content-types/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getStudentProfile() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/student-portal/profile/me/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  // --- Wishlist ---\n\n  static Future<List<dynamic>> getWishlist({String? trainingType}) async {\n    final query = <String, dynamic>{};\n    if (trainingType != null) query['type'] = trainingType;\n\n    final response =\n        await get('/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/', queryParameters: query);\n    return _extractList(response.data);\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> addToWishlist({\n    required int contentTypeId,\n    required int objectId,\n    required String trainingType,\n    String? notes,\n  }) async {\n    // Note: The backend view logic for 'add_to_wishlist' is on the catalog item viewset,\n    // but the serializers expect a straight POST to wishlist endpoint or a detail action.\n    // Let's use the catalog action if possible, or standard POST.\n    // Based on backend code:\n    // CourseCatalogViewSet has an action `add_to_wishlist` on detail route.\n    // BUT we need the ID of the catalog item.\n    // Alternatively, WishlistViewSet has a standard create. Let's use standard create.\n\n    final payload = {\n      'content_type': contentTypeId,\n      'object_id': objectId,\n      'training_type': trainingType,\n      if (notes != null) 'notes': notes,\n    };\n\n    // Using standard POST to wishlist endpoint\n    // Check if backend supports raw create on WishlistViewSet (it seems so, serializer has fields)\n    // Wait, WishlistSerializer has read_only fields for content_type/object_id in Meta? No.\n    // Let's try standard POST. If fails, we might need to use catalog endpoint.\n\n    final response =\n        await post('/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/', data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<void> removeFromWishlist(int wishlistId) async {\n    await _dio.delete('/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/$wishlistId/');\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> moveWishlistItemToCart(\n      int wishlistId) async {\n    final response = await post(\n        '/api/v1/student-portal/wishlist/$wishlistId/move_to_cart/',\n        data: {});\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  // --- Cart ---\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getActiveCart() async {\n    final response = await get('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/active/');\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> addToCart({\n    required int cartId,\n    required int contentTypeId,\n    required int objectId,\n    required String trainingType,\n    bool fromWishlist = false,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'content_type_id': contentTypeId,\n      'object_id': objectId,\n      'training_type': trainingType,\n      'from_wishlist': fromWishlist,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/add_item/',\n        data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  }\n\n  static Future<void> removeFromCart(int cartId, int itemId) async {\n    await _dio.delete(\n      '/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/remove_item/',\n      data: {\n        'item_id': itemId\n      }, // Using delete with body as per view implementation\n    );\n  }\n\n  static Future<void> clearCart(int cartId) async {\n    await post('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/clear/', data: {});\n  }\n\n  static Future<Map<String, dynamic>> checkoutCart({\n    required int cartId,\n    bool usePreviousDetails = false,\n    bool isCorporate = false,\n  }) async {\n    final payload = {\n      'use_previous_company_details': usePreviousDetails,\n      'is_corporate_enrollment': isCorporate,\n    };\n\n    final response = await post('/api/v1/student-portal/cart/$cartId/checkout/',\n        data: payload);\n    return response.data as Map<String, dynamic>;\n  15→import logging\n    16→from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple\n    17→from django.conf import settings\n    18→from django.core.cache import cache\n    19→from django.db import transaction\n    20→\n    21→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n    22→\n    23→\n    24→class AICERTsAPIError(Exception):\n    25→    \"\"\"Custom exception for AICERTs API errors\"\"\"\n    26→ AICERTsEnrollmentError(AICERTsAPIError):\n    35→    \"\"\"Enrollment operation failed\"\"\"\n    36→    pass\n    37→\n    38→\n    39→class HMACSignatureService:\n    40→    \"\"\"\n    41→    Handles HMAC signature generation for AICERTs SSO API.\n    42→\n    43→    Signature format: HMAC-SHA256(data, secret_key)\n    44→    Data format: \"email:timestamp\" or \"userid:timestamp\"\n    45→    \"\"\"\n    46→\n    47→    @staticmethod\n    48→    def generate_signature(data: str, secret_key: str = None) -> str:\n    49→        \"\"\"\n    50→        Generate HMAC SHA256 signature.\n    51→\n    52→        Args:\n    53→            data: String to sign (e.g., \"user@example.com:1234567890\")\n    54→            secret_key: HMAC secret key (defaults to settings)\n    55→\n    56→        Returns:\n    57→            Hex-encoded HMAC signature\n    58→        \"\"\"\n    59→        if secret_key is None:\n    60→            secret_key = settings.AICERTS_SECRET_KEY\n    61→\n    62→        return hmac.new(\n    63→            secret_key.encode('utf-8'),\n    64→            data.encode('utf-8'),\n    65→            hashlib.sha256\n    66→        ).hexdigest()\n    67→\n    68→    @staticmethod\n    69→    def generate_timestamp_signature(identifier: str, timestamp: int = None) -> Tuple[int, str]:\n    70→        \"\"\"\n    71→        Generate timestamp and signature for API call.\n    72→\n    73→        Args:\n    74→            identifier: Email or user ID\n    75→            timestamp: Optional timestamp (generates current if None)\n    76→\n    77→        Returns:\n    78→            Tuple of (timestamp, signature)\n    79→        \"\"\"\n    80→        if timestamp is None:\n    81→            timestamp = int(time.time())\n    82→\n    83→        data = f\"{identifier}:{timestamp}\"\n    84→        signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_signature(data)\n    85→\n    86→        return timestamp, signature\n    87→\n    88→\n    89→class CourseDataService:\n    90→    \"\"\"\n    91→    Service for interacting with AICERTs Course Data API (v1.1).\n    92→    Base URL: https://www.aicerts.ai/wp-json/aicerts-api/v1\n    93→\n    94→ Partnership Integration Services\nHandles all API interactions with AICERTs LMS for:\n- Course data synchronization\n- User creation and management\n- Course enrollment\n- SSO authentication\n- Instructor validation\n\"\"\"\n\nimport hmac\nimport hashlib\nimport time\nimport requests\nimport logging\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple\nfrom django.conf import settings\nfrom django.core.cache import cache\nfrom django.db import transaction\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass AICERTsAPIError(Exception):\n    \"\"\"Custom exception for AICERTs API errors\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass AICERTsAuthenticationError(AICERTsAPIError):\n    \"\"\"Authentication failed with AICERTs\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass AICERTsEnrollmentError(AICERTsAPIError):\n    \"\"\"Enrollment operation failed\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass HMACSignatureService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Handles HMAC signature generation for AICERTs SSO API.\n\n    Signature format: HMAC-SHA256(data, secret_key)\n    Data format: \"email:timestamp\" or \"userid:timestamp\"\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def generate_signature(data: str, secret_key: str = None) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate HMAC SHA256 signature.\n\n        Args:\n            data: String to sign (e.g., \"user@example.com:1234567890\")\n            secret_key: HMAC secret key (defaults to settings)\n\n        Returns:\n            Hex-encoded HMAC signature\n        \"\"\"\n        if secret_key is None:\n            secret_key = settings.AICERTS_SECRET_KEY\n\n        return hmac.new(\n            secret_key.encode('utf-8'),\n            data.encode('utf-8'),\n            hashlib.sha256\n        ).hexdigest()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def generate_timestamp_signature(identifier: str, timestamp: int = None) -> Tuple[int, str]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate timestamp and signature for API call.\n\n        Args:\n            identifier: Email or user ID\n            timestamp: Optional timestamp (generates current if None)\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (timestamp, signature)\n        \"\"\"\n        if timestamp is None:\n            timestamp = int(time.time())\n\n        data = f\"{identifier}:{timestamp}\"\n        signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_signature(data)\n\n        return timestamp, signature\n\n\nclass CourseDataService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for interacting with AICERTs Course Data API (v1.1).\n    Base URL: https://www.aicerts.ai/wp-json/aicerts-api/v1\n\n    Endpoints:\n    - GET /courses - List all courses (paginated)\n    - GET /course/{id} - Get course details\n    \"\"\"\n\n    BASE_URL = settings.AICERTS_COURSE_API_BASE_URL\n    CACHE_TTL = 3600  # Cache course data for 1 hour","numLines":100,"startLine":1,"totalLines":586}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"ff80e089-9404-4ee7-b6a1-ed2fcb533a1c"}

{"parentUuid":"a819be71-af6b-4aa5-9ec6-8e8abd2b3049","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PHQrfRKWz3xg8V9DZbTntp","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"\"\"\n     2→Django management command to create test users for development/testing\n     3→Usage: python manage.py create_test_users\n     4→\"\"\"\n     5→\n     6→from django.core.management.base import BaseCommand\n     7→from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\n     8→from django.utils import timezone\n     9→\n    10→User = get_user_model()\n    11→\n    12→\n    13→class Command(BaseCommand):\n    14→    help = 'Creates test users for development and testing'\n    15→\n    16→    def handle(self, *args, **options):\n    17→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('Creating test users...'))\n    18→\n    19→        # Test Instructor: Sam\n    20→        instructor_email = 'sam@hosiafrica.com'\n    21→        instructor_password = '2222'\n    22→\n    23→        # Check if user already exists\n    24→        if User.objects.filter(email=instructor_email).exists():\n    25→            instructor = User.objects.get(email=instructor_email)\n    26→            self.stdout.write(\n    27→                self.style.WARNING(\n    28→                    f'Instructor user already exists: {instructor_email}'\n    29→                )\n    30→            )\n    31→            # Update password and ensure correct role\n    32→            instructor.set_password(instructor_password)\n    33→            instructor.role_id = 2  # Instructor role\n    34→            instructor.is_staff = True\n    35→            instructor.is_active = True\n    36→            instructor.is_aicerts_instructor = True  # Mark as AICerts instructor\n    37→            instructor.source = 'test_account'\n    38→            instructor.fullname = 'Sam Instructor'\n    39→            instructor.confirmed = True\n    40→            instructor.suspended = False\n    41→            instructor.save()\n    42→            self.stdout.write(\n    43→                self.style.SUCCESS(\n    44→                    f'[OK] Updated instructor: {instructor_email} (password reset to {instructor_password})'\n    45→                )\n    46→            )\n    47→        else:\n    48→            # Create new instructor\n    49→            instructor = User.objects.create_user(\n    50→                username='sam_instructor',\n    51→                email=instructor_email,\n    52→                password=instructor_password,\n    53→                first_name='Sam',\n    54→                last_name='Instructor',\n    55→                name='Sam Instructor',\n    56→                role_id=2,  # Instructor role (1=Admin, 2=Instructor, 3=Student)\n    57→                is_staff=True,\n    58→                is_active=True,\n    59→                email_verify='1',  # Email verified\n    60→                email_verified_at=timezone.now(),\n    61→                phone='+27 82 555 0001',\n    62→                city='Johannesburg',\n    63→                country='South Africa',\n    64→                headline='Expert Instructor in AI & Blockchain',\n    65→                about='Experienced instructor specializing in AI, Machine Learning, and Blockchain technologies. '\n    66→                      'Passionate about education and helping students achieve their goals.',\n    67→                balance=0.0,\n    68→                payout='PayPal',\n    69→                payout_email='sam@hosiafrica.com',\n    70→                # AICerts Integration Fields\n    71→                is_aicerts_instructor=True,\n    72→                fullname='Sam Instructor',\n    73→                confirmed=True,\n    74→                suspended=False,\n    75→                source='test_account',\n    76→                timezone='Africa/Johannesburg',\n    77→            )\n    78→            self.stdout.write(\n    79→                self.style.SUCCESS(\n    80→                    f'[OK] Created instructor: {instructor_email} with password: {instructor_password}'\n    81→                )\n    82→            )\n    83→\n    84→        # Test Student: John Doe\n    85→        student_email = 'student@hosiafrica.com'\n    86→        student_password = '1111'\n    87→\n    88→        if User.objects.filter(email=student_email).exists():\n    89→            student = User.objects.get(email=student_email)\n    90→            self.stdout.write(\n    91→                self.style.WARNING(f'Student user already exists: {student_email}')\n    92→            )\n    93→            student.set_password(student_password)\n    94→            student.role_id = 3  # Student role\n    95→            student.is_active = True\n    96→            student.source = 'test_account'\n    97→            student.fullname = 'John Doe'\n    98→            student.confirmed = True\n    99→            student.suspended = False\n   100→            student.save()\n   101→            self.stdout.write(\n   102→                self.style.SUCCESS(\n   103→                    f'[OK] Updated student: {student_email} (password reset to {student_password})'\n   104→                )\n   105→            )\n   106→        else:\n   107→            student = User.objects.create_user(\n   108→                username='john_student',\n   109→                email=student_email,\n   110→                password=student_password,\n   111→                first_name='John',\n   112→                last_name='Doe',\n   113→                name='John Doe',\n   114→                role_id=3,  # Summary\n   181→        self.stdout.write('')\n   182→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('=' * 60))\n   183→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('Test Users Created Successfully!'))\n   184→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('=' * 60))\n   185→        self.stdout.write('')\n   186→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('INSTRUCTOR LOGIN:'))\n   187→        self.stdout.write(f'  Email:    {instructor_email}')\n   188→        self.stdout.write(f'  Password: {instructor_password}')\n   189→        self.stdout.write(f'  Role:     Instructor (role_id=2)')\n   190→        self.stdout.write('')\n   191→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('STUDENT LOGIN:'))\n   192→        self.stdout.write(f'  Email:    {student_email}')\n   193→        self.stdout.write(f'  Password: {student_password}')\n   194→        self.stdout.write(f'  Role:     Student (role_id=3)')\n   195→        self.stdout.write('')\n   196→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('ADMIN LOGIN:'))\n   197→        self.stdout.write(f'  Email:    {admin_email}')\n   198→        self.stdout.write(f'  Password: {admin_password}')\n   199→        self.stdout.write(f'  Role:     Admin (role_id=1, superuser)')\n   200→        self.stdout.write('')\n   201→        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('=' * 60))\n   202→        self.stdout.write('')\n   203→        self.stdout.write(\n   204→            self.style.WARNING(\n   205→                'NOTE: These are test credentials for development only. '\n   206→                'Do not use in production!'\n   207→            )\n   208→        )\n   209→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"uuid":"3600a260-9036-4182-bd26-0f01378a5565","timestamp":"2026-03-01T09:45:02.425Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/management/commands/create_test_users.py","content":"\"\"\"\nDjango management command to create test users for development/testing\nUsage: python manage.py create_test_users\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom django.core.management.base import BaseCommand\nfrom django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.utils import timezone\n\nUser = get_user_model()\n\n\nclass Command(BaseCommand):\n    help = 'Creates test users for development and testing'\n\n    def handle(self, *args, **options):\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('Creating test users...'))\n\n        # Test Instructor: Sam\n        instructor_email = 'sam@hosiafrica.com'\n        instructor_password = '2222'\n\n        # Check if user already exists\n        if User.objects.filter(email=instructor_email).exists():\n            instructor = User.objects.get(email=instructor_email)\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.WARNING(\n                    f'Instructor user already exists: {instructor_email}'\n                )\n            )\n            # Update password and ensure correct role\n            instructor.set_password(instructor_password)\n            instructor.role_id = 2  # Instructor role\n            instructor.is_staff = True\n            instructor.is_active = True\n            instructor.is_aicerts_instructor = True  # Mark as AICerts instructor\n            instructor.source = 'test_account'\n            instructor.fullname = 'Sam Instructor'\n            instructor.confirmed = True\n            instructor.suspended = False\n            instructor.save()\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.SUCCESS(\n                    f'[OK] Updated instructor: {instructor_email} (password reset to {instructor_password})'\n                )\n            )\n        else:\n            # Create new instructor\n            instructor = User.objects.create_user(\n                username='sam_instructor',\n                email=instructor_email,\n                password=instructor_password,\n                first_name='Sam',\n                last_name='Instructor',\n                name='Sam Instructor',\n                role_id=2,  # Instructor role (1=Admin, 2=Instructor, 3=Student)\n                is_staff=True,\n                is_active=True,\n                email_verify='1',  # Email verified\n                email_verified_at=timezone.now(),\n                phone='+27 82 555 0001',\n                city='Johannesburg',\n                country='South Africa',\n                headline='Expert Instructor in AI & Blockchain',\n                about='Experienced instructor specializing in AI, Machine Learning, and Blockchain technologies. '\n                      'Passionate about education and helping students achieve their goals.',\n                balance=0.0,\n                payout='PayPal',\n                payout_email='sam@hosiafrica.com',\n                # AICerts Integration Fields\n                is_aicerts_instructor=True,\n                fullname='Sam Instructor',\n                confirmed=True,\n                suspended=False,\n                source='test_account',\n                timezone='Africa/Johannesburg',\n            )\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.SUCCESS(\n                    f'[OK] Created instructor: {instructor_email} with password: {instructor_password}'\n                )\n            )\n\n        # Test Student: John Doe\n        student_email = 'student@hosiafrica.com'\n        student_password = '1111'\n\n        if User.objects.filter(email=student_email).exists():\n            student = User.objects.get(email=student_email)\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.WARNING(f'Student user already exists: {student_email}')\n            )\n            student.set_password(student_password)\n            student.role_id = 3  # Student role\n            student.is_active = True\n            student.source = 'test_account'\n            student.fullname = 'John Doe'\n            student.confirmed = True\n            student.suspended = False\n            student.save()\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.SUCCESS(\n                    f'[OK] Updated student: {student_email} (password reset to {student_password})'\n                )\n            )\n        else:\n            student = User.objects.create_user(\n                username='john_student',\n                email=student_email,\n                password=student_password,\n                first_name='John',\n                last_name='Doe',\n                name='John Doe',\n                role_id=3,  # Student role\n                is_staff=False,\n                is_active=True,\n                email_verify='1',\n                email_verified_at=timezone.now(),\n                phone='+27 83 555 0002',\n                city='Cape Town',\n                country='South Africa',\n                headline='Aspiring AI Professional',\n                about='Passionate learner focused on AI and Data Science. Enrolled in multiple courses to advance career.',\n                # AICerts Integration Fields\n                fullname='John Doe',\n                confirmed=True,\n                suspended=False,\n                source='test_account',\n                timezone='Africa/Johannesburg',\n            )\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.SUCCESS(\n                    f'[OK] Created student: {student_email} with password: {student_password}'\n                )\n            )\n\n        # Test Admin: Admin User\n        admin_email = 'admin@hosiafrica.com'\n        admin_password = 'admin1234'\n\n        if User.objects.filter(email=admin_email).exists():\n            admin = User.objects.get(email=admin_email)\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.WARNING(f'Admin user already exists: {admin_email}')\n            )\n            admin.set_password(admin_password)\n            admin.role_id = 1  # Admin role\n            admin.is_superuser = True\n            admin.is_staff = True\n            admin.is_active = True\n            admin.save()\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.SUCCESS(\n                    f'[OK] Updated admin: {admin_email} (password reset to {admin_password})'\n                )\n            )\n        else:\n            admin = User.objects.create_superuser(\n                username='admin',\n                email=admin_email,\n                password=admin_password,\n                first_name='Admin',\n                last_name='User',\n                name='Admin User',\n                role_id=1,  # Admin role\n                email_verify='1',\n                email_verified_at=timezone.now(),\n                phone='+27 11 555 0000',\n                city='Pretoria',\n                country='South Africa',\n                headline='System Administrator',\n                about='Platform administrator with full system access.',\n            )\n            self.stdout.write(\n                self.style.SUCCESS(\n                    f'[OK] Created admin: {admin_email} with password: {admin_password}'\n                )\n            )\n\n        # Summary\n        self.stdout.write('')\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('=' * 60))\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('Test Users Created Successfully!'))\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('=' * 60))\n        self.stdout.write('')\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('INSTRUCTOR LOGIN:'))\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Email:    {instructor_email}')\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Password: {instructor_password}')\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Role:     Instructor (role_id=2)')\n        self.stdout.write('')\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('STUDENT LOGIN:'))\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Email:    {student_email}')\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Password: {student_password}')\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Role:     Student (role_id=3)')\n        self.stdout.write('')\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('ADMIN LOGIN:'))\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Email:    {admin_email}')\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Password: {admin_password}')\n        self.stdout.write(f'  Role:     Admin (role_id=1, superuser)')\n        self.stdout.write('')\n        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS('=' * 60))\n        self.stdout.write('')\n        self.stdout.write(\n            self.style.WARNING(\n                'NOTE: These are test credentials for development only. '\n                'Do not use in production!'\n            )\n        )\n","numLines":209,"startLine":1,"totalLines":209}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"a819be71-af6b-4aa5-9ec6-8e8abd2b3049"}

import Enrollment, EnrollmentStatus\n    38→        from apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n    39→        from apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\n    40→        from apps.aicerts_integration.services import EnrollmentSyncService\n    41→\n    42→        dry_run = options['dry_run']\n    43→        target_email = options['email']\n    44→\n    45→        if dry_run:\n    46→            self.stdout.write(self.style.WARNING(\"DRY RUN — no changes will be made.\\n\"))\n    47→\n    48→        # Find all paid Enrollment rows that point at an AiCertsCourse\n 58→        total = qs.count()\n    59→        self.stdout.write(\n    60→            f\"Found {total} paid AICERTS enrollment(s) to inspect\"\n    61→            f\"{f' for {target_email}' if target_email else ''}.\\n\"\n    62→        )\n    63→\n    64→        counts = {'skipped': 0, 'synced': 0, 'pending': 0, 'failed': 0}\n    65→\n    66→        for enrollment in qs:\n    67→
