{"parentUuid":"108e96b7-18d7-4034-9a7c-0f8e54528489","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CrbL8BHLk8BnEoTH58gk2S","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py has been updated successfully."}]},"uuid":"7e88f76e-ea07-4884-a836-891b27319462","timestamp":"2026-03-01T10:27:56.741Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py","oldString":"    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        if username is None:\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            # Fall back to username lookup\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                return None\n\n        if user.check_password(password) and self.user_can_authenticate(user):\n            return user\n\n        return None","newString":"    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        import logging\n        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\n\n        if username is None:\n            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\n            # Fall back to username lookup\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n\n        pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n        can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n        log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s', pw_ok, can_auth)\n\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\n            return user\n\n        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\n        return None","originalFile":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        if username is None:\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            # Fall back to username lookup\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                return None\n\n        if user.check_password(password) and self.user_can_authenticate(user):\n            return user\n\n        return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":10,"oldLines":22,"newStart":10,"newLines":37,"lines":["     \"\"\""," ","     def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):","+        import logging","+        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)","         User = get_user_model()"," ","+        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)","+","         if username is None:","+            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')","             return None"," ","         # Try email lookup first","         try:","             user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)","+            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)","         except User.DoesNotExist:","+            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')","             # Fall back to username lookup","             try:","                 user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)","+                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)","             except User.DoesNotExist:","+                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')","                 return None"," ","-        if user.check_password(password) and self.user_can_authenticate(user):","+        pw_ok = user.check_password(password)","+        can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)","+        log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s', pw_ok, can_auth)","+","+        if pw_ok and can_auth:","+            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)","             return user"," ","+        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')","         return None"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"108e96b7-18d7-4034-9a7c-0f8e54528489"}

User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n\n        pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n        can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n        log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s', pw_ok, can_auth)\n\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\n            return user\n\n found by email, trying username')\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n            except Exception as ex:\n                log.warning('  -> username lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n                return None\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        try:\n            pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n            can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n failed)')\n        return None","originalFile":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        import logging\n        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\n\n        if username is None:\n            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\n            # Fall back to username lookup\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n\n        pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n        can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n        log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s', pw_ok, can_auth)\n\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\n            return user\n\n        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\n        return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":26,"oldLines":17,"newStart":26,"newLines":26,"lines":["             log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)"," User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)","                 log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)","             except User.DoesNotExist:"," %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)","+                return None","+        except Exception as ex:","+            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)","+ None","originalFile":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        import logging\n        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\n\n        if username is None:\n            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n            except Exception as ex:\n                log.warning('  -> username lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n                return None\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        try:\n            pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n            can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s', pw_ok, can_auth)\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\n            return user\n\n        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\n        return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":7,"newStart":42,"newLines":8,"lines":["         try:","             pw_ok = user.check_password(password)","             can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)","-            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s', pw_ok, can_auth)","+            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming_len=%s',","+                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], len(password or ''))","         except Exception as ex:","             log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)","             return None"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"3852a6ba-3108-46b2-b2ff-09c41f8acf62"}

log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming=%r',\n                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], password)","originalFile":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        import logging\n        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\n\n        if username is None:\n            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n            except Exception as ex:\n                log.warning('  -> username lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n                return None\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        try:\n            pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n            can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming_len=%s',\n                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], len(password or ''))\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\n            return user\n\n        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\n        return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":8,"newStart":42,"newLines":8,"lines":["         try:","             pw_ok = user.check_password(password)","             can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)","-            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming_len=%s',","-                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], len(password or ''))","+            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming=%r',","+                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], password)"," {"parentUuid":"f8a302ee-d802-41ee-b7a8-4eabd0b7aa0d","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Sj1tat6bvvLrEDbvSDUawE","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py has been updated successfully."}]},"uuid":"ba4ab512-c9fd-4038-9c83-53b093b98757","timestamp":"2026-03-01T10:32:46.517Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py","oldString":"            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming=%r',\n                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], password)","newString":"            # Re-fetch directly from DB to rule out stale instance\n            fresh = User.objects.get(pk=user.pk)\n            fresh_ok = fresh.check_password(password)\n            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s fresh_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash=%s incoming=%r',\n                        pw_ok, fresh_ok, can_auth, user.password[:30], password)","originalFile":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        import logging\n        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\n\n        if username is None:\n            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\n                return None\n            except Exception as ex:\n                log.warning('  -> username lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n                return None\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        try:\n            pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\n            can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\n            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming=%r',\n                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], password)\n        except Exception as ex:\n            log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\n            return None\n\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\n            return user\n\n        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\n        return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":8,"newStart":42,"newLines":11,"lines":["         try:","             pw_ok = user.check_password(password)","             can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)","-            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash_prefix=%s incoming=%r',","-                        pw_ok, can_auth, user.password[:20], password)","+            # Re-fetch directly from DB to rule out stale instance","+            fresh = User.objects.get(pk=user.pk)","+            fresh_ok = fresh.check_password(password)","+            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s fresh_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash=%s incoming=%r',","+                        pw_ok, fresh_ok, can_auth, user.password[:30], password)","         except Exception as ex:","             log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)","             return None"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"f8a302ee-d802-41ee-b7a8-4eabd0b7aa0d"}

Let me log the full password hash from the DB and check it directly from outside Django.\n\nActually, let me try yet another approach. Let me check if the AICERTS `auto_create_aicerts_user` signal which runs on save might be interfering. When I called `set_password` and `save`, did the signal run?\n\nWhen I run `u.set_password('TestStudent2026!')` and `u.save(update_fields=['password'])`, the `post_save` signal fires with `created=False`. My `auto_create_aicerts_user` signal only runs for `created=True`, so it shouldn't affect this.\n\n\nThere's a `pre_save` signal that just logs without modifying the instance. Looking at the password hash itself - it's using PBKDF2 with 600,000 iterations, which Django's `check_password()` should handle correctly when it splits the hash and runs the verification.\n\nBut I'm noticing something odd: the debug log shows the incoming password is `TestStudent2026!` with the exclamation mark intact, and the hash prefix matches what I see in the shell. self.get_full_name() or self.username or self.email\n\n    def get_full_name(self):\n        return self.name.strip() if self.name else super().get_full_name()\n\n    # Helper properties for common The `!` is special in Django passwords! {"parentUuid":"f6da720c-0339-41a0-a89c-8e5f875cc815","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01UV8Gr4PQKrmgyZJ9Ciz1uY","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"I can now see the crucial issue! Look at the password bytes:\n```\nPwd bytes: [84, 101, 115, 116, 83, 116, 117, 100, 101, 110, 116, 50, 48, 50, 54, 92, 33]\n```\n\nThe last two bytes are `92` (backslash `\\`) and `33` (`!`). The password contains `TestStudent2026\\!` - with a BACKSLASH before the `!`!\n\nThis is a shell escaping issue! When I run:\n```\nu.set_password('TestStudent2026!')\n\n\n```\n\nin the Python shell command passed via `docker exec ... python manage.py shell -c \"...\"`, the `!` is being shell-escaped as `\\!`. So the password actually gets set to `TestStudent2026\\!` (with a backslash), but when the frontend sends `TestStudent2026!` without the backslash via HTTP, it doesn't match the stored hash. That's why the HTTP test fails for `!` - there's a character count mismatch between what's stored and what's being sent.\n\nThe real issue is that the shell is interpreting `!` as a history expansion character within double-quoted strings. I need to either write a Python file to set the password correctly without shell escaping, or find a way to pass the password that avoids this history expansion problem entirely. Single quotes would normally suppress history expansion, but the `-c` argument itself might still trigger it depending on how the shell processes the command.\n\n```\n\nbash\ndocker exec lms-prod-backend-1 python manage.py shell -c \"\n...\nu.set_password('TestStudent2026!')\n...\n\"\n```\n\nThe outer double quotes mean bash will try to expand `!` before the command even reaches Python, so I need a different approach.\n\nI see the password got stored as `TestStudent2026\\!` with the backslash included - that's the shell escaping the exclamation mark. The real fix is to bypass shell expansion entirely by writing a Python script file and executing it directly, or using stdin to pass the commands without going through bash's history expansion.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":837,"cache_read_input_tokens":150167,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":837,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcEUZBEjiUmVuD1VHZvY","type":"assistant","uuid":"d144f4d2-b1b7-4b71-87de-cc1e165b0828","timestamp":"2026-03-01T10:52:01.080Z"}

{"parentUuid":"07f4961f-7631-4838-8e66-c8476d80bc89","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01X6nsewhHiXXVDxDVZsbHgF","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FoT4yBiuU2Nk4QdeBwm7Qq","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py","content":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        if username is None:\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            # Fall back to username lookup\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                return None\n            except Exception:\n                return None\n        except Exception:\n            return None\n\n        if user.check_password(password) and self.user_can_authenticate(user):\n            return user\n\n        return None\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":432,"cache_read_input_tokens":154509,"output_tokens":369,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":432},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcEeJG5cFRgkStmEQMok","type":"assistant","uuid":"a8278056-e7ec-46ea-a357-d460ee7f6396","timestamp":"2026-03-01T10:54:01.171Z"}

{"parentUuid":"a8278056-e7ec-46ea-a357-d460ee7f6396","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FoT4yBiuU2Nk4QdeBwm7Qq","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py has been updated successfully."}]},"uuid":"15d25f84-3315-4e22-ae06-272045675f72","timestamp":"2026-03-01T10:54:01.188Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"update","filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/users/backends.py","content":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\n\n\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\n    \"\"\"\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\n        User = get_user_model()\n\n        if username is None:\n            return None\n\n        # Try email lookup first\n        try:\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\n            # Fall back to username lookup\n            try:\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\n                return None\n            except Exception:\n                return None\n        except Exception:\n            return None\n\n        if user.check_password(password) and self.user_can_authenticate(user):\n            return user\n\n        return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":59,"newStart":1,"newLines":35,"lines":["-from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\r","-from django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\r","-\r","-\r","-class EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\r","-    \"\"\"\r","-    Authenticate with either email or username.\r","-    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\r","-    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\r","-    \"\"\"\r","-\r","-    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\r","-        import logging\r","-        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\r","-        User = get_user_model()\r","-\r","-        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\r","-\r","-        if username is None:\r","-            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\r","-            return None\r","-\r","-        # Try email lookup first\r","-        try:\r","-            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\r","-            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\r","-        except User.DoesNotExist:\r","-            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\r","-            try:\r","-                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\r","-                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\r","-            except User.DoesNotExist:\r","-                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\r","-                return None\r","-            except Exception as ex:\r","-                log.warning('  -> username lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\r","-                return None\r","-        except Exception as ex:\r","-            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\r","-            return None\r","-\r","-        try:\r","-            pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\r","-            can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\r","-            # Re-fetch directly from DB to rule out stale instance\r","-            fresh = User.objects.get(pk=user.pk)\r","-            fresh_ok = fresh.check_password(password)\r","-            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s fresh_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash=%s incoming=%r',\r","-                        pw_ok, fresh_ok, can_auth, user.password[:30], password)\r","-        except Exception as ex:\r","-            log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\r","-            return None\r","-\r","-        if pw_ok and can_auth:\r","-            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\r","-            return user\r","-\r","-        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\r","-        return None\r","+from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model","+from django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend","+","+","+class EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):","+    \"\"\"","+    Authenticate with either email or username.","+    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,","+    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.","+    \"\"\"","+","+    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):","+        User = get_user_model()","+","+        if username is None:","+            return None","+","+        # Try email lookup first","+        try:","+            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)","+        except User.DoesNotExist:","+            # Fall back to username lookup","+            try:","+                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)","+            except User.DoesNotExist:","+                return None","+            except Exception:","+                return None","+        except Exception:","+            return None","+","+        if user.check_password(password) and self.user_can_authenticate(user):","+            return user","+","+        return None"]}],"originalFile":"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\r\nfrom django.contrib.auth.backends import ModelBackend\r\n\r\n\r\nclass EmailOrUsernameBackend(ModelBackend):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Authenticate with either email or username.\r\n    The frontend always sends the email address in the 'username' field,\r\n    so this backend first tries a lookup by email, then falls back to username.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def authenticate(self, request, username=None, password=None, **kwargs):\r\n        import logging\r\n        log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\r\n        User = get_user_model()\r\n\r\n        log.warning('EmailOrUsernameBackend.authenticate called: username=%s', username)\r\n\r\n        if username is None:\r\n            log.warning('  -> username is None, returning None')\r\n            return None\r\n\r\n        # Try email lookup first\r\n        try:\r\n            user = User.objects.get(email__iexact=username)\r\n            log.warning('  -> found by email: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\r\n        except User.DoesNotExist:\r\n            log.warning('  -> not found by email, trying username')\r\n            try:\r\n                user = User.objects.get(username__iexact=username)\r\n                log.warning('  -> found by username: id=%s active=%s', user.id, user.is_active)\r\n            except User.DoesNotExist:\r\n                log.warning('  -> not found by username either, returning None')\r\n                return None\r\n            except Exception as ex:\r\n                log.warning('  -> username lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\r\n                return None\r\n        except Exception as ex:\r\n            log.warning('  -> email lookup exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\r\n            return None\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            pw_ok = user.check_password(password)\r\n            can_auth = self.user_can_authenticate(user)\r\n            # Re-fetch directly from DB to rule out stale instance\r\n            fresh = User.objects.get(pk=user.pk)\r\n            fresh_ok = fresh.check_password(password)\r\n            log.warning('  -> password_ok=%s fresh_ok=%s can_auth=%s hash=%s incoming=%r',\r\n                        pw_ok, fresh_ok, can_auth, user.password[:30], password)\r\n        except Exception as ex:\r\n            log.warning('  -> check exception: %s %s', type(ex).__name__, ex)\r\n            return None\r\n\r\n        if pw_ok and can_auth:\r\n            log.warning('  -> returning user %s', user.id)\r\n            return user\r\n\r\n        log.warning('  -> returning None (pw or can_auth failed)')\r\n        return None\r\n"},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"a8278056-e7ec-46ea-a357-d460ee7f6396"}

{"parentUuid":"9c071403-55a3-4a9a-b15d-2e7a84504ff4","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01EwYMzqQLoFaKTyYQWKL4dE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Both issues resolved. Here's a summary of everything that was fixed:\n\n---\n\n**Issue 1 — Login failure (`richard.masukume@hosiacademy.co.za` / `TestStudent2026!`)**\n\nThree bugs were in the chain:\n1. **No email auth backend** — Django's default backend matches by `username` field, but the frontend sends email. Added `EmailOrUsernameBackend` (`apps/users/backends.py`) that looks up by email first, then falls back to username.\n2. **Password was stored with `\\!`** — Every `docker exec ... -c \"...\"` command bash-escapes `!` to `\\!` (history expansion), so the stored hash was for `TestStudent2026\\!` instead of `TestStudent2026!`. Fixed by setting the password via stdin pipe with hex escape `\\x21`.\n3. **`aicerts_synced_at` signal crash** — The `post_save` signal was using `timezone.now()` on a `DecimalField` (epoch timestamp). Fixed by using `time.time()` instead.\n\n**Issue 2 — `/api/v1/student-portal/content-types/` returning 500**\n\n`ContentType.objects.get(model='aicertscourse')` raised `MultipleObjectsReturned` because `aicertscourse` exists in both `aicerts_courses` and `industry_based_training` apps, and `course` exists in both `courses` and `learnerships`. Fixed by specifying `app_label` explicitly in the lookup."}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":155,"cache_read_input_tokens":155617,"output_tokens":367,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":155},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcEjTsftjL55xNZypMcA","type":"assistant","uuid":"33aa0659-b1bb-46ab-97d0-91fa2410b804","timestamp":"2026-03-01T10:55:13.411Z"}

-> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\n    13→class StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n    14→  final String userName;\n    15→\n    16→  const StudentPortalPage({\n    17→ 25→class _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    26→    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n    27→  int _currentIndex = 0;\n    28→  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n    29→  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n    30→\n    31→  // Pages for the portal\n    32→  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n    33→\n    34→  // Real enrollment data\n    35→  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n    36→  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n    37→\n    38→  @override\n    39→  void initState() {\n    40→    super.initState();\n    41→    _userName = widget.userName;\n    42→    _fetchEnrollments();\n    43→    _pages = [\n    44→      _buildDashboardView(),\n    45→      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n    46→      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n    47→      _buildProgressView(),\n    48→    ];\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    52→    if (!mounted) return;\n    53→    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    54→    try {\n    55→      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n    56→      if (!mounted) return;\n    57→      setState(() {\n    58→        _enrollments =\n    59→            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n    60→        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n    61→\n    62→        // Refresh pages with new data\n    63→        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n    64→      });\n    65→    } catch (e) {\n    66→      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n    67→      if (!mounted) return;\n    68→      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    69→    }\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    73→    try {\n    74→      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n    75→      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n    76→        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n    77→        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n    78→          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n    79→        } else {\n    80→          if (mounted) {\n    81→            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n    82→              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n    83→            );\n    84→          }\n    85→        }\n    86→      }\n    87→    } catch (e) {\n    88→      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n    89→      if (mounted) {\n    90→        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n    91→          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n    92→        );\n    93→      }\n    94→    }\n    95→  }\n    96→\n    97→  @override\n    98→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    99→    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n   100→    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n   101→    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n   102→    final isMobile = screenWidth < 800;\n   103→\n   104→    return Scaffold(\n   105→      backgroundColor:\n   106→          colors.surfaceContainer, // Darker hue for main section background\n   107→      appBar: isMobile\n   108→          ? AppBar(\n   109→              title: Text('Student Portal',\n   110→                  style: TextStyle(color: colors.onPrimary)),\n   111→              backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n   112→            )\n   113→          : null,\n   114→      body: Column(\n   115→        children: [\n   116→          // Header (Desktop/Tablet Only)\n   117→          if (!isMobile)\n   118→            Container(\n   119→              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n   120→                color: colors.surface,\n   121→                border: Border(\n   122→                  bottom: BorderSide(\n   123→                    color: colors.outlineVariant,\n   124→                    width: 1,\n   125→                  ),\n   126→                ),\n   127→              ),\n   128→              child: Center(\n   129→                child: Container(\n   130→                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n   131→                  child: DashboardHeader(\n   132→                    userName: _userName,\n   133→                    userDesignation: 'Student Portal',\n   134→                    isAdmin: false,\n   135→                    notificationCount: _unreadMessages,\n   136→                    showMenuButton: false,\n   137→                    showCart: true,\n   138→                    showWishlist: true,\n   139→                    onLogout: () async {\n   140→                      await AuthService.logout();\n   141→                      if (context.mounted) context.go('/onboarding');\n   142→                    },\n   143→                  ),\n   144→                ),\n   145→              ),\n   146→            ),\n   147→\n   148→          // Main Content Area with Sidebar\n   149→          // Horizontal Navigation (replacing sidebar)\n   150→          if (!isMobile)\n   151→            Container(\n   152→              color: colors.surface,\n   153→              child: Center(\n   154→                child: Container(\n   155→                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n   156→                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),\n   157→                  child: Row(\n   158→                    children: [\n   159→                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n   160→                        icon: Icons.dashboard_outlined,\n   161→                        activeIcon: Icons.dashboard,\n   162→                        label: \"Dashboard\",\n   163→                        index: 0,\n   164→                        colors: colors,\n   165→                      ),\n   166→                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n   167→                        icon: Icons.play_circle_outline,\n   168→                        activeIcon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n   169→                        label: \"My Courses\",\n   170→                        index: 1,\n   171→                        colors: colors,\n   172→                      ),\n   173→                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n   174→                        icon: Icons.favorite_border,\n   175→                        activeIcon: Icons.favorite,\n   176→                        label: \"Wishlist\",\n   177→                        index: 2,\n   178→                        colors: colors,\n   179→                      ),\n   180→                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n   181→                        icon: Icons.trending_up,\n   182→                        activeIcon: Icons.trending_up,\n   183→                        label: \"Progress\",\n   184→                        index: 3,\n   185→                        colors: colors,\n   186→                      ),\n   187→                    ],\n   188→                  ),\n   189→                ),\n   190→              ),\n   191→            ),\n   192→\n   193→          if (!isMobile)\n   194→            Divider(\n   195→              height: 1,\n   196→              thickness: 1,\n   197→              color: colors.outlineVariant,\n   198→            ),\n   199→\n   200→          // Main Content Area\n   201→          Expanded(\n   202→            child: isMobile\n   203→                ? _pages[_currentIndex]\n   204→                : Container(\n   205→                    width: double.infinity,\n   206→                    color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n   207→                    child: Center(\n   208→                      child: Container(\n   209→                        constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n   210→                        child: _pages[_currentIndex],\n   211→                      ),\n   212→                    ),\n   213→                  ),\n   214→          ),\n   215→        ],\n   216→      ),\n   217→      bottomNavigationBar: isMobile\n   218→          ? NavigationBar(\n   219→              selectedIndex: _currentIndex,\n   220→              onDestinationSelected: (index) {\n   221→                setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n   222→              },\n   223→              destinations: const [\n   224→                NavigationDestination(\n   225→                  icon: Icon(Icons.dashboard),\n   226→                  label: 'Dashboard',\n   227→                ),\n   228→                NavigationDestination(\n   229→                  icon: Icon(Icons.play_circle_fill),\n   230→                  label: 'Courses',\n   231→                ),\n   232→                NavigationDestination(\n   233→                  icon: Icon(Icons.favorite),\n   234→                  label: 'Wishlist',\n   235→                ),\n   236→                NavigationDestination(\n   237→                  icon: Icon(Icons.trending_up),\n   238→                  label: 'Progress',\n   239→                ),\n   240→              ],\n   241→            )\n   242→          : null,\n   243→    );\n   244→  }\n   245→\n   246→  Widget _buildPortalNavItem({\n   247→    required IconData icon,\n   248→    required IconData activeIcon,\n   249→    required String label,\n   250→    required int index,\n   251→    required ColorScheme colors,\n   252→  }) {\n   253→    final isSelected = _currentIndex == index;\n   254→    return InkWell(\n   255→      onTap: () {\n   256→        setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n   257→      },\n   258→      child: Container(\n   259→        margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 8),\n   260→        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20, vertical: 10),\n   261→        decoration: BoxDecoration(\n   262→          color: isSelected\n   263→              ? colors.primaryContainer.withValues(alpha: 0.5)\n   264→              : Colors.transparent,\n   265→          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),\n   266→        ),\n   267→        child: Row(\n   268→          mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n   269→          children: [\n   270→            Icon(\n   271→              isSelected ? activeIcon : icon,\n   272→              color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n   273→              size: 20,\n   274→            ),\n   275→            const SizedBox(width: 12),\n   276→            Text(\n   277→              label,\n   278→              style: TextStyle(\n   279→                color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n   280→                fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.w500,\n   281→                fontSize: 14,\n   282→              ),\n   283→            ),\n   284→          ],\n   285→        ),\n   286→      ),\n   287→    );\n   288→  }\n   289→\n   290→  // --- Views ---\n   291→\n   292→  Widget _buildDashboardView() {\n   293→    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n   294→    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n   295→\n   296→    return SingleChildScrollView(\n   297→      physics: const BouncingScrollPhysics(),\n   298→      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n   299→      child: Column(\n   300→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   301→        children: [\n   302→          Row(\n   303→            children: [\n   304→              Column(\n   305→                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   306→                children: [\n   307→                  Text(\n   308→                    'Welcome back, $_userName!',\n   309→                    style: theme.textTheme.headlineMedium?.copyWith(\n   310→                      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   311→                      letterSpacing: -0.5,\n   312→                    ),\n   313→                  ),\n   314→                  const SizedBox(height: 4),\n   315→                  Text(\n   316→                    'Here is an overview of your learning journey',\n   317→                    style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(\n   318→                      color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n   319→                    ),\n   320→                  ),\n   321→                ],\n   322→              ),\n   323→              const Spacer(),\n   324→              _buildNotificationBadge(colors),\n   325→            ],\n   326→          ),\n   327→          const SizedBox(height: 40),\n   328→\n   329→          // Overview Stats\n   330→          LayoutBuilder(\n   331→            builder: (context, constraints) {\n   332→              final isSmall = constraints.maxWidth < 700;\n   333→              final cardWidth = isSmall\n   334→                  ? constraints.maxWidth\n   335→                  : (constraints.maxWidth - 48) / 3;\n   336→\n   337→              return Wrap(\n   338→                spacing: 24,\n   339→                runSpacing: 24,\n   340→                children: [\n   341→                  SizedBox(\n   342→                    width: cardWidth,\n   343→                    child: _buildStatCard(\n   344→                      icon: Icons.school_rounded,\n   345→                      label: 'Enrolled Courses',\n   346→                      value: '4',\n   347→                      color: colors.primary,\n   348→                      theme: theme,\n   349→                    ),\n   350→                  ),\n   351→ label: 'Certifications',\n   356→                      value: '1',\n   357→                      color: const Color(0xFF10B981), // successGreen\n   358→                      theme: theme,\n   359→                    ),\n   360→                  ),\n   361→                  SizedBox(\n   362→                    width: cardWidth,\n   363→                    child: _buildStatCard(\n   364→                      icon: Icons.auto_graph_rounded,\n   365→                      label: 'Learning Hours',\n   366→                      value: '12.5h',\n   367→                      color: colors.tertiary,\n   368→                      theme: theme,\n   369→                    ),\n   370→                  ),\n   371→                ],\n   372→              );\n   373→            },\n   374→          ),\n   375→\n   376→          const SizedBox(height: 48),\n   377→\n   378→          Row(\n   379→            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,\n   380→            children: [\n   381→ 390→                child: const Text('View All'),\n   391→              ),\n   392→            ],\n   393→          ),\n   394→          const SizedBox(height: 16),\n   395→\n   396→          // Activity List\n   397→          _buildActivityCard(\n   398→            title: 'Advanced Flutter Architecture',\n   399→            status: 'In Progress • 65%',\n   400→            time: '2 hours ago',\n   401→            icon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n   402→            color: colors.primary,\n   403→            theme: theme,\n   404→            colors: colors,\n   405→          ),\n   406→ return Container(\n   635→      color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n   636→      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n   637→      child: Column(\n   638→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   639→        children: [\n   640→          Row(\n   641→            children: [\n   642→              Text(\n   643→                'My Enrolled Courses',\n   644→ _activeCourse;\n    35→  bool _isViewingCourse = false;\n    36→\n    37→  // BBB session viewing state\n    38→  bool _showBBBInline = false;\n    39→  Map<String, dynamic>? _activeSession;\n    40→\n    41→  // Enrolled courses\n    42→  List<Map<String, dynamic>> _enrolledCourses = [];\n    43→\n    44→  // Scheduled BBB sessions\n    45→  List<Map<String, dynamic>> _scheduledSessions = [];\n    46→\n    47→  @override\n    48→  void initState() {\n    49→    super.initState();\n    50→    _loadLearnerData();\n    51→    _fetchEnrolledCourses();\n    52→    _fetchUpcomingSessions();\n    53→  }\n    54→\n    55→  Future<void> _fetchUpcomingSessions() async {\n    56→    try {\n    57→      final response = await ApiClient.get('/api/bbb/sessions/upcoming/');\n    58→      if (response.statusCode == 200) {\n    59→        final List<dynamic> data = response.data;\n    60→        setState(() {\n    61→          _scheduledSessions.clear();\n    62→          for (var item in data) {\n    63→            _scheduledSessions.add({\n    64→              'id': item['id'].toString(),\n    65→              'title': item['title'] ?? 'Live Session',\n    66→              'instructor': item['instructor_name'] ?? 'Instructor',\n    67→              'course': item['course_title'] ?? 'Training',\n    68→              'startTime': DateTime.parse(item['start_time']),\n    69→              'duration': '${item['duration_minutes']} min',\n    70→              'status': item['is_live'] == true ? 'live' : 'upcoming',\n    71→              'attendees': item['attendee_count'] ?? 0,\n    72→              'isLive': item['is_live'] ?? false,\n    73→            });\n    74→          }\n    75→        });\n    76→      }\n    77→    } catch (e) {\n    78→      print('⚠️ Failed to fetch upcoming sessions: $e');\n    79→    }\n    80→  }\n    81→\n    82→  Future<void> _fetchEnrolledCourses() async {\n    83→    try {\n    84→      final response = await ApiClient.get('/api/v1/aicerts/enrollments/');\n    85→      if (response.statusCode == 200) {\n    86→        final List<dynamic> data = response.data;\n    87→        setState(() {\n    88→          _enrolledCourses.clear();\n    89→          for (var item in data) {\n    90→            _enrolledCourses.add({\n    91→              'id': item['id'].toString(),\n    92→              'title': item['course_title'] ?? 'Unknown Course',\n    93→              'progress': _parseProgress(item['progress_percentage']),\n    94→              'instructor': 'AICerts',\n    95→              'nextLesson': item['completed_at'] != null\n    96→                  ? 'Completed'\n    97→                  : 'Continue Learning',\n    98→              'isAICERTS': true,\n    99→              'aicertsCourseId': item['course'],\n   100→            });\n   101→          }\n   102→        });\n   103→      }\n   104→    } catch (e) {\n   105→      print('⚠️ Failed to fetch enrolled courses: $e');\n   106→    }\n   107→  }\n   108→\n   109→  double _parseProgress(dynamic value) {\n   110→    if (value == null) return 0.0;\n   111→    if (value is num) return value.toDouble() / 100.0;\n   112→    if (value is String) return (double.tryParse(value) ?? 0.0) / 100.0;\n   113→    return 0.0;\n   114→  }\n   115→\n   116→  Future<void> _loadLearnerData() async {\n   117→    final name = await AuthService.getUserName();\n   118→    final email = await AuthService.getUserEmail();\n   119→    final id = await AuthService.getUserId();\n   120→    final role = await AuthService.getUserRole();\n   121→\n   122→    if (mounted) {\n   123→      setState(() {\n   124→        _userName = name ?? 'Learner';\n   125→        _userEmail = email ?? '';\n   126→        _userId = id ?? 'current-user-id';\n   127→        _userRole = role ?? 'learner';\n   128→      });\n   129→    }\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  @override\n   133→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n   134→    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n   135→    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n   136→    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n   137→    final isMobile = screenWidth < 768;\n   138→    final isTablet = screenWidth >= 768 && screenWidth < 1024;\n   139→\n   140→    return Scaffold(\n   141→      drawer: isMobile\n   142→          ? Drawer(\n   143→              child: Container(\n   144→                color: colors.surface,\n   145→                child: _buildLeftSidebar(theme, colors),\n   146→              ),\n   147→            )\n   148→          : null,\n   149→      body: Column(\n   150→        children: [\n   151→          // Header with welcome message (ONLY HERE)\n   152→          DashboardHeader(\n   153→ isAdmin: false,\n   158→            notificationCount: 3,\n   159→            showMenuButton: isMobile,\n   160→            onNotificationsTap: () {},\n   161→            onProfileTap: () {\n   162→ 171→            },\n   172→          ),\n   173→\n   174→          // Main layout: Responsive based on screen size\n   175→          Expanded(\n   176→            child: isMobile\n   177→ CATALOG',\n   343→            style: theme.textTheme.labelSmall?.copyWith(\n   344→              color: colors.onSurface.withValues(alpha: 0.6),\n   345→              fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   346→              letterSpacing: 1.2,\n   347→            ),\n   348→          ),\n   349→        ),\n   350→        // Enrollment Pathways (indented)\n   351→        _buildMenuItem(\n   352→   isIndented: true,\n   358→        ),\n   359→        _buildMenuItem(\n   360→          icon: Icons.card_membership,\n   361→          label: 'Learnerships',\n   362→          menuKey: 'learnerships',\n   363→          theme: theme,\n   364→          colors: colors,\n   365→          isIndented: true,\n   366→        ),\n   367→        _buildMenuItem(\n   368→          icon: Icons.business,\n   369→          label: 'Industry Training',\n   370→          menuKey: 'industry_training',\n   371→          theme: theme,\n   372→          colors: colors,\n   373→          isIndented: true,\n   374→        ),\n   375→        _buildMenuItem(\n   376→          icon: Icons.tune,\n   377→          label: 'Custom Selection',\n   378→          menuKey: 'custom_selection',\n   379→          theme: theme,\n   380→          colors: colors,\n   381→          isIndented: true,\n   382→        ),\n   383→        const Divider(),\n   384→        _buildMenuItem(\n   385→          icon: Icons.settings,\n   386→          label: 'Settings',\n   387→          menuKey: 'settings',\n   388→          theme: theme,\n   389→          colors: colors,\n   390→        ),\n   391→      ],\n   392→    );\n   393→  }\n   394→\n   395→  Widget _buildMenuItem({\n   396→    required IconData icon,\n   397→    required String label,\n   398→    required String menuKey,\n   399→    required ThemeData theme,\n   400→    required ColorScheme colors,\n   401→    String? badge,\n   402→    bool isIndented = false,\n   403→  }) {\n   404→    final isSelected = _selectedMenu == menuKey;\n   405→\n   406→    return Padding(\n   407→      padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: isIndented ? 16.0 : 0.0),\n   408→      child: ListTile(\n   409→        leading: Icon(\n   410→          icon,\n   411→          color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurface,\n   412→          size: isIndented ? 20 : 24,\n   413→        ),\n   414→        title: Text(\n   415→          label,\n   416→          style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(\n   417→            color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurface,\n   418→            fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.normal,\n   419→            fontSize: isIndented ? 13 : null,\n   420→          ),\n   421→        ),\n   422→        trailing: badge != null\n   423→            ? Container(\n   424→                padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 2),\n   425→                decoration: BoxDecoration(\n   426→                  color: colors.error,\n   427→                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),\n   428→                ),\n   429→                child: Text(\n   430→                  badge,\n   431→                  style: theme.textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(\n   432→                    color: colors.onError,\n   433→                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   434→                  ),\n   435→                ),\n   436→              )\n   437→            : null,\n   438→        selected: isSelected,\n   439→        selectedTileColor: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.1),\n   440→        onTap: () {\n   441→          setState(() {\n   442→            _selectedMenu = menuKey;\n   443→          });\n   444→        },\n   445→      ),\n   446→    );\n   447→  }\n   448→\n   449→  Widget _buildMainContent(ThemeData theme, ColorScheme colors) {\n   450→    // If viewing BBB session inline\n   451→    if (_showBBBInline && _activeSession != null) {\n   452→      return Container(\n   453→        color: colors.surface,\n   454→        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),\n   455→        child: Column(\n   456→          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   457→          children: [\n   458→            Row(\n   459→              children: [\n   460→                IconButton(\n   461→                  icon: const Icon(Icons.arrow_back),\n   462→                  onPressed: () {\n   463→                    setState(() {\n   464→                      _showBBBInline = false;\n   465→                      _activeSession = null;\n   466→                    });\n   467→                  },\n   468→                  tooltip: 'Leave Session',\n   469→                ),\n   470→                const SizedBox(width: 8),\n   471→                Expanded(\n   472→                  child: Column(\n   473→                    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   474→                    children: [\n   475→                      Text(\n   476→                        _activeSession!['title'],\n   477→                        style: theme.textTheme.headlineSmall?.copyWith(\n   478→                          fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   479→                        ),\n   480→                      ),\n   481→                      Text(\n   482→                        'Instructor: ${_activeSession!['instructor']}',\n   483→                        style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(\n   484→                          color: colors.onSurface,\n   485→                        ),\n   486→                      ),\n   487→                    ],\n   488→                  ),\n   489→                ),\n   490→              ],\n   491→            ),\n   492→            const SizedBox(height: 16),\n   493→            // BBB Session Viewer - Display inline\n   494→            Expanded(\n   495→              child: BBBSessionViewer(\n   496→                sessionId: _activeSession!['id'],\n   497→                sessionTitle: _activeSession!['title'],\n   498→                joinUrl: BBBService.generateStudentJoinUrl(\n   499→                  sessionId: _activeSession!['id'],\n   500→                  userName: _userName,\n   501→                ),\n   502→              ),\n   503→            ),\n   504→          ],\n   505→        ),\n   506→      );\n   507→    }\n   508→\n   509→    // If viewing an AICERTS course, show the course viewer inline\n   510→    if (_isViewingCourse &&\n   511→        _activeCourse != null &&\n   512→        _activeCourse!['isAICERTS'] == true) {\n   513→      return Container(\n   514→        color: colors.surface,\n   515→        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),\n   516→        child: AICERTSCourseViewer(\n   517→          courseId: _activeCourse!['aicertsCourseId'],\n   518→          userId: _userEmail.isNotEmpty ? _userEmail : 'student@hosiafrica.com',\n   519→          userName: _userName,\n   520→          onProgressUpdate: (progress) {\n   521→            // Update course progress in real-time\n   522→            setState(() {\n   523→              final courseIndex = _enrolledCourses.indexWhere(\n   524→                (c) => c['id'] == _activeCourse!['id'],\n   525→              );\n   526→              if (courseIndex != -1) {\n   527→                _enrolledCourses[courseIndex]['progress'] = progress / 100;\n   528→              }\n   529→            });\n   530→          },\n   531→          onCourseComplete: () {\n   532→            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n   533→              SnackBar(\n   534→                content: const Text('Course completed! Certificate available.'),\n   535→                backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n   536→                action: SnackBarAction(\n   537→                  label: 'View',\n   538→                  textColor: colors.onPrimary,\n   539→                  onPressed: () {\n   540→                    // TODO: Show certificate\n   541→                  },\n   542→                ),\n   543→              ),\n   544→            );\n   545→          },\n   546→          onBack: () {\n   547→            setState(() {\n   548→              _isViewingCourse = false;\n   549→              _activeCourse = null;\n   550→            });\n   551→          },\n   552→        ),\n   553→      );\n   554→    }\n   555→\n   556→    // Full-page embedded menus that handle their own scrolling\n   557→    final bool isEmbeddedMenu = _selectedMenu == 'catalog' ||\n   558→        _selectedMenu == 'masterclasses' ||\n   559→        _selectedMenu == 'learnerships' ||\n   560→        _selectedMenu == 'industry_training' ||\n   561→        _selectedMenu == 'custom_selection';\n   562→\n   563→    if (isEmbeddedMenu) {\n   564→      return Container(\n   565→        color: colors.surface,\n   566→        child: _buildSelectedContent(theme, colors),\n   567→      );\n   568→    }\n   569→\n   570→    // Default dashboard/menu content with its own scrolling\n   571→    return Container(\n   572→      color: colors.surface,\n   573→      child: SingleChildScrollView(\n   574→        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),\n   575→        child: Column(\n   576→          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   577→          children: [\n   578→            // Show enrolled courses at top when dashboard is selected\n   579→            if (_selectedMenu == 'dashboard') ...[\n   580→              _buildEnrolledCoursesSection(theme, colors),\n   581→              const SizedBox(height: 32),\n   582→              _buildDashboardStats(theme, colors),\n   583→            ] else\n   584→              _buildSelectedContent(theme, colors),\n   585→          ],\n   586→        ),\n   587→      ),\n   588→    );\n   589→  }\n   590→\n   591→  Widget _buildEnrolledCoursesSection(ThemeData theme, ColorScheme colors) {\n   592→    return Column(\n   593→      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   594→      children: [\n   595→        Row(\n   596→          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,\n   597→          children: [\n   598→            Text(\n   599→              'My Enrolled Courses',\n   600→              style: theme.textTheme.headlineSmall?.copyWith(\n   601→                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   602→                color: colors.onSurface,\n   603→              ),\n   604→            ),\n   605→            TextButton.icon(\n   606→              onPressed: () {\n   607→                setState(() {\n   608→                  _selectedMenu = 'courses';\n   609→                });\n   610→              },\n   611→              icon: const Icon(Icons.arrow_forward),\n   612→              label: const Text('View All'),\n   613→            ),\n   614→          ],\n   615→        ),\n   616→        const SizedBox(height: 16),\n   617→        ListView.builder(\n   618→          shrinkWrap: true,\n   619→          physics: const NeverScrollableScrollPhysics(),\n   620→          itemCount: _enrolledCourses.length,\n   621→          itemBuilder: (context, index) {\n   622→            final course = _enrolledCourses[index];\n   623→            return Card(\n   624→              margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),\n   625→              child: ListTile(\n   626→                contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),\n   627→                leading: Container(\n   628→                  width: 60,\n   629→                  height: 60,\n   630→                  decoration: BoxDecoration(\n   631→                    color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.1),\n   632→                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),\n   633→                  ),\n   634→                  child: Icon(Icons.school, color: colors.primary, size: 32),\n   635→                ),\n   636→                title: Text(\n   637→                  course['title'],\n   638→                  style: theme.textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(\n   639→                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   640→                  ),\n   641→                ),\n   642→                subtitle: Column(\n   643→                  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   644→                  children: [\n   645→                    const SizedBox(height: 8),\n   646→                    Text('Instructor: ${course['instructor']}'),\n   647→                    const SizedBox(height: 4),\n   648→                    Text('Next: ${course['nextLesson']}'),\n   649→                    const SizedBox(height: 8),\n   650→                    LinearProgressIndicator(\n   651→                      value: course['progress'],\n   652→                      backgroundColor: colors.surfaceContainerHighest,\n   653→                      color: colors.primary,\n   654→                    ),\n   655→                    const SizedBox(height: 4),\n   656→                    Text(\n   657→                      '${(course['progress'] * 100).toInt()}% complete',\n   658→                      style: theme.textTheme.bodySmall,\n   659→                    ),\n   660→                  ],\n   661→                ),\n   662→                trailing: ElevatedButton.icon(\n   663→                  onPressed: () {\n   664→                    // Check if it's an AICERTS course\n   665→                    if (course['isAICERTS'] == true) {\n   666→                      setState(() {\n   667→                        _activeCourse = course;\n   668→                        _isViewingCourse = true;\n   669→                      });\n   670→                    } else {\n   671→                      // Regular HOSI course - show coming soon\n   672→                      ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n   673→                        const SnackBar(\n   674→                          content: Text('HOSI native courses coming soon'),\n   675→                        ),\n   676→                      );\n   677→                    }\n   678→                  },\n   679→                  style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(\n   680→                    backgroundColor: course['isAICERTS'] == true\n   681→                        ? colors.primary\n   682→                        : colors.secondary,\n   683→                    foregroundColor: colors.onPrimary,\n   684→                  ),\n   685→                  icon: Icon(\n   686→                    course['isAICERTS'] == true\n   687→                        ? Icons.play_circle_outline\n   688→                        : Icons.school,\n   689→                    size: 18,\n   690→                  ),\n   691→                  label: const Text('Continue'),\n   692→                ),\n   693→              ),\n   694→            );\n   695→          },\n   696→        ),\n   697→      ],\n   698→    );\n   699→  }\n   700→\n   701→  Widget _buildDashboardStats(ThemeData theme, ColorScheme colors) {\n   702→    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n   703→    final isMobile = screenWidth < 768;\n   704→\n   705→    final double avgProgress = _enrolledCourses.isEmpty\n   706→        ? 0.0\n   707→        : _enrolledCourses\n   708→                .map((c) => c['progress'] as double)\n   709→                .reduce((a, b) => a + b) /\n   710→            _enrolledCourses.length;\n   711→\n   712→    return Column(\n   713→      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   714→      children: [\n   715→        Text(\n   716→          'Quick Stats',\n   717→          style: theme.textTheme.titleLarge?.copyWith(\n   718→            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n   719→          ),\n   720→ 727→              width: isMobile ? double.infinity : (screenWidth - 100) / 3,\n   728→              child: _buildStatCard(\n   729→                icon: Icons.school,\n   730→                label: 'Active Courses',\n   731→                value: '${_enrolledCourses.length}',\n   732→                color: colors.primary,\n   733→                theme: theme,\n   734→                colors: colors,\n   735→              ),\n   736→            ),\n   737→            SizedBox(\n   738→              width: isMobile ? double.infinity : (screenWidth - 100) / 3,\n   739→              child: _buildStatCard(\n   740→                icon: Icons.assignment,\n   741→                label: 'Pending Tasks',\n   742→                value: '0', // TODO: Load from assignments API\n   743→     width: isMobile ? double.infinity : (screenWidth - 100) / 3,\n   750→              child: _buildStatCard(\n   751→                icon: Icons.trending_up,\n   752→                label: 'Avg Progress',\n   753→                value: '${(avgProgress * 100).toInt()}%',\n   754→                color: colors.tertiary,\n   755→                theme: theme,\n   756→                colors: colors,\n   757→              ),\n   758→            ),\n   759→          ],\n   760→        ),\n   761→      ],\n   762→    );\n   763→  }\n   764→\n   765→  Widget _buildStatCard({\n   766→ colors,\n   772→  }) {\n   773→    return Container(\n   774→      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),\n   775→      decoration: BoxDecoration(\n   776→        color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.1),\n crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n   782→        children: [\n   783→          Icon(icon, color: color, size: 32),\n   784→          const SizedBox(height: 12),\n   785→          Text(\n theme, ColorScheme colors) {\n   805→    // Handle Live Sessions menu\n   806→    if (_selectedMenu == 'live_sessions') {\n   807→      return _buildLiveSessions(theme, colors);\n   808→    }\n   809→\n   810→    // Handle Exploration Menus\n   811→    if (_selectedMenu == 'catalog') {\n   812→      return const CourseCatalogPage(embedMode: true);\n   813→    }\n   814→\n   815→    if true);\n   825→    }\n   826→\n   827→    if (_selectedMenu == 'custom_selection') {\n   828→      return const CustomSelectionPage(embedMode: true);\n   829→    }\n   830→\n   831→    // Default 859→\n   860→  Widget _buildLiveSessions(ThemeData theme, ColorScheme colors) {\n   861→    // Separate live and upcoming sessions\n   862→    final liveSessions =\n   863→
