'package:flutter/material.dart';\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\nimport 'package:url_launcher/url_launcher.dart';\nimport '../../../core/api/api_client.dart';\nimport '../../../data/models/aicerts_enrollment.dart';\nimport '../../../core/services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../widgets/headers/dashboard_header.dart';\nimport 'wishlist_page.dart';\n\n/// Student Portal\n/// Uses the same structure as Instructor Portal:\n/// Top Header -> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\nclass StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n  final String userName;\n\n  const StudentPortalPage({\n    super.key,\n    required this.userName,\n  });\n\n  @override\n  State<StudentPortalPage> createState() => _StudentPortalPageState();\n}\n\nclass _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n  int _currentIndex = 0;\n  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n\n  // Pages for the portal\n  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n\n  // Real enrollment data\n  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n  @override\n  void initState() {\n    super.initState();\n    _userName = widget.userName;\n    _fetchEnrollments();\n    _pages = [\n      _buildDashboardView(),\n      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n      _buildProgressView(),\n    ];\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    if (!mounted) return;\n    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    try {\n      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() {\n        _enrollments =\n            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n        // Refresh pages with new data\n        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    try {\n      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n        } else {\n          if (mounted) {\n            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n      if (mounted) {\n        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @override\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;","numLines":100,"startLine":1,"totalLines":832}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"123ba296-d7f5-42dc-9bd5-7639a9068c7d"}

{"parentUuid":"e96fd5c9-144f-42a0-b784-5f94d49e5e3f","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01MuRgakiJQnhoPdLuPYcN7m","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01C7oveX7595zi9fjGctF4Pc","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"docker exec lms-prod-backend-1 python -c \"\nimport os, django\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'lms_project.settings')\ndjango.setup()\nfrom apps.aicerts_integration.services import EnrollmentSyncService\nimport inspect\nprint(inspect.getsource(EnrollmentSyncService))\n\" 2>&1 | head -100","description":"Read EnrollmentSyncService source code"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":90,"cache_read_input_tokens":44015,"output_tokens":175,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":90},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcGeG9ZerwRufQveKhVD","type":"assistant","uuid":"ef01f1ad-5e02-494f-9fe1-06795972b19c","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:20:10.521Z"}
{"parentUuid":"ef01f1ad-5e02-494f-9fe1-06795972b19c","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01C7oveX7595zi9fjGctF4Pc","type":"tool_result","content":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nclass EnrollmentSyncService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for synchronizing enrollments between Hosi Academy and AICERTs.\n    Handles dual enrollment with transaction management.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    @transaction.atomic\n    def enroll_user_in_course(user, course, create_aicerts_user: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll user in both Hosi Academy and AICERTs course.\n\n        Args:\n            user: User instance\n            course: AICertsCourse instance\n            create_aicerts_user: Whether to create user on AICERTs if not exists\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (local_enrollment, aicerts_result)\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsEnrollmentError: On enrollment failure\n        \"\"\"\n        from apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\n\n        # Check if user has AICERTs ID\n        aicerts_user_id = getattr(user, 'aicerts_user_id', None)\n\n        if not aicerts_user_id and create_aicerts_user:\n            # Create user on AICERTs\n            try:\n                result = SSOService.create_user(\n                    email=user.email,\n                    first_name=user.first_name,\n                    last_name=user.last_name\n                )\n                aicerts_user_id = result.get('id')\n\n                # Update local user record\n                user.aicerts_user_id = aicerts_user_id\n                user.aicerts_synced_at = time.time()\n                user.save(update_fields=['aicerts_user_id', 'aicerts_synced_at'])\n\n            except AICERTsAPIError as e:\n                logger.error(f\"Failed to create AICERTs user for {user.email}: {e}\")\n                raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(f\"Could not create AICERTs account: {e}\")\n\n        if not aicerts_user_id:\n            raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(\"User does not have AICERTs account\")\n\n        # Enroll on AICERTs\n        try:\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=course.external_id,  # Use external_id for AICERTs API\n                email=user.email\n            )\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to enroll {user.email} in course {course.id} on AICERTs: {e}\")\n            raise\n\n        # Create local enrollment record\n        enrollment, created = AICertsEnrollment.objects.get_or_create(\n            user=user,\n            course=course,\n            defaults={\n                'aicerts_enrollment_status': 'enrolled',\n                'aicerts_already_enrolled': aicerts_result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n            }\n        )\n\n        if not created:\n            enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status = 'enrolled'\n            enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled = aicerts_result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n            enrollment.save()\n\n        logger.info(f\"Successfully enrolled {user.email} in {course.title}\")\n        return enrollment, aicerts_result","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"2a663b1a-f95a-4f90-aa2f-bb4fccc940b5","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:20:26.831Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nclass EnrollmentSyncService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for synchronizing enrollments between Hosi Academy and AICERTs.\n    Handles dual enrollment with transaction management.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    @transaction.atomic\n    def enroll_user_in_course(user, course, create_aicerts_user: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll user in both Hosi Academy and AICERTs course.\n\n        Args:\n            user: User instance\n            course: AICertsCourse instance\n            create_aicerts_user: Whether to create user on AICERTs if not exists\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (local_enrollment, aicerts_result)\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsEnrollmentError: On enrollment failure\n        \"\"\"\n        from apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\n\n        # Check if user has AICERTs ID\n        aicerts_user_id = getattr(user, 'aicerts_user_id', None)\n\n        if not aicerts_user_id and create_aicerts_user:\n            # Create user on AICERTs\n            try:\n                result = SSOService.create_user(\n                    email=user.email,\n                    first_name=user.first_name,\n                    last_name=user.last_name\n                )\n                aicerts_user_id = result.get('id')\n\n                # Update local user record\n                user.aicerts_user_id = aicerts_user_id\n                user.aicerts_synced_at = time.time()\n                user.save(update_fields=['aicerts_user_id', 'aicerts_synced_at'])\n\n            except AICERTsAPIError as e:\n                logger.error(f\"Failed to create AICERTs user for {user.email}: {e}\")\n                raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(f\"Could not create AICERTs account: {e}\")\n\n        if not aicerts_user_id:\n            raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(\"User does not have AICERTs account\")\n\n        # Enroll on AICERTs\n        try:\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=course.external_id,  # Use external_id for AICERTs API\n                email=user.email\n            )\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to enroll {user.email} in course {course.id} on AICERTs: {e}\")\n            raise\n\n        # Create local enrollment record\n        enrollment, created = AICertsEnrollment.objects.get_or_create(\n            user=user,\n            course=course,\n            defaults={\n                'aicerts_enrollment_status': 'enrolled',\n                'aicerts_already_enrolled': aicerts_result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n            }\n        )\n\n        if not created:\n            enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status = 'enrolled'\n            enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled = aicerts_result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n            enrollment.save()\n\n        logger.info(f\"Successfully enrolled {user.email} in {course.title}\")\n        return enrollment, aicerts_result","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"ef01f1ad-5e02-494f-9fe1-06795972b19c"}

{"parentUuid":"b9eea3ba-75f4-4145-b5b3-56c05a84f6fb","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_018GxVfmYts6X7CQNQi58Bwd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LiEqyS9uEVH8iZDmMx61km","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"docker exec lms-prod-backend-1 python -c \"\nimport os, django\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'lms_project.settings')\ndjango.setup()\nfrom apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\nfrom apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\nfrom apps.users.models import User\nfrom django.utils import timezone\n\nuser = User.objects.get(id=1)\n# Use AI+ Everyone course\ncourse = AiCertsCourse.objects.get(id=52)\nprint(f'Course: {course.title} (external_id={course.external_id})')\n\nenrollment, created = AICertsEnrollment.objects.get_or_create(\n    user=user,\n    course=course,\n    defaults={\n        'aicerts_enrollment_status': 'enrolled',\n        'enrolled_at': timezone.now(),\n        'progress_percentage': 0.0,\n    }\n)\nprint(f'Enrollment created={created}, id={enrollment.id}')\nprint(f'Status: {enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status}')\n\"","description":"Create AICertsEnrollment record for Richard in AI+ Everyone course"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1311,"cache_read_input_tokens":49424,"output_tokens":975,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1311},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcGrx8TvBMMsGgt2AJ8A","type":"assistant","uuid":"c5abd26c-898c-423c-aaec-e58b3a5033bc","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:23:14.424Z"}

),\n                  SizedBox(\n                    width: cardWidth,\n                    child: _buildStatCard(\n                      icon: Icons.verified_rounded,\n                      label: border:\n                  Border.all(color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n            ),\n            child: Row(\n              children: [\n                Expanded(\n ],\n            ),\n          ),","originalFile":"import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\nimport 'package:url_launcher/url_launcher.dart';\nimport '../../../core/api/api_client.dart';\nimport '../../../data/models/aicerts_enrollment.dart';\nimport '../../../core/services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../widgets/headers/dashboard_header.dart';\nimport 'wishlist_page.dart';\n\n/// Student Portal\n/// Uses the same structure as Instructor Portal:\n/// Top Header -> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\nclass StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n  final String userName;\n\n  const StudentPortalPage({\n    super.key,\n    required this.userName,\n  });\n\n  @override\n  State<StudentPortalPage> createState() => _StudentPortalPageState();\n}\n\nclass _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n  int _currentIndex = 0;\n  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n\n  // Pages for the portal\n  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n\n  // Real enrollment data\n  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n  @override\n  void initState() {\n    super.initState();\n    _userName = widget.userName;\n    _fetchEnrollments();\n    _pages = [\n      _buildDashboardView(),\n      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n      _buildProgressView(),\n    ];\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    if (!mounted) return;\n    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    try {\n      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() {\n        _enrollments =\n            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n        // Refresh pages with new data\n        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    try {\n      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n        } else {\n          if (mounted) {\n            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n      if (mounted) {\n        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @override\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n    final isMobile = screenWidth < 800;\n\n    return Scaffold(\n      backgroundColor:\n          colors.surfaceContainer, // Darker hue for main section background\n      appBar: isMobile\n          ? AppBar(\n              title: Text('Student Portal',\n                  style: TextStyle(color: colors.onPrimary)),\n              backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n            )\n          : null,\n      body: Column(\n        children: [\n          // Header (Desktop/Tablet Only)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                color: colors.surface,\n                border: Border(\n                  bottom: BorderSide(\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant,\n                    width: 1,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  child: DashboardHeader(\n                    userName: _userName,\n                    userDesignation: 'Student Portal',\n                    isAdmin: false,\n                    notificationCount: _unreadMessages,\n                    showMenuButton: false,\n                    showCart: true,\n                    showWishlist: true,\n                    onLogout: () async {\n                      await AuthService.logout();\n                      if (context.mounted) context.go('/onboarding');\n                    },\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area with Sidebar\n          // Horizontal Navigation (replacing sidebar)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              color: colors.surface,\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),\n                  child: Row(\n                    children: [\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.dashboard_outlined,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.dashboard,\n                        label: \"Dashboard\",\n                        index: 0,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.play_circle_outline,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n                        label: \"My Courses\",\n                        index: 1,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.favorite_border,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.favorite,\n                        label: \"Wishlist\",\n                        index: 2,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        label: \"Progress\",\n                        index: 3,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                    ],\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Divider(\n              height: 1,\n              thickness: 1,\n              color: colors.outlineVariant,\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area\n          Expanded(\n            child: isMobile\n                ? _pages[_currentIndex]\n                : Container(\n                    width: double.infinity,\n                    color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n                    child: Center(\n                      child: Container(\n                        constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                        child: _pages[_currentIndex],\n                      ),\n                    ),\n                  ),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      bottomNavigationBar: isMobile\n          ? NavigationBar(\n              selectedIndex: _currentIndex,\n              onDestinationSelected: (index) {\n                setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n              },\n              destinations: const [\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.dashboard),\n                  label: 'Dashboard',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.play_circle_fill),\n                  label: 'Courses',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.favorite),\n                  label: 'Wishlist',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.trending_up),\n                  label: 'Progress',\n                ),\n              ],\n            )\n          : null,\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildPortalNavItem({\n    required IconData icon,\n    required IconData activeIcon,\n    required String label,\n    required int index,\n    required ColorScheme colors,\n  }) {\n    final isSelected = _currentIndex == index;\n    return InkWell(\n      onTap: () {\n        setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n      },\n      child: Container(\n        margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 8),\n        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20, vertical: 10),\n        decoration: BoxDecoration(\n          color: isSelected\n              ? colors.primaryContainer.withValues(alpha: 0.5)\n              : Colors.transparent,\n          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),\n        ),\n        child: Row(\n          mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n          children: [\n            Icon(\n              isSelected ? activeIcon : icon,\n              color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n              size: 20,\n            ),\n            const SizedBox(width: 12),\n            Text(\n              label,\n              style: TextStyle(\n                color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.w500,\n                fontSize: 14,\n              ),\n            ),\n          ],\n        ),\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  // --- Views ---\n\n  Widget _buildDashboardView() {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n\n    return SingleChildScrollView(\n      physics: const BouncingScrollPhysics(),\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n      child: Column(\n        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n        children: [\n          Row(\n            children: [\n              Column(\n                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n                children: [\n                  Text(\n                    'Welcome back, $_userName!',\n                    style: theme.textTheme.headlineMedium?.copyWith(\n                      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                      letterSpacing: -0.5,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                  const SizedBox(height: 4),\n                  Text(\n                    'Here is an overview of your learning journey',\n                    style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(\n                      color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                ],\n              ),\n              const Spacer(),\n              _buildNotificationBadge(colors),\n            ],\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 40),\n\n          // Overview Stats\n          LayoutBuilder(\n            builder: (context, constraints) {\n              final isSmall = constraints.maxWidth < 700;\n              final cardWidth = isSmall\n                  ? constraints.maxWidth\n                  : (constraints.maxWidth - 48) / 3;\n\n              return Wrap(\n                spacing: 24,\n                runSpacing: 24,\n                children: [\n                  SizedBox(\n                    width: cardWidth,\n                    child: _buildStatCard(\n                      icon: Icons.school_rounded,\n                      label: 'Enrolled Courses',\n                      value: '4',\n                      color: colors.primary,\n                      theme: theme,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                  SizedBox(\n                    width: cardWidth,\n                    child: _buildStatCard(\n                      icon: Icons.verified_rounded,\n                      label: 'Certifications',\n                      value: '1',\n                      color: const Color(0xFF10B981), // successGreen\n                      theme: theme,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                  SizedBox(\n                    width: cardWidth,\n                    child: _buildStatCard(\n                      icon: Icons.auto_graph_rounded,\n                      label: 'Learning Hours',\n                      value: '12.5h',\n                      color: colors.tertiary,\n                      theme: theme,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                ],\n              );\n            },\n          ),\n\n          const SizedBox(height: 48),\n\n          Row(\n            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,\n            children: [\n              Text(\n                'Recent Course Activity',\n                style: theme.textTheme.titleLarge?.copyWith(\n                  fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                  letterSpacing: -0.5,\n                ),\n              ),\n              TextButton(\n                onPressed: () => setState(() => _currentIndex = 1),\n                child: const Text('View All'),\n              ),\n            ],\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 16),\n\n          // Activity List\n          _buildActivityCard(\n            title: 'Advanced Flutter Architecture',\n            status: 'In Progress • 65%',\n            time: '2 hours ago',\n            icon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n            color: colors.primary,\n            theme: theme,\n            colors: colors,\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 12),\n          _buildActivityCard(\n            title: 'UI/UX Design Principles',\n            status: 'Completed',\n            time: 'Yesterday',\n            icon: Icons.check_circle,\n            color: const Color(0xFF10B981),\n            theme: theme,\n            colors: colors,\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildNotificationBadge(ColorScheme colors) {\n })),","originalFile":"import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\nimport 'package:url_launcher/url_launcher.dart';\nimport '../../../core/api/api_client.dart';\nimport '../../../data/models/aicerts_enrollment.dart';\nimport '../../../core/services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../widgets/headers/dashboard_header.dart';\nimport 'wishlist_page.dart';\n\n/// Student Portal\n/// Uses the same structure as Instructor Portal:\n/// Top Header -> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\nclass StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n  final String userName;\n\n  const StudentPortalPage({\n    super.key,\n    required this.userName,\n  });\n\n  @override\n  State<StudentPortalPage> createState() => _StudentPortalPageState();\n}\n\nclass _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n  int _currentIndex = 0;\n  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n\n  // Pages for the portal\n  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n\n  // Real enrollment data\n  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n  @override\n  void initState() {\n    super.initState();\n    _userName = widget.userName;\n    _fetchEnrollments();\n    _pages = [\n      _buildDashboardView(),\n      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n      _buildProgressView(),\n    ];\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    if (!mounted) return;\n    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    try {\n      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() {\n        _enrollments =\n            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n        // Refresh pages with new data\n        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    try {\n      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n        } else {\n          if (mounted) {\n            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n      if (mounted) {\n        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @override\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n    final isMobile = screenWidth < 800;\n\n    return Scaffold(\n      backgroundColor:\n          colors.surfaceContainer, // Darker hue for main section background\n      appBar: isMobile\n          ? AppBar(\n              title: Text('Student Portal',\n                  style: TextStyle(color: colors.onPrimary)),\n              backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n            )\n          : null,\n      body: Column(\n        children: [\n          // Header (Desktop/Tablet Only)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                color: colors.surface,\n                border: Border(\n                  bottom: BorderSide(\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant,\n                    width: 1,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  child: colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                fontWeight: isSelected ? '../../../core/api/api_client.dart';\nimport '../../../data/models/aicerts_enrollment.dart';\nimport '../../../core/services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../widgets/headers/dashboard_header.dart';\nimport 'wishlist_page.dart';\n\n/// Student Portal\n/// Uses the same structure as Instructor Portal:\n/// Top Header -> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\nclass StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n  final String userName;\n\n  const StudentPortalPage({\n    super.key,\n    required this.userName,\n  });\n\n  @override\n  State<StudentPortalPage> createState() => _StudentPortalPageState();\n}\n\nclass _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n  int _currentIndex = 0;\n  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n\n  // Pages for the portal\n  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n\n  // Real enrollment data\n  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n  @override\n  void initState() {\n    super.initState();\n    _userName = widget.userName;\n    _fetchEnrollments();\n    _pages = [\n      _buildDashboardView(),\n      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n      _buildProgressView(),\n    ];\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    if (!mounted) return;\n    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    try {\n      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() {\n        _enrollments =\n            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n        // Refresh pages with new data\n        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    try {\n      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n        } else {\n          if (mounted) {\n            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n      if (mounted) {\n        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @override\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n    final isMobile = screenWidth < 800;\n\n    return Scaffold(\n      backgroundColor:\n          colors.surfaceContainer, // Darker hue for main section background\n      appBar: isMobile\n          ? AppBar(\n              title: Text('Student Portal',\n                  style: TextStyle(color: colors.onPrimary)),\n              backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n            )\n          : null,\n      body: Column(\n        children: [\n          // Header (Desktop/Tablet Only)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                color: colors.surface,\n                border: Border(\n                  bottom: BorderSide(\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant,\n                    width: 1,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  child: DashboardHeader(\n                    userName: _userName,\n                    userDesignation: 'Student Portal',\n                    isAdmin: false,\n                    notificationCount: _unreadMessages,\n                    showMenuButton: false,\n                    showCart: true,\n                    showWishlist: true,\n                    onLogout: () async {\n                      await AuthService.logout();\n                      if (context.mounted) context.go('/onboarding');\n                    },\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area with Sidebar\n          // Horizontal Navigation (replacing sidebar)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              color: colors.surface,\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),\n                  child: Row(\n                    children: [\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.dashboard_outlined,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.dashboard,\n                        label: \"Dashboard\",\n                        index: 0,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.play_circle_outline,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n                        label: \"My Courses\",\n                        index: 1,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.favorite_border,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.favorite,\n                        label: \"Wishlist\",\n                        index: 2,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        label: \"Progress\",\n                        index: 3,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                    ],\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Divider(\n              height: 1,\n              thickness: 1,\n              color: colors.outlineVariant,\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area\n          Expanded(\n            child: isMobile\n                ? _pages[_currentIndex]\n                : Container(\n                    width: double.infinity,\n                    color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n                    child: Center(\n                      child: Container(\n                        constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                        child: _pages[_currentIndex],\n                      ),\n                    ),\n                  ),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      bottomNavigationBar: isMobile\n          ? NavigationBar(\n              selectedIndex: _currentIndex,\n              onDestinationSelected: (index) {\n                setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n              },\n              destinations: const [\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.dashboard),\n                  label: 'Dashboard',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.play_circle_fill),\n                  label: 'Courses',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.favorite),\n                  label: 'Wishlist',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.trending_up),\n                  label: 'Progress',\n                ),\n              ],\n            )\n          : null,\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildPortalNavItem({\n    required IconData icon,\n    required IconData activeIcon,\n    required String label,\n    required int index,\n    required ColorScheme colors,\n  }) {\n    final isSelected = _currentIndex == index;\n    return InkWell(\n      onTap: () {\n        setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n      },\n      child: Container(\n        margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 8),\n        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20, vertical: 10),\n        decoration: BoxDecoration(\n          color: isSelected\n              ? colors.primaryContainer.withValues(alpha: 0.5)\n              : Colors.transparent,\n          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),\n        ),\n        child: Row(\n          mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n          children: [\n            Icon(\n              isSelected ? activeIcon : icon,\n              color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n              size: 20,\n            ),\n            const SizedBox(width: 12),\n            Text(\n              label,\n              style: TextStyle(\n                color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.w500,\n                fontSize: 14,\n              ),\n            ),\n          ],\n        ),\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  // --- Views ---\n\n  Widget _buildDashboardView() {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n\n    return SingleChildScrollView(\n      physics: const BouncingScrollPhysics(),\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n      child: Column(\n        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n        children: [\n          Row(\n            children: [\n              Column(\n                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n                children: [\n                  Text(\n                    'Welcome back, $_userName!',\n                    style: theme.textTheme.headlineMedium?.copyWith(\n                      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                      letterSpacing: -0.5,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                  const SizedBox(height: 4),\n                  Text(\n                    'Here is an overview of your learning journey',\n                    style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(\n                      color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                ],\n              ),\n              const Spacer(),\n              _buildNotificationBadge(colors),\n            ],\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 40),\n\n          // Overview Stats — small horizontal chips\n          Container(\n            padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 12),\n            decoration: BoxDecoration(\n              color: colors.surface,\n              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),\n              border:\n                  Border.all(color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n            ),\n            child: Row(\n              children: [\n                Expanded(\n                  child: _buildStatChip(\n                    icon: Icons.school_rounded,\n                    label: 'Enrolled',\n                    value: _enrollments.length.toString(),\n                    color: colors.primary,\n                    theme: theme,\n                  ),\n                ),\n                Container(\n                    width: 1,\n                    height: 36,\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n                Expanded(\n                  child: _buildStatChip(\n                    icon: Icons.verified_rounded,\n                    label: 'Certifications',\n                    value: _enrollments\n                        .where((e) => e.progress >= 100)\n                        .length\n                        .toString(),\n                    color: const Color(0xFF10B981),\n                    theme: theme,\n                  ),\n                ),\n                Container(\n                    width: 1,\n                    height: 36,\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n                Expanded(\n                  child: _buildStatChip(\n                    icon: Icons.auto_graph_rounded,\n                    label: 'In Progress',\n                    value: _enrollments\n                        .where((e) => e.progress > 0 && e.progress < 100)\n                        .length\n                        .toString(),\n                    color: colors.tertiary,\n                    theme: theme,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ],\n            ),\n          ),\n\n          const SizedBox(height: 48),\n\n          Row(\n            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,\n            children: [\n              Text(\n                'Recent Course Activity',\n                style: theme.textTheme.titleLarge?.copyWith(\n                  fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                  letterSpacing: -0.5,\n                ),\n              ),\n              TextButton(\n                onPressed: () => setState(() => _currentIndex = 1),\n                child: const Text('View All'),\n              ),\n            ],\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 16),\n\n          // Activity List — real enrollment data\n          if (_enrollments.isEmpty)\n            Container(\n              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),\n              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                color: colors.surface,\n                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\n                border: Border.all(\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n              ),\n              child: Text(\n                'No courses yet. Browse the course catalogue to get started.',\n                style:\n                    TextStyle(color: colors.onSurfaceVariant),\n              ),\n            )\n          else\n            ...(_enrollments.take(3).toList().asMap().entries.map((entry) {\n              final e = entry.value;\n              final isComplete = e.progress >= 100;\n              return Padding(\n                padding: EdgeInsets.only(\n                    bottom: entry.key < (_enrollments.take(3).length - 1)\n                        ? 12\n                        : 0),\n                child: _buildActivityCard(\n                  title: e.courseTitle,\n                  status: isComplete\n                      ? 'Completed'\n                      : 'In Progress • ${e.progress.toInt()}%',\n                  time: '',\n                  icon: isComplete\n                      ? Icons.check_circle\n                      : Icons.play_circle_fill,\n                  color: isComplete\n                      ? const Color(0xFF10B981)\n                      : colors.primary,\n                  theme: theme,\n                  colors: colors,\n                  enrollment: e,\n                  onTap: () => _launchCourse(e),\n                ),\n              );\n            })),\n        ],\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildNotificationBadge(ColorScheme colors) {\n    return Container(\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),\n      decoration: BoxDecoration(\n        color: colors.surface,\n        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),\n        border: Border.all(color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n      ),\n      child: Stack(\n        clipBehavior: Clip.none,\n        children: [\n          Icon(Icons.notifications_outlined, color: colors.onSurfaceVariant),\n          if (_unreadMessages > 0)\n            Positioned(\n              right: -2,\n              top: -2,\n              child: Container(\n                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(4),\n                decoration: const BoxDecoration(\n                  color: Colors.red,\n                  shape: BoxShape.circle,\n                ),\n                constraints: const BoxConstraints(\n                  minWidth: 8,\n                  minHeight: 8,\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n        ],\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildActivityCard({\n    required String title,\n    required String status,\n    required String time,\n    required IconData icon,\n    required Color color,\n    required ThemeData theme,\n    required ColorScheme colors,\n  }) {\n    return Container(\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),\n      decoration: BoxDecoration(\n        color: colors.surface,\n        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\n        border: Border.all(color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n        boxShadow: [\n          BoxShadow(\n            color: colors.shadow.withValues(alpha: 0.03),\n            blurRadius: 10,\n            offset: const Offset(0, 4),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      child: Row(\n        children: [\n          Container(\n            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),\n            decoration: BoxDecoration(\n              color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.1),\n              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),\n            ),\n            child: Icon(icon, color: color, size: 24),\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(width: 16),\n          Expanded(\n            child: Column(\n              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n              children: [\n                Text(\n                  title,\n                  style: theme.textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(\n                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                  ),\n                ),\n                const SizedBox(height: 4),\n                Text(\n                  status,\n                  style: theme.textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(\n                    color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ],\n            ),\n          ),\n          Column(\n            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.end,\n            children: [\n              Text(\n                time,\n                style: theme.textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(\n                  color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                  fontSize: 10,\n                ),\n              ),\n              const SizedBox(height: 4),\n              const Icon(Icons.chevron_right, size: 20),\n            ],\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildStatCard({\n    required IconData icon,\n    required String label,\n    required String value,\n    required Color color,\n    required ThemeData theme,\n  }) {\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n    return Container(\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),\n      decoration: BoxDecoration(\n        color: colors.surface,\n        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),\n        border: Border.all(color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n        boxShadow: [\n          BoxShadow(\n            color: colors.shadow.withValues(alpha: 0.05),\n            blurRadius: 15,\n            offset: const Offset(0, 8),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      child: Column(\n        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n        children: [\n          Container(\n            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),\n            decoration: BoxDecoration(\n              color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.1),\n              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),\n            ),\n            child: Icon(icon, color: color, size: 28),\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 20),\n          Text(\n            value,\n            style: theme.textTheme.headlineMedium?.copyWith(\n              fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n              color: colors.onSurface,\n              letterSpacing: -1,\n            ),\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 4),\n          Text(\n            label,\n            style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(\n              color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n              fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,\n            ),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildMyCoursesView() {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n\n    if (_isLoadingEnrollments) {\n      return const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator());\n    }\n\n    if (_enrollments.isEmpty) {\n      return Container(\n        color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n        child: Center(\n          child: Column(\n            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,\n            children: [\n              Container(\n                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n                decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                  color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.05),\n                  shape: BoxShape.circle,\n                ),\n                child: Icon(Icons.school_outlined,\n                    size: 80, color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n              ),\n              const SizedBox(height: 24),\n              Text('My Courses',\n                  style: theme.textTheme.headlineSmall?.copyWith(\n                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                  )),\n              const SizedBox(height: 12),\n              Text(\n                'Your learning materials will appear here.',\n                style: TextStyle(color: colors.onSurfaceVariant),\n              ),\n              const SizedBox(height: 32),\n              ElevatedButton(\n                onPressed: () => context.go('/courses'),\n                style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(\n                  padding:\n                      const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 32, vertical: 16),\n                  shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(\n                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),\n                  ),\n                ),\n                child: const Text('Go to Learning Dashboard'),\n              ),\n            ],\n          ),\n        ),\n      );\n    }\n\n    return Container(\n      color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n      child: Column(\n        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n        children: [\n          Row(\n            children: [\n              Text(\n                'My Enrolled Courses',\n                style: theme.textTheme.headlineSmall?.copyWith(\n                  fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                ),\n              ),\n              const Spacer(),\n              IconButton(\n                onPressed: _fetchEnrollments,\n                icon: const Icon(Icons.refresh),\n                tooltip: 'Refresh',\n              ),\n            ],\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 24),\n          Expanded(\n            child: ListView.separated(\n              itemCount: _enrollments.length,\n              separatorBuilder: (context, index) => const SizedBox(height: 16),\n              itemBuilder: (context, index) {\n                final enrollment = _enrollments[index];\n                return _buildEnrollmentCard(enrollment, theme, colors);\n              },\n            ),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildEnrollmentCard(\n      AICertsEnrollment enrollment, ThemeData theme, ColorScheme colors) {\n    return Container(\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),\n      decoration: BoxDecoration(\n        color: colors.surface,\n        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),\n        border: Border.all(color: colors.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.5)),\n        boxShadow: [\n          BoxShadow(\n            color: colors.shadow.withValues(alpha: 0.03),\n            blurRadius: 10,\n            offset: const Offset(0, 4),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      child: Row(\n        children: [\n '../../../core/api/api_client.dart';\nimport '../../../data/models/aicerts_enrollment.dart';\nimport '../../../core/services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../widgets/headers/dashboard_header.dart';\nimport 'wishlist_page.dart';\n\n/// Student Portal\n/// Uses the same structure as Instructor Portal:\n/// Top Header -> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\nclass StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n  final String userName;\n\n  const StudentPortalPage({\n    super.key,\n    required this.userName,\n  });\n\n  @override\n  State<StudentPortalPage> createState() => _StudentPortalPageState();\n}\n\nclass _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n  int _currentIndex = 0;\n  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n\n  // Pages for the portal\n  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n\n  // Real enrollment data\n  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n  @override\n  void initState() {\n    super.initState();\n    _userName = widget.userName;\n    _fetchEnrollments();\n    _pages = [\n      _buildDashboardView(),\n      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n      _buildProgressView(),\n    ];\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    if (!mounted) return;\n    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    try {\n      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() {\n        _enrollments =\n            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n        // Refresh pages with new data\n        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    try {\n      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n        } else {\n          if (mounted) {\n            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n      if (mounted) {\n        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @override\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n    final isMobile = screenWidth < 800;\n\n    return Scaffold(\n      backgroundColor:\n          colors.surfaceContainer, // Darker hue for main section background\n      appBar: isMobile\n          ? AppBar(\n              title: Text('Student Portal',\n                  style: TextStyle(color: colors.onPrimary)),\n              backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n            )\n          : null,\n      body: Column(\n        children: [\n          // Header (Desktop/Tablet Only)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                color: colors.surface,\n                border: Border(\n                  bottom: BorderSide(\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant,\n                    width: 1,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  child: DashboardHeader(\n                    userName: _userName,\n                    userDesignation: 'Student Portal',\n                    isAdmin: false,\n                    notificationCount: _unreadMessages,\n                    showMenuButton: false,\n                    showCart: true,\n                    showWishlist: true,\n                    onLogout: () async {\n                      await AuthService.logout();\n                      if (context.mounted) context.go('/onboarding');\n                    },\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area with Sidebar\n          // Horizontal Navigation (replacing sidebar)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              color: colors.surface,\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),\n                  child: Row(\n                    children: [\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.dashboard_outlined,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.dashboard,\n                        label: \"Dashboard\",\n                        index: 0,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.play_circle_outline,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n                        label: \"My Courses\",\n                        index: 1,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.favorite_border,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.favorite,\n                        label: \"Wishlist\",\n                        index: 2,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        label: \"Progress\",\n                        index: 3,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                    ],\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Divider(\n              height: 1,\n              thickness: 1,\n              color: colors.outlineVariant,\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area\n          Expanded(\n            child: isMobile\n                ? _pages[_currentIndex]\n                : Container(\n                    width: double.infinity,\n                    color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n                    child: Center(\n                      child: Container(\n                        constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                        child: _pages[_currentIndex],\n                      ),\n                    ),\n                  ),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      bottomNavigationBar: isMobile\n          ? NavigationBar(\n              selectedIndex: _currentIndex,\n              onDestinationSelected: (index) {\n                setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n              },\n              destinations: const [\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.dashboard),\n                  label: 'Dashboard',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.play_circle_fill),\n                  label: 'Courses',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.favorite),\n                  label: 'Wishlist',\n                ),\n                NavigationDestination(\n                  icon: Icon(Icons.trending_up),\n                  label: 'Progress',\n                ),\n              ],\n            )\n          : null,\n    );\n  }\n\n  Widget _buildPortalNavItem({\n    required IconData icon,\n    required IconData activeIcon,\n    required String label,\n    required int index,\n    required ColorScheme colors,\n  }) {\n    final isSelected = _currentIndex == index;\n    return InkWell(\n      onTap: () {\n        setState(() => _currentIndex = index);\n      },\n      child: Container(\n        margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 8),\n        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20, vertical: 10),\n        decoration: BoxDecoration(\n          color: isSelected\n              ? colors.primaryContainer.withValues(alpha: 0.5)\n              : Colors.transparent,\n          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),\n        ),\n        child: Row(\n          mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n          children: [\n            Icon(\n              isSelected ? activeIcon : icon,\n              color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n              size: 20,\n            ),\n            const SizedBox(width: 12),\n            Text(\n              label,\n              style: TextStyle(\n                color: isSelected ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.w500,\n                fontSize: 14,\n              ),\n            ),\n          ],\n        ),\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  // --- Views ---\n\n  Widget _buildDashboardView() {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n\n    return SingleChildScrollView(\n      physics: const BouncingScrollPhysics(),\n      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(32),\n      child: Column(\n        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n        children: [\n          Row(\n            children: [\n              Column(\n                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n                children: [\n                  Text(\n                    'Welcome back, $_userName!',\n                    style: theme.textTheme.headlineMedium?.copyWith(\n                      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,\n                      letterSpacing: -0.5,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                  const SizedBox(height: 4),\n                  Text(\n                    'Here is an overview of your learning journey',\n                    style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(\n                      color: colors.onSurfaceVariant,\n                    ),\n                  ),\n                ],\n              ),\n              const Spacer(),\n              _buildNotificationBadge(colors),\n            ],\n          ),\n          const SizedBox(height: 40),\n\n          // Overview Stats — small horizontal chips\n          Container(\n            padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 12),\n            decoration: BoxDecoration(\n              color: colors.surface,\n              borderRadius: [\n                Expanded(\n                  child: _buildStatChip(\n                    icon: Icons.school_rounded,\n                    label: 'Enrolled',\n                    value: _buildMyCoursesView();","originalFile":"import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\nimport 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';\nimport 'package:url_launcher/url_launcher.dart';\nimport '../../../core/api/api_client.dart';\nimport '../../../data/models/aicerts_enrollment.dart';\nimport '../../../core/services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../widgets/headers/dashboard_header.dart';\nimport 'wishlist_page.dart';\n\n/// Student Portal\n/// Uses the same structure as Instructor Portal:\n/// Top Header -> TabBar -> Content Area (No Left Sidebar on Desktop)\nclass StudentPortalPage extends StatefulWidget {\n  final String userName;\n\n  const StudentPortalPage({\n    super.key,\n    required this.userName,\n  });\n\n  @override\n  State<StudentPortalPage> createState() => _StudentPortalPageState();\n}\n\nclass _StudentPortalPageState extends State<StudentPortalPage>\n    with TickerProviderStateMixin {\n  int _currentIndex = 0;\n  String _userName = 'Student'; // Restore _userName\n  int _unreadMessages = 2; // Restore _unreadMessages\n\n  // Pages for the portal\n  late final List<Widget> _pages;\n\n  // Real enrollment data\n  List<AICertsEnrollment> _enrollments = [];\n  bool _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n  @override\n  void initState() {\n    super.initState();\n    _userName = widget.userName;\n    _fetchEnrollments();\n    _pages = [\n      _buildDashboardView(),\n      _buildMyCoursesView(),\n      const WishlistPage(embedMode: true),\n      _buildProgressView(),\n    ];\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchEnrollments() async {\n    if (!mounted) return;\n    setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = true);\n    try {\n      final data = await ApiClient.getAICertsEnrollments();\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() {\n        _enrollments =\n            data.map((json) => AICertsEnrollment.fromJson(json)).toList();\n        _isLoadingEnrollments = false;\n\n        // Refresh pages with new data\n        _pages[1] = _buildMyCoursesView();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error fetching enrollments: $e');\n      if (!mounted) return;\n      setState(() => _isLoadingEnrollments = false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _launchCourse(AICertsEnrollment enrollment) async {\n    try {\n      final ssoUrl = await ApiClient.getAICertsSSOUrl(enrollment.id);\n      if (ssoUrl != null) {\n        final uri = Uri.parse(ssoUrl);\n        if (await canLaunchUrl(uri)) {\n          await launchUrl(uri, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);\n        } else {\n          if (mounted) {\n            ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n              const SnackBar(content: Text('Could not launch course URL')),\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('Error launching course: $e');\n      if (mounted) {\n        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(\n          SnackBar(content: Text('Error: ${e.toString()}')),\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @override\n  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n    final theme = Theme.of(context);\n    final colors = theme.colorScheme;\n    final screenWidth = MediaQuery.of(context).size.width;\n    final isMobile = screenWidth < 800;\n\n    return Scaffold(\n      backgroundColor:\n          colors.surfaceContainer, // Darker hue for main section background\n      appBar: isMobile\n          ? AppBar(\n              title: Text('Student Portal',\n                  style: TextStyle(color: colors.onPrimary)),\n              backgroundColor: colors.primary,\n            )\n          : null,\n      body: Column(\n        children: [\n          // Header (Desktop/Tablet Only)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              decoration: BoxDecoration(\n                color: colors.surface,\n                border: Border(\n                  bottom: BorderSide(\n                    color: colors.outlineVariant,\n                    width: 1,\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  child: DashboardHeader(\n                    userName: _userName,\n                    userDesignation: 'Student Portal',\n                    isAdmin: false,\n                    notificationCount: _unreadMessages,\n                    showMenuButton: false,\n                    showCart: true,\n                    showWishlist: true,\n                    onLogout: () async {\n                      await AuthService.logout();\n                      if (context.mounted) context.go('/onboarding');\n                    },\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area with Sidebar\n          // Horizontal Navigation (replacing sidebar)\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Container(\n              color: colors.surface,\n              child: Center(\n                child: Container(\n                  constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),\n                  child: Row(\n                    children: [\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.dashboard_outlined,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.dashboard,\n                        label: \"Dashboard\",\n                        index: 0,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.play_circle_outline,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.play_circle_fill,\n                        label: \"My Courses\",\n                        index: 1,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.favorite_border,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.favorite,\n                        label: \"Wishlist\",\n                        index: 2,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                      _buildPortalNavItem(\n                        icon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        activeIcon: Icons.trending_up,\n                        label: \"Progress\",\n                        index: 3,\n                        colors: colors,\n                      ),\n                    ],\n                  ),\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n\n          if (!isMobile)\n            Divider(\n              height: 1,\n              thickness: 1,\n              color: colors.outlineVariant,\n            ),\n\n          // Main Content Area\n          Expanded(\n            child: isMobile\n                ? _pages[_currentIndex]\n                : Container(\n                    width: double.infinity,\n                    color: colors.surfaceContainerLowest,\n                    child: Center(\n                      child: Container(\n                        constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 1600),\n                        child: _pages[_currentIndex],\n                      ),\n                    ),\n                  ),\n          ),\n        ],\n      ),\n      bottomNavigationBar: isMobile\n          ?
