{"parentUuid":"7c22ec18-942b-4207-904f-653f7d17dbf6","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0177mM6AyJ4ML6XMfFCkFjqe","type":"tool_result","content":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nclass SSOService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for AICERTs SSO API interactions.\n    Base URL: https://learn.aicerts.io/webservice/rest/server.php\n\n    Handles:\n    - User creation\n    - Course enrollment\n    - Authentication/auto-login\n    \"\"\"\n\n    BASE_URL = settings.AICERTS_SSO_BASE_URL\n    WSTOKEN = settings.AICERTS_WSTOKEN\n    PARTNER_ID = settings.AICERTS_PARTNER_ID\n    REST_FORMAT = settings.AICERTS_REST_FORMAT\n\n    @classmethod\n    def _build_base_params(cls, wsfunction: str) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"Build base parameters for all SSO API calls\"\"\"\n        return {\n            'wstoken': cls.WSTOKEN,\n            'wsfunction': wsfunction,\n            'moodlewsrestformat': cls.REST_FORMAT\n        }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def create_user(cls, email: str, first_name: str, last_name: str, username: str = None) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a new user in AICERTs LMS.\n\n        Args:\n            email: User email\n            first_name: User's first name\n            last_name: User's last name\n            username: Username (defaults to email)\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'status', 'message', 'id', 'username'\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsAuthenticationError: On authentication failure\n            AICERTsAPIError: On other API errors\n        \"\"\"\n        if username is None:\n            username = email\n\n        # Generate timestamp and signature\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(email)\n\n        params = cls._build_base_params('core_user_create_users')\n        params.update({\n            'users[0][firstname]': first_name,\n            'users[0][lastname]': last_name,\n            'users[0][email]': email,\n            'users[0][username]': username,\n            'users[0][partner_id]': cls.PARTNER_ID,\n            'users[0][source]': 'sso',\n            'timestamp': timestamp,\n            'signature': signature\n        })\n\n        try:\n            response = requests.post(\n                cls.BASE_URL,\n                params=params,\n                timeout=settings.AICERTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n\n            result = response.json()\n\n            # Response is a list with one item\n            if isinstance(result, list) and len(result) > 0:\n                user_data = result[0]\n\n                if user_data.get('status') == 'success':\n                    logger.info(f\"Created AICERTs user: {email} (ID: {user_data.get('id')})\")\n                    return user_data\n                else:\n                    error_msg = user_data.get('message', 'Unknown error')\n                    logger.error(f\"Failed to create AICERTs user {email}: {error_msg}\")\n\n                    if 'authentication' in error_msg.lower():\n                        raise AICERTsAuthenticationError(error_msg)\n                    raise AICERTsAPIError(error_msg)\n\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Unexpected response format: {result}\")\n\n        except requests.RequestException as e:\n            logger.error(f\"HTTP error creating AICERTs user {email}: {e}\")\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"User creation API failed: {e}\")\n\n    @classmethod\n    def enroll_user(cls, aicerts_user_id: int, course_id: int, role_id: int = None, email: str = None) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll a user in an AICERTs course.\n\n        Args:\n            aicerts_user_id: AICERTs user ID (from create_user response)\n            course_id: AICERTs course ID\n            role_id: Role ID (defaults to student role)\n            email: User email (for signature generation)\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'status', 'message', 'isUserAlreadyEnrolled'\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsEnrollmentError: On enrollment failure\n        \"\"\"\n        if role_id is None:\n            role_id = settings.AICERTS_STUDENT_ROLE_ID\n\n        # Generate timestamp and signature (use email or user_id)\n        identifier = email if email else str(aicerts_user_id)\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(identifier)","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"5ef9cbef-e061-4217-8367-7a817a6e0cac","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:36:06.517Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nclass SSOService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for AICERTs SSO API interactions.\n    Base URL: https://learn.aicerts.io/webservice/rest/server.php\n\n    Handles:\n    - User creation\n    - Course enrollment\n    - Authentication/auto-login\n    \"\"\"\n\n    BASE_URL = settings.AICERTS_SSO_BASE_URL\n    WSTOKEN = settings.AICERTS_WSTOKEN\n    PARTNER_ID = settings.AICERTS_PARTNER_ID\n    REST_FORMAT = settings.AICERTS_REST_FORMAT\n\n    @classmethod\n    def _build_base_params(cls, wsfunction: str) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"Build base parameters for all SSO API calls\"\"\"\n        return {\n            'wstoken': cls.WSTOKEN,\n            'wsfunction': wsfunction,\n            'moodlewsrestformat': cls.REST_FORMAT\n        }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def create_user(cls, email: str, first_name: str, last_name: str, username: str = None) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a new user in AICERTs LMS.\n\n        Args:\n            email: User email\n            first_name: User's first name\n            last_name: User's last name\n            username: Username (defaults to email)\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'status', 'message', 'id', 'username'\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsAuthenticationError: On authentication failure\n            AICERTsAPIError: On other API errors\n        \"\"\"\n        if username is None:\n            username = email\n\n        # This means \"AI+ Everyone™\" (external_id=2317) doesn't exist as a course ID in the AICERTS Moodle database. The `external_id` values in our DB are the AICERTS/Moodle course IDs, but apparently 2317 is not a valid Moodle course ID.\n\nLet me check what course IDs work by trying some of the other courses, or let me check the SSO URL generation to verify - the `generate_sso_url` function uses `external_id` as `course_id`. Let me also check what the raw response looked like from the AICERTS API when we tried the SSO URL earlier... it just returned a URL but we didn't actually verify it worked.\n\n\nI'm looking at the other course external_ids in our database like 3465, 1125, 1119, and 1123 to see if those are valid in Moodle, but 2317 for \"AI+ Everyone\" is definitely failing because it doesn't exist in the mdl_course table.\n\nThe real problem is becoming clearer - these external_id values are actually WordPress post IDs from the AICERTS API, not Moodle course IDs, which is why the enrollment API can't find them. I need to check the sync_courses command to understand how external_id gets populated and whether we're mapping the right IDs.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1375,"cache_read_input_tokens":67988,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1375,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":9,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcHudm7amud48cPyDv37","type":"assistant","uuid":"b6b1cd2e-f463-4abc-ac49-ee5bae25375a","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:36:56.762Z"}

{"parentUuid":"2197ee76-05a7-4b68-8667-a8d037f2875a","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01HKHK2PVGyUpmnzaX7HF4Zg","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Jet1QFjtcDXksH6Vo4suQa","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"docker exec lms-prod-backend-1 python -c \"\nimport os, django\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'lms_project.settings')\ndjango.setup()\n# Check what external_id actually represents\nfrom apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\nimport inspect\nprint('AiCertsCourse fields:')\nfor f in AiCertsCourse._meta.get_fields():\n    if hasattr(f, 'name'):\n        print(f'  {f.name}: {f.__class__.__name__}')\n# Show a few courses with all id fields\nfor c in AiCertsCourse.objects.all()[:5]:\n    print(f'\\\\nid={c.id}, external_id={c.external_id}, title={c.title[:40]}')\n    # Check if there are other id-related fields\n    for f in AiCertsCourse._meta.get_fields():\n        if hasattr(f, 'name') and 'id' in f.name.lower() and f.name != 'id':\n            print(f'  {f.name} = {getattr(c, f.name, None)}')\n\"","description":"Inspect AiCertsCourse model and external_id field meaning"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1375,"cache_read_input_tokens":67988,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1375,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":9,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcHudm7amud48cPyDv37","type":"assistant","uuid":"db656196-b22d-4f83-aa0c-2534048d6911","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:37:00.658Z"}

error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\n    @classmethod\n    def generate_sso_url(cls, email: str, course_id: int = None) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for auto-login to AICERTs LMS.\n\n        Args:\n            email: User email\n            course_id: Optional course ID to redirect to after login\n\n        Returns:\n            Full SSO URL for redirect\n        \"\"\"\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(email)\n\n        params = cls._build_base_params('local_myauthplugin_authenticate_user')\n        params.update({\n            'username': email,\n            'partner_id': cls.PARTNER_ID,\n            'timestamp': timestamp,\n            'signature': signature\n        })\n\n        if course_id:\n            params['courseid'] = course_id\n\n        # Build URL with query parameters\n        param_string = '&'.join(f\"{k}={v}\" for k, v in params.items())\n        sso_url = f\"{cls.BASE_URL}?{param_string}\"\n\n        logger.info(f\"Generated SSO URL for {email} (course: {course_id})\")\n        return sso_url","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"f5026635-a826-4371-b798-12994d5039b6","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:37:46.659Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\n    @classmethod\n    def generate_sso_url(cls, email: str, course_id: int = None) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for auto-login to AICERTs LMS.\n\n        Args:\n            email: User email\n            course_id: Optional course ID to redirect to after login\n\n        Returns:\n            Full SSO URL for redirect\n        \"\"\"\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(email)\n\n        params = cls._build_base_params('local_myauthplugin_authenticate_user')\n        params.update({\n            'username': email,\n            'partner_id': cls.PARTNER_ID,\n            'timestamp': timestamp,\n            'signature': signature\n        })\n\n        if course_id:\n            params['courseid'] = course_id\n\n        # Build URL with query parameters\n        param_string = '&'.join(f\"{k}={v}\" for k, v in params.items())\n        sso_url = f\"{cls.BASE_URL}?{param_string}\"\n\n        logger.info(f\"Generated SSO URL for {email} (course: {course_id})\")\n        return sso_url","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"5a8df0c2-cebc-4f6b-82fa-a5a8cf4398a7"}

You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"uuid":"f3c90f5f-f3d0-424e-bcba-c359b19757f5","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:38:02.492Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/aicerts_integration/views.py","content":"    def get_sso_url(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for this specific enrollment.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'enrolled':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User not enrolled in this course'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)\n\n        try:\n            # Use external_id (AICERTS/Moodle course ID), not the Django PK\n            aicerts_course_id = enrollment.course.external_id or enrollment.course.id\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=enrollment.user.email,\n                course_id=aicerts_course_id\n            )\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'sso_url': sso_url\n            })\n        except Exception as e:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Failed to generate SSO URL',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n","numLines":30,"startLine":189,"totalLines":428}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"6e201c4c-d3b4-4667-8838-0aafbf03759c"}

apps/aicerts_integration/views.py\n\"\"\"\nViews for AICERTs Partnership Integration\n\nHandles:\n- Course enrollment with dual sync (Hosi + AICERTs)\n- SSO redirect generation for course access\n- Instructor validation for course assignments\n- Enrollment status tracking\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom rest_framework import viewsets, status, permissions\nfrom rest_framework.decorators import action\nfrom rest_framework.response import Response\nfrom rest_framework.views import APIView\nfrom django.shortcuts import redirect, get_object_or_404\nfrom django.http import JsonResponse\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom django.db import transaction\nfrom django.conf import settings\nimport logging\nimport secrets\nfrom datetime import timedelta\n\nfrom .models import (\n    AICertsEnrollment,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignation,\n    AICertsSyncLog,\n    AICertsSSOSession\n)\nfrom .services import (\n    SSOService,\n    EnrollmentSyncService,\n    InstructorValidationService,\n    AICERTsAPIError,\n    AICERTsEnrollmentError\n)\nfrom .serializers import (\n    AICertsEnrollmentSerializer,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer,\n    AICertsSyncLogSerializer,\n    EnrollUserSerializer,\n    GenerateSSOSerializer\n)\nfrom apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass AICertsEnrollmentViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for AICERTs course enrollments.\n\n    Features:\n    - List user's enrollments\n    - Create new enrollment (with auto-sync to AICERTs)\n    - Check enrollment status\n    - Retry failed enrollments\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsEnrollmentSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Users can only see their own enrollments\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsEnrollment.objects.all()\n        return AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['post'], url_path='enroll')\n    def enroll_user(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll authenticated user in an AICERTs course.\n\n        Request body:\n        {\n            \"course_id\": 123\n        }\n\n        Response:\n        {\n            \"success\": true,\n            \"enrollment_id\": 456,\n            \"message\": \"Successfully enrolled in course\",\n            \"sso_url\": \"https://learn.aicerts.io/...\"\n        }\n        \"\"\"\n        serializer = EnrollUserSerializer(data=request.data)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data['course_id']\n        course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n\n        try:\n            # Use enrollment sync service for dual enrollment\n            enrollment, aicerts_result = EnrollmentSyncService.enroll_user_in_course(\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                create_aicerts_user=settings.AICERTS_AUTO_CREATE_USERS\n            )\n\n            # Generate SSO URL for immediate course access\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=request.user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Log successful enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='success',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data=aicerts_result\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'enrollment_id': enrollment.id,\n                'message': 'Successfully enrolled in course',\n                'sso_url': sso_url,\n                'already_enrolled': enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled\n            }, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Enrollment failed for user {request.user.email} in course {course_id}: {e}\")\n\n            # Log failed enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='failed',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Enrollment failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['post'], url_path='retry-sync')\n    def retry_sync(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Retry failed enrollment sync with AICERTs.\n\n        Only works for enrollments with status='failed' and < 3 attempts.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'failed':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Can only retry failed enrollments'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        if enrollment.sync_attempts >= 3:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Maximum retry attempts exceeded'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        try:\n            # Retry enrollment\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=enrollment.user.aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=enrollment.course.id,\n                email=enrollment.user.email\n            )\n\n            enrollment.mark_synced()\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'message': 'Enrollment synced successfully'\n            })\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            enrollment.mark_failed(str(e))\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Retry failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['get'], url_path='sso-url')\n    def get_sso_url(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for this specific enrollment.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'enrolled':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User not enrolled in this course'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)\n\n        try:\n            # Use external_id (AICERTS/Moodle course ID), not the Django PK\n            aicerts_course_id = enrollment.course.external_id or enrollment.course.id\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=enrollment.user.email,\n                course_id=aicerts_course_id\n            )\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'sso_url': sso_url\n            })\n        except Exception as e:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Failed to generate SSO URL',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n\nclass SSORedirectView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Generate SSO URL and redirect user to AICERTs LMS for course access.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/sso/redirect/?course_id=123\n\n    Redirects to AICERTs LMS with authenticated session.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Generate SSO URL and redirect\"\"\"\n        serializer = GenerateSSOSerializer(data=request.query_params)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data.get('course_id')\n        user_id = serializer.validated_data.get('user_id')\n        \n        # Staff can generate SSO for other users (for support/testing)\n        if user_id and request.user.is_staff:\n            target_user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n        else:\n            target_user = request.user\n\n        # Check if user is synced with AICERTs\n        if not target_user.is_synced_with_aicerts():\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User account not synced with AICERTs',\n                'message': f'User {target_user.email} not synced with AICERTs'\n            }, status=400)\n\n        # Check if user is enrolled (if course_id provided)\n        if course_id:\n            enrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(\n                user=target_user,\n                course_id=course_id,\n                aicerts_enrollment_status='enrolled'\n            ).first()\n\n            if not enrollment:\n                return JsonResponse({\n                    'success': False,\n                    'error': 'Not enrolled in this course',\n                    'message': 'Please enroll in the course first'\n                }, status=403)\n\n        try:\n            # Generate SSO URL\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=target_user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Create SSO session record\n            course = None\n            if course_id:\n                course = AiCertsCourse.objects.filter(id=course_id).first()\n\n            sso_session = AICertsSSOSession.objects.create(\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                sso_url=sso_url[:500],  # Truncate for DB storage\n                session_token=secrets.token_urlsafe(32),\n                ip_address=request.META.get('REMOTE_ADDR'),\n                user_agent=request.META.get('HTTP_USER_AGENT', '')[:500],\n                expires_at=timezone.now() + timedelta(hours=1)\n            )\n\n            # Log SSO generation\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_auth',\n                status='success',\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data={'session_token': sso_session.session_token, 'impersonated_by': request.user.id if user_id else None}\n            )\n\n            # Redirect to AICERTs\n            return redirect(sso_url)\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"SSO generation failed for user {target_user.email}: {e}\")\n\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_auth',\n                status='failed',\n                user=target_user,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'SSO generation failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=500)\n\n\nclass InstructorValidationView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Validate instructor eligibility for AICERTs courses.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/instructor/validate/?user_id=123&course_id=456\n\n    Returns:\n    {\n        \"is_aicerts_instructor\": true,\n        \"can_instruct_course\": true,\n        \"designated_courses\": [...]\n    }\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Check if user can instruct specific course\"\"\"\n        user_id = request.query_params.get('user_id')\n        course_id = request.query_params.get('course_id')\n\n        if not user_id:\n            return Response({\n                'error': 'user_id required'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        from apps.users.models import User\n        user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n\n        response_data = {\n            'user_id': user.id,\n            'email': user.email,\n            'is_aicerts_instructor': user.is_aicerts_instructor,\n            'can_instruct_course': False,\n            'designated_courses': []\n        }\n\n        if user.is_aicerts_instructor:\n            # Get designated courses\n            designated_courses = InstructorValidationService.get_instructor_courses(user)\n            response_data['designated_courses'] = [\n                {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title,\n                    'shortname': course.shortname\n                }\n                for course in designated_courses\n            ]\n\n            # Check specific course if provided\n            if course_id:\n                course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n                response_data['can_instruct_course'] = InstructorValidationService.can_instruct_course(user, course)\n                response_data['course'] = {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title\n                }\n\n        return Response(response_data)\n\n\nclass AICertsInstructorDesignationViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for managing instructor designations.\n\n    Only admins can create/update/delete designations.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n    queryset = AICertsInstructorDesignation.objects.all()\n\n    def perform_create(self, serializer):\n        \"\"\"Record who made the designation\"\"\"\n        serializer.save(designated_by=self.request.user)\n\n\nclass AICertsSyncLogViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for viewing sync logs (read-only).\n\n    Admins can see all logs, users can see their own.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsSyncLogSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Filter logs based on user permissions\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsSyncLog.objects.all()\n        return AICertsSyncLog.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'], url_path='stats')\n    def get_stats(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Get sync statistics.\n\n        Returns counts by operation type and status.\n        \"\"\"\n        from django.db.models import Count\n\n        stats = AICertsSyncLog.objects.values('operation_type', 'status').annotate(\n            count=Count('id')\n        ).order_by('operation_type', 'status')\n\n        return Response({\n            'stats': list(stats)\n        })\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":199,"oldLines":8,"newStart":199,"newLines":8,"lines":["             }, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)"," ","         try:","-            # Use external_id (AICERTS/Moodle course ID), not the Django PK","-            aicerts_course_id = enrollment.course.external_id or {"parentUuid":"3cea0f50-f11e-4a58-b308-59a849cb0269","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"progress","data":{"type":"hook_progress","hookEvent":"PostToolUse","hookName":"PostToolUse:Edit","command":"callback"},"parentToolUseID":"toolu_01GDhGJmenjfBcdQqc36gncc","toolUseID":"toolu_01GDhGJmenjfBcdQqc36gncc","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:38:08.779Z","uuid":"22576711-7fb5-4395-8cac-98d2ca96d607"}
{"parentUuid":"3cea0f50-f11e-4a58-b308-59a849cb0269","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GDhGJmenjfBcdQqc36gncc","type":"tool_result","content":"The                course_id=course.external_id,  # Use external_id for AICERTs API","newString":"                course_id=course.lms_course_id,  # Use lms_course_id (Moodle ID), not external_id (WordPress product ID)","originalFile":"\"\"\"\nAICERTs Partnership Integration Services\nHandles all API interactions with AICERTs LMS for:\n- Course data synchronization\n- User creation and management\n- Course enrollment\n- SSO authentication\n- Instructor validation\n\"\"\"\n\nimport hmac\nimport hashlib\nimport time\nimport requests\nimport logging\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple\nfrom django.conf import settings\nfrom django.core.cache import cache\nfrom django.db import transaction\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass AICERTsAPIError(Exception):\n    \"\"\"Custom exception for AICERTs API errors\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass AICERTsAuthenticationError(AICERTsAPIError):\n    \"\"\"Authentication failed with AICERTs\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass AICERTsEnrollmentError(AICERTsAPIError):\n    \"\"\"Enrollment operation failed\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass HMACSignatureService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Handles HMAC signature generation for AICERTs SSO API.\n\n    Signature format: HMAC-SHA256(data, secret_key)\n    Data format: \"email:timestamp\" or \"userid:timestamp\"\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def generate_signature(data: str, secret_key: str = None) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate HMAC SHA256 signature.\n\n        Args:\n            data: String to sign (e.g., \"user@example.com:1234567890\")\n            secret_key: HMAC secret key (defaults to settings)\n\n        Returns:\n            Hex-encoded HMAC signature\n        \"\"\"\n        if secret_key is None:\n            secret_key = settings.AICERTS_SECRET_KEY\n\n        return hmac.new(\n            secret_key.encode('utf-8'),\n            data.encode('utf-8'),\n            hashlib.sha256\n        ).hexdigest()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def generate_timestamp_signature(identifier: str, timestamp: int = None) -> Tuple[int, str]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate timestamp and signature for API call.\n\n        Args:\n            identifier: Email or user ID\n            timestamp: Optional timestamp (generates current if None)\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (timestamp, signature)\n        \"\"\"\n        if timestamp is None:\n            timestamp = int(time.time())\n\n        data = f\"{identifier}:{timestamp}\"\n        signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_signature(data)\n\n        return timestamp, signature\n\n\nclass CourseDataService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for interacting with AICERTs Course Data API (v1.1).\n    Base URL: https://www.aicerts.ai/wp-json/aicerts-api/v1\n\n    Endpoints:\n    - GET /courses - List all courses (paginated)\n    - GET /course/{id} - Get course details\n    \"\"\"\n\n    BASE_URL = settings.AICERTS_COURSE_API_BASE_URL\n    CACHE_TTL = 3600  # Cache course data for 1 hour\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get_courses(cls, page: int = 1, per_page: int = 100, search: str = None) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Fetch paginated list of courses from AICERTs.\n\n        Args:\n            page: Page number\n            per_page: Items per page (max 100)\n            search: Optional search keyword\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'success', 'data', 'total', 'total_pages'\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsAPIError: On API failure\n        \"\"\"\n        params = {\n            'page': page,\n            'per_page': min(per_page, 100)\n        }\n\n        if search:\n            params['search'] = search\n\n        try:\n            response = requests.get(\n                f\"{cls.BASE_URL}/courses\",\n                params=params,\n                timeout=settings.AICERTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n\n            data = response.json()\n            if not data.get('success'):\n                raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course list API returned success=false\")\n\n            logger.info(f\"Fetched {len(data.get('data', []))} courses from AICERTs (page {page})\")\n            return data\n\n        except requests.RequestException as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to fetch courses from AICERTs: {e}\")\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course list API failed: {e}\")\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get_course_detail(cls, course_id: int, use_cache: bool = True) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Fetch detailed information for a specific course.\n\n        Args:\n            course_id: AICERTs course ID\n            use_cache: Whether to use cached data\n\n        Returns:\n            Course detail dict\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsAPIError: On API failure or course not found\n        \"\"\"\n        cache_key = f\"aicerts_course_{course_id}\"\n\n        if use_cache:\n            cached_data = cache.get(cache_key)\n            if cached_data:\n                logger.debug(f\"Returning cached data for course {course_id}\")\n                return cached_data\n\n        try:\n            response = requests.get(\n                f\"{cls.BASE_URL}/course/{course_id}\",\n                timeout=settings.AICERTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n\n            data = response.json()\n            if not data.get('success'):\n                raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course detail API returned success=false for ID {course_id}\")\n\n            course_data = data.get('data')\n            if not course_data:\n                raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course {course_id} not found\")\n\n            # Cache the result\n            cache.set(cache_key, course_data, cls.CACHE_TTL)\n\n            logger.info(f\"Fetched details for course {course_id}: {course_data.get('title')}\")\n            return course_data\n\n        except requests.HTTPError as e:\n            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n                raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course {course_id} not found\")\n            logger.error(f\"HTTP error fetching course {course_id}: {e}\")\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course detail API failed: {e}\")\n        except requests.RequestException as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to fetch course {course_id} from AICERTs: {e}\")\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Course detail API failed: {e}\")\n\n    @classmethod\n    def sync_all_courses(cls, callback=None) -> Tuple[int, int, List[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Sync all courses from AICERTs Course Data API.\n\n        Args:\n            callback: Optional function called for each course: callback(course_data)\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (total_courses, new_courses, errors)\n        \"\"\"\n        total_courses = 0\n        new_courses = 0\n        errors = []\n        page = 1\n\n        logger.info(\"Starting full course sync from AICERTs...\")\n\n        while True:\n            try:\n                result = cls.get_courses(page=page, per_page=100)\n                courses = result.get('data', [])\n\n                if not courses:\n                    break\n\n                for course in courses:\n                    try:\n                        # Fetch full details\n                        course_id = course.get('id')\n                        if not course_id:\n                            continue\n\n                        detail = cls.get_course_detail(course_id, use_cache=False)\n\n                        # Call callback if provided\n                        if callback:\n                            is_new = callback(detail)\n                            if is_new:\n                                new_courses += 1\n\n                        total_courses += 1\n\n                    except Exception as e:\n                        error_msg = f\"Error syncing course {course.get('id')}: {e}\"\n                        logger.error(error_msg)\n                        errors.append(error_msg)\n\n                # Check if there are more pages\n                if page >= result.get('total_pages', 1):\n                    break\n\n                page += 1\n\n            except AICERTsAPIError as e:\n                error_msg = f\"Error fetching page {page}: {e}\"\n                logger.error(error_msg)\n                errors.append(error_msg)\n                break\n\n        logger.info(f\"Course sync complete: {total_courses} total, {new_courses} new, {len(errors)} errors\")\n        return total_courses, new_courses, errors\n\n\nclass SSOService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for AICERTs SSO API interactions.\n    Base URL: https://learn.aicerts.io/webservice/rest/server.php\n\n    Handles:\n    - User creation\n    - Course enrollment\n    - Authentication/auto-login\n    \"\"\"\n\n    BASE_URL = settings.AICERTS_SSO_BASE_URL\n    WSTOKEN = settings.AICERTS_WSTOKEN\n    PARTNER_ID = settings.AICERTS_PARTNER_ID\n    REST_FORMAT = settings.AICERTS_REST_FORMAT\n\n    @classmethod\n    def _build_base_params(cls, wsfunction: str) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"Build base parameters for all SSO API calls\"\"\"\n        return {\n            'wstoken': cls.WSTOKEN,\n            'wsfunction': wsfunction,\n            'moodlewsrestformat': cls.REST_FORMAT\n        }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def create_user(cls, email: str, first_name: str, last_name: str, username: str = None) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a new user in AICERTs LMS.\n\n        Args:\n            email: User email\n            first_name: User's first name\n            last_name: User's last name\n            username: Username (defaults to email)\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'status', 'message', 'id', 'username'\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsAuthenticationError: On authentication failure\n            AICERTsAPIError: On other API errors\n        \"\"\"\n        if username is None:\n            username = email\n\n        # Generate timestamp and signature\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(email)\n\n        params = cls._build_base_params('core_user_create_users')\n        params.update({\n            'users[0][firstname]': first_name,\n            'users[0][lastname]': last_name,\n            'users[0][email]': email,\n            'users[0][username]': username,\n            'users[0][partner_id]': cls.PARTNER_ID,\n            'users[0][source]': 'sso',\n            'timestamp': timestamp,\n            'signature': signature\n        })\n\n        try:\n            response = requests.post(\n                cls.BASE_URL,\n                params=params,\n                timeout=settings.AICERTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n\n            result = response.json()\n\n            # Response is a list with one item\n            if isinstance(result, list) and len(result) > 0:\n                user_data = result[0]\n\n                if user_data.get('status') == 'success':\n                    logger.info(f\"Created AICERTs user: {email} (ID: {user_data.get('id')})\")\n                    return user_data\n                else:\n                    error_msg = user_data.get('message', 'Unknown error')\n                    logger.error(f\"Failed to create AICERTs user {email}: {error_msg}\")\n\n                    if 'authentication' in error_msg.lower():\n                        raise AICERTsAuthenticationError(error_msg)\n                    raise AICERTsAPIError(error_msg)\n\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"Unexpected response format: {result}\")\n\n        except requests.RequestException as e:\n            logger.error(f\"HTTP error creating AICERTs user {email}: {e}\")\n            raise AICERTsAPIError(f\"User creation API failed: {e}\")\n\n    @classmethod\n    def enroll_user(cls, aicerts_user_id: int, course_id: int, role_id: int = None, email: str = None) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll a user in an AICERTs course.\n\n        Args:\n            aicerts_user_id: AICERTs user ID (from create_user response)\n            course_id: AICERTs course ID\n            role_id: Role ID (defaults to student role)\n            email: User email (for signature generation)\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'status', 'message', 'isUserAlreadyEnrolled'\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsEnrollmentError: On enrollment failure\n        \"\"\"\n        if role_id is None:\n            role_id = settings.AICERTS_STUDENT_ROLE_ID\n\n        # Generate timestamp and signature (use email or user_id)\n        identifier = email if email else str(aicerts_user_id)\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(identifier)\n\n        params = cls._build_base_params('enrol_manual_enrol_users')\n        params.update({\n            'enrolments[0][roleid]': role_id,\n            'enrolments[0][userid]': aicerts_user_id,\n            'enrolments[0][courseid]': course_id,\n            'enrolments[0][enrollmentsourcefrom]': 'hosi-academy',\n            'enrolments[0][partner_id]': cls.PARTNER_ID,\n            'timestamp': timestamp,\n            'signature': signature\n        })\n\n        try:\n            response = requests.post(\n                cls.BASE_URL,\n                params=params,\n                timeout=settings.AICERTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n\n            result = response.json()\n\n            if result.get('status') == 'success':\n                already_enrolled = result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n                logger.info(f\"Enrolled user {aicerts_user_id} in course {course_id} \"\n                           f\"(already enrolled: {already_enrolled})\")\n                return result\n            else:\n                error_msg = result.get('message', 'Enrollment failed')\n                logger.error(f\"Failed to enroll user {aicerts_user_id} in course {course_id}: {error_msg}\")\n                raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(error_msg)\n\n        except requests.RequestException as e:\n            logger.error(f\"HTTP error enrolling user {aicerts_user_id} in course {course_id}: {e}\")\n            raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(f\"Enrollment API failed: {e}\")\n\n    @classmethod\n    def generate_sso_url(cls, email: str, course_id: int = None) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for auto-login to AICERTs LMS.\n\n        Args:\n            email: User email\n            course_id: Optional course ID to redirect to after login\n\n        Returns:\n            Full SSO URL for redirect\n        \"\"\"\n        timestamp, signature = HMACSignatureService.generate_timestamp_signature(email)\n\n        params = cls._build_base_params('local_myauthplugin_authenticate_user')\n        params.update({\n            'username': email,\n            'partner_id': cls.PARTNER_ID,\n            'timestamp': timestamp,\n            'signature': signature\n        })\n\n        if course_id:\n            params['courseid'] = course_id\n\n        # Build URL with query parameters\n        param_string = '&'.join(f\"{k}={v}\" for k, v in params.items())\n        sso_url = f\"{cls.BASE_URL}?{param_string}\"\n\n        logger.info(f\"Generated SSO URL for {email} (course: {course_id})\")\n        return sso_url\n\n\nclass InstructorValidationService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for validating AICERTs instructor designations.\n    Ensures only registered AICERTs instructors can teach their designated courses.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def is_aicerts_instructor(user) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if user is a registered AICERTs instructor.\n\n        Args:\n            user: User instance\n\n        Returns:\n            True if user is AICERTs instructor\n        \"\"\"\n        return getattr(user, 'is_aicerts_instructor', False)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def can_instruct_course(user, course) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if user can instruct a specific AICERTs course.\n\n        Args:\n            user: User instance\n            course: AICertsCourse instance\n\n        Returns:\n            True if user is authorized to instruct this course\n        \"\"\"\n        if not InstructorValidationService.is_aicerts_instructor(user):\n            return False\n\n        # Check if user is designated for this course\n        if hasattr(user, 'aicerts_instructor_courses'):\n            return user.aicerts_instructor_courses.filter(id=course.id).exists()\n\n        return False\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def get_instructor_courses(user):\n        \"\"\"\n        Get all AICERTs courses the user can instruct.\n\n        Args:\n            user: User instance\n\n        Returns:\n            QuerySet of AICertsCourse instances\n        \"\"\"\n        if not InstructorValidationService.is_aicerts_instructor(user):\n            from apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n            return AiCertsCourse.objects.none()\n\n        if hasattr(user, 'aicerts_instructor_courses'):\n            return user.aicerts_instructor_courses.all()\n\n        from apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n        return AiCertsCourse.objects.none()\n\n\nclass EnrollmentSyncService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service for synchronizing enrollments between Hosi Academy and AICERTs.\n    Handles dual enrollment with transaction management.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    @transaction.atomic\n    def enroll_user_in_course(user, course, create_aicerts_user: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll user in both Hosi Academy and AICERTs course.\n\n        Args:\n            user: User instance\n            course: AICertsCourse instance\n            create_aicerts_user: Whether to create user on AICERTs if not exists\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (local_enrollment, aicerts_result)\n\n        Raises:\n            AICERTsEnrollmentError: On enrollment failure\n        \"\"\"\n        from apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\n\n        # Check if user has AICERTs ID\n        aicerts_user_id = getattr(user, 'aicerts_user_id', None)\n\n        if not aicerts_user_id and create_aicerts_user:\n            # Create user on AICERTs\n            try:\n                result = SSOService.create_user(\n                    email=user.email,\n                    first_name=user.first_name,\n                    last_name=user.last_name\n                )\n                aicerts_user_id = result.get('id')\n\n                # Update local user record\n                user.aicerts_user_id = aicerts_user_id\n                user.aicerts_synced_at = time.time()\n                user.save(update_fields=['aicerts_user_id', 'aicerts_synced_at'])\n\n            except AICERTsAPIError as e:\n                logger.error(f\"Failed to create AICERTs user for {user.email}: {e}\")\n                raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(f\"Could not create AICERTs account: {e}\")\n\n        if not aicerts_user_id:\n            raise AICERTsEnrollmentError(\"User does not have AICERTs account\")\n\n        # Enroll on AICERTs\n        try:\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=course.external_id,  # Use external_id for AICERTs API\n                email=user.email\n            )\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to enroll {user.email} in course {course.id} on AICERTs: {e}\")\n            raise\n\n        # Create local enrollment record\n        enrollment, created = AICertsEnrollment.objects.get_or_create(\n            user=user,\n            course=course,\n            defaults={\n                'aicerts_enrollment_status': 'enrolled',\n                'aicerts_already_enrolled': aicerts_result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n            }\n        )\n\n        if not created:\n            enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status = 'enrolled'\n            enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled = aicerts_result.get('isUserAlreadyEnrolled') == '1'\n            enrollment.save()\n\n        logger.info(f\"Successfully enrolled {user.email} in {course.title}\")\n        return enrollment, aicerts_result\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":559,"oldLines":7,"newStart":559,"newLines":7,"lines":["         try:","             aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(","                 aicerts_user_id=aicerts_user_id,","-                course_id=course.external_id,  # Use external_id for AICERTs API","+                course_id=course.lms_course_id,  # Use lms_course_id (Moodle ID), not external_id (WordPress product ID)","                 email=user.email","             )","         except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"3cea0f50-f11e-4a58-b308-59a849cb0269"}

Retry enrollment\n   166→            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n   167→                aicerts_user_id=enrollment.user.aicerts_user_id,\n   168→                course_id=enrollment.course.id,\n   169→                email=enrollment.user.email\n   170→            )\n   171→\n   172→            enrollment.mark_synced()\n   173→\n   174→            return Response({\n   175→                'success': True,\n   176→                'message': 'Enrollment synced successfully'\n   177→            })\n   178→\n   179→        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"uuid":"3aa61c12-a450-43f0-b349-ec00ee70b116","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:38:12.430Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/aicerts_integration/views.py","content":"        Response:\n        {\n            \"success\": true,\n            \"enrollment_id\": 456,\n            \"message\": \"Successfully enrolled in course\",\n            \"sso_url\": \"https://learn.aicerts.io/...\"\n        }\n        \"\"\"\n        serializer = EnrollUserSerializer(data=request.data)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data['course_id']\n        course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n\n        try:\n            # Use enrollment sync service for dual enrollment\n            enrollment, aicerts_result = EnrollmentSyncService.enroll_user_in_course(\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                create_aicerts_user=settings.AICERTS_AUTO_CREATE_USERS\n            )\n\n            # Generate SSO URL for immediate course access\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=request.user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Log successful enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='success',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data=aicerts_result\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'enrollment_id': enrollment.id,\n                'message': 'Successfully enrolled in course',\n                'sso_url': sso_url,\n                'already_enrolled': enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled\n            }, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Enrollment failed for user {request.user.email} in course {course_id}: {e}\")\n\n            # Log failed enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='failed',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Enrollment failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['post'], url_path='retry-sync')\n    def retry_sync(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Retry failed enrollment sync with AICERTs.\n\n        Only works for enrollments with status='failed' and < 3 attempts.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'failed':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Can only retry failed enrollments'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        if enrollment.sync_attempts >= 3:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Maximum retry attempts exceeded'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        try:\n            # Retry enrollment\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=enrollment.user.aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=enrollment.course.id,\n                email=enrollment.user.email\n            )\n\n            enrollment.mark_synced()\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'message': 'Enrollment synced successfully'\n            })\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:","numLines":100,"startLine":80,"totalLines":428}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0a36854e-2338-4b9f-96a5-63956dabf98d"}

Staff can generate SSO for other users (for support/testing)\n   240→        if user_id and request.user.is_staff:\n   241→            target_user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n   242→        else:\n   243→            target_user = request.user\n   244→\n   245→        # Check if user is synced with AICERTs\n   246→        if not target_user.is_synced_with_aicerts():\n   247→            return JsonResponse({\n   248→                'success': False,\n   249→                'error': 'User account not synced with AICERTs',\n   250→                'message': f'User {target_user.email} not synced with AICERTs'\n   251→            }, status=400)\n   252→\n   253→        # You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"uuid":"7412446f-0184-4921-a3df-b4c580a307c2","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:38:21.002Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/backend/apps/aicerts_integration/views.py","content":"class SSORedirectView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Generate SSO URL and redirect user to AICERTs LMS for course access.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/sso/redirect/?course_id=123\n\n    Redirects to AICERTs LMS with authenticated session.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Generate SSO URL and redirect\"\"\"\n        serializer = GenerateSSOSerializer(data=request.query_params)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data.get('course_id')\n        user_id = serializer.validated_data.get('user_id')\n        \n        # Staff can generate SSO for other users (for support/testing)\n        if user_id and request.user.is_staff:\n            target_user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n        else:\n            target_user = request.user\n\n        # Check if user is synced with AICERTs\n        if not target_user.is_synced_with_aicerts():\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User account not synced with AICERTs',\n                'message': f'User {target_user.email} not synced with AICERTs'\n            }, status=400)\n\n        # Check if user is enrolled (if course_id provided)\n        if course_id:\n            enrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(\n                user=target_user,\n                course_id=course_id,\n                aicerts_enrollment_status='enrolled'\n            ).first()","numLines":40,"startLine":220,"totalLines":428}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"e2d13470-f4dc-4c9b-a83c-779df6e415dc"}
{"parentUuid":"7412446f-0184-4921-a3df-b4c580a307c2","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XpF99cRFTieazD31nkqBdy","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"In `SSORedirectView`, `course_id` is the Django PK passed via query param. It then looks up the course, but then passes `course_id` (the Django PK) directly to `generate_sso_url`. But for `generate_sso_url`, the `course_id` parameter is only used to add `courseid` to the URL params. So this needs to be the Moodle course ID.\n\nHowever, in this view, `course_id` is the query param which is the Django PK. So when passing to `generate_sso_url`, I need to convert it to `lms_course_id`.\n\n\nI've identified three places where this conversion needs to happen: after enrollment completes, in the retry-sync endpoint, and in the SSO redirect view itself. Let me trace through each location to understand the context and make the necessary fixes.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":741,"cache_read_input_tokens":80085,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":741,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcJ2tS7CB8bLweBDCaAH","type":"assistant","uuid":"a365998a-27a6-4ef4-a67b-fc8198fe86a2","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:38:29.072Z"}

email=request.user.email,\n                course_id=course.lms_course_id\n            )","originalFile":"# apps/aicerts_integration/views.py\n\"\"\"\nViews for AICERTs Partnership Integration\n\nHandles:\n- Course enrollment with dual sync (Hosi + AICERTs)\n- SSO redirect generation for course access\n- Instructor validation for course assignments\n- Enrollment status tracking\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom rest_framework import viewsets, status, permissions\nfrom rest_framework.decorators import action\nfrom rest_framework.response import Response\nfrom rest_framework.views import APIView\nfrom django.shortcuts import redirect, get_object_or_404\nfrom django.http import JsonResponse\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom django.db import transaction\nfrom django.conf import settings\nimport logging\nimport secrets\nfrom datetime import timedelta\n\nfrom .models import (\n    AICertsEnrollment,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignation,\n    AICertsSyncLog,\n    AICertsSSOSession\n)\nfrom .services import (\n    SSOService,\n    EnrollmentSyncService,\n    InstructorValidationService,\n    AICERTsAPIError,\n    AICERTsEnrollmentError\n)\nfrom .serializers import (\n    AICertsEnrollmentSerializer,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer,\n    AICertsSyncLogSerializer,\n    EnrollUserSerializer,\n    GenerateSSOSerializer\n)\nfrom apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass AICertsEnrollmentViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for AICERTs course enrollments.\n\n    Features:\n    - List user's enrollments\n    - Create new enrollment (with auto-sync to AICERTs)\n    - Check enrollment status\n    - Retry failed enrollments\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsEnrollmentSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Users can only see their own enrollments\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsEnrollment.objects.all()\n        return AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['post'], url_path='enroll')\n    def enroll_user(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll authenticated user in an AICERTs course.\n\n        Request body:\n        {\n            \"course_id\": 123\n        }\n\n        Response:\n        {\n            \"success\": true,\n            \"enrollment_id\": 456,\n            \"message\": \"Successfully enrolled in course\",\n            \"sso_url\": \"https://learn.aicerts.io/...\"\n        }\n        \"\"\"\n        serializer = EnrollUserSerializer(data=request.data)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data['course_id']\n        course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n\n        try:\n            # Use enrollment sync service for dual enrollment\n            enrollment, aicerts_result = EnrollmentSyncService.enroll_user_in_course(\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                create_aicerts_user=settings.AICERTS_AUTO_CREATE_USERS\n            )\n\n            # Generate SSO URL for immediate course access\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=request.user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Log successful enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='success',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data=aicerts_result\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'enrollment_id': enrollment.id,\n                'message': 'Successfully enrolled in course',\n                'sso_url': sso_url,\n                'already_enrolled': enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled\n            }, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Enrollment failed for user {request.user.email} in course {course_id}: {e}\")\n\n            # Log failed enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='failed',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Enrollment failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['post'], url_path='retry-sync')\n    def retry_sync(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Retry failed enrollment sync with AICERTs.\n\n        Only works for enrollments with status='failed' and < 3 attempts.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'failed':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Can only retry failed enrollments'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        if enrollment.sync_attempts >= 3:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Maximum retry attempts exceeded'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        try:\n            # Retry enrollment\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=enrollment.user.aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=enrollment.course.id,\n                email=enrollment.user.email\n            )\n\n            enrollment.mark_synced()\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'message': 'Enrollment synced successfully'\n            })\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            enrollment.mark_failed(str(e))\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Retry failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['get'], url_path='sso-url')\n    def get_sso_url(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for this specific enrollment.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'enrolled':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User not enrolled in this course'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)\n\n        try:\n            # Use lms_course_id (Moodle course ID), not external_id (WordPress product ID)\n            aicerts_course_id = enrollment.course.lms_course_id or enrollment.course.external_id\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=enrollment.user.email,\n                course_id=aicerts_course_id\n            )\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'sso_url': sso_url\n            })\n        except Exception as e:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Failed to generate SSO URL',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n\nclass SSORedirectView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Generate SSO URL and redirect user to AICERTs LMS for course access.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/sso/redirect/?course_id=123\n\n    Redirects to AICERTs LMS with authenticated session.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Generate SSO URL and redirect\"\"\"\n        serializer = GenerateSSOSerializer(data=request.query_params)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data.get('course_id')\n        user_id = serializer.validated_data.get('user_id')\n        \n        # Staff can generate SSO for other users (for support/testing)\n        if user_id and request.user.is_staff:\n            target_user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n        else:\n            target_user = request.user\n\n        # Check if user is synced with AICERTs\n        if not target_user.is_synced_with_aicerts():\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User account not synced with AICERTs',\n                'message': f'User {target_user.email} not synced with AICERTs'\n            }, status=400)\n\n        # Check if user is enrolled (if course_id provided)\n        if course_id:\n            enrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(\n                user=target_user,\n                course_id=course_id,\n                aicerts_enrollment_status='enrolled'\n            ).first()\n\n            if not enrollment:\n                return JsonResponse({\n                    'success': False,\n                    'error': 'Not enrolled in this course',\n                    'message': 'Please enroll in the course first'\n                }, status=403)\n\n        try:\n            # Generate SSO URL\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=target_user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Create SSO session record\n            course = None\n            if course_id:\n                course = AiCertsCourse.objects.filter(id=course_id).first()\n\n            sso_session = AICertsSSOSession.objects.create(\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                sso_url=sso_url[:500],  # Truncate for DB storage\n                session_token=secrets.token_urlsafe(32),\n                ip_address=request.META.get('REMOTE_ADDR'),\n                user_agent=request.META.get('HTTP_USER_AGENT', '')[:500],\n                expires_at=timezone.now() + timedelta(hours=1)\n            )\n\n            # Log SSO generation\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_auth',\n                status='success',\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data={'session_token': sso_session.session_token, 'impersonated_by': request.user.id if user_id else None}\n            )\n\n            # Redirect to AICERTs\n            return redirect(sso_url)\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"SSO generation failed for user {target_user.email}: {e}\")\n\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_auth',\n                status='failed',\n                user=target_user,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'SSO generation failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=500)\n\n\nclass InstructorValidationView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Validate instructor eligibility for AICERTs courses.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/instructor/validate/?user_id=123&course_id=456\n\n    Returns:\n    {\n        \"is_aicerts_instructor\": true,\n        \"can_instruct_course\": true,\n        \"designated_courses\": [...]\n    }\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Check if user can instruct specific course\"\"\"\n        user_id = request.query_params.get('user_id')\n        course_id = request.query_params.get('course_id')\n\n        if not user_id:\n            return Response({\n                'error': 'user_id required'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        from apps.users.models import User\n        user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n\n        response_data = {\n            'user_id': user.id,\n            'email': user.email,\n            'is_aicerts_instructor': user.is_aicerts_instructor,\n            'can_instruct_course': False,\n            'designated_courses': []\n        }\n\n        if user.is_aicerts_instructor:\n            # Get designated courses\n            designated_courses = InstructorValidationService.get_instructor_courses(user)\n            response_data['designated_courses'] = [\n                {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title,\n                    'shortname': course.shortname\n                }\n                for course in designated_courses\n            ]\n\n            # Check specific course if provided\n            if course_id:\n                course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n                response_data['can_instruct_course'] = InstructorValidationService.can_instruct_course(user, course)\n                response_data['course'] = {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title\n                }\n\n        return Response(response_data)\n\n\nclass AICertsInstructorDesignationViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for managing instructor designations.\n\n    Only admins can create/update/delete designations.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n    queryset = AICertsInstructorDesignation.objects.all()\n\n    def perform_create(self, serializer):\n        \"\"\"Record who made the designation\"\"\"\n        serializer.save(designated_by=self.request.user)\n\n\nclass AICertsSyncLogViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for viewing sync logs (read-only).\n\n    Admins can see all logs, users can see their own.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsSyncLogSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Filter logs based on user permissions\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsSyncLog.objects.all()\n        return AICertsSyncLog.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'], url_path='stats')\n    def get_stats(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Get sync statistics.\n\n        Returns counts by operation type and status.\n        \"\"\"\n        from django.db.models import Count\n\n        stats = AICertsSyncLog.objects.values('operation_type', 'status').annotate(\n            count=Count('id')\n        ).order_by('operation_type', 'status')\n\n        return Response({\n            'stats': list(stats)\n
