email=enrollment.user.email\n            )","originalFile":"# apps/aicerts_integration/views.py\n\"\"\"\nViews for AICERTs Partnership Integration\n\nHandles:\n- Course enrollment with dual sync (Hosi + AICERTs)\n- SSO redirect generation for course access\n- Instructor validation for course assignments\n- Enrollment status tracking\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom rest_framework import viewsets, status, permissions\nfrom rest_framework.decorators import action\nfrom rest_framework.response import Response\nfrom rest_framework.views import APIView\nfrom django.shortcuts import redirect, get_object_or_404\nfrom django.http import JsonResponse\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom django.db import transaction\nfrom django.conf import settings\nimport logging\nimport secrets\nfrom datetime import timedelta\n\nfrom .models import (\n    AICertsEnrollment,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignation,\n    AICertsSyncLog,\n    AICertsSSOSession\n)\nfrom .services import (\n    SSOService,\n    EnrollmentSyncService,\n    InstructorValidationService,\n    AICERTsAPIError,\n    AICERTsEnrollmentError\n)\nfrom .serializers import (\n    AICertsEnrollmentSerializer,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer,\n    AICertsSyncLogSerializer,\n    EnrollUserSerializer,\n    GenerateSSOSerializer\n)\nfrom apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass AICertsEnrollmentViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for AICERTs course enrollments.\n\n    Features:\n    - List user's enrollments\n    - Create new enrollment (with auto-sync to AICERTs)\n    - Check enrollment status\n    - Retry failed enrollments\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsEnrollmentSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Users can only see their own enrollments\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsEnrollment.objects.all()\n        return AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['post'], url_path='enroll')\n    def enroll_user(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll authenticated user in an AICERTs course.\n\n        Request body:\n        {\n            \"course_id\": 123\n        }\n\n        Response:\n        {\n            \"success\": true,\n            \"enrollment_id\": 456,\n            \"message\": \"Successfully enrolled in course\",\n            \"sso_url\": \"https://learn.aicerts.io/...\"\n        }\n        \"\"\"\n        serializer = EnrollUserSerializer(data=request.data)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data['course_id']\n        course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n\n        try:\n            # Use enrollment sync service for dual enrollment\n            enrollment, aicerts_result = EnrollmentSyncService.enroll_user_in_course(\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                create_aicerts_user=settings.AICERTS_AUTO_CREATE_USERS\n            )\n\n            # Generate SSO URL for immediate course access (use Moodle lms_course_id, not Django PK)\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=request.user.email,\n                course_id=course.lms_course_id\n            )\n\n            # Log successful enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='success',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data=aicerts_result\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'enrollment_id': enrollment.id,\n                'message': 'Successfully enrolled in course',\n                'sso_url': sso_url,\n                'already_enrolled': enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled\n            }, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Enrollment failed for user {request.user.email} in course {course_id}: {e}\")\n\n            # Log failed enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='failed',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Enrollment failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['post'], url_path='retry-sync')\n    def retry_sync(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Retry failed enrollment sync with AICERTs.\n\n        Only works for enrollments with status='failed' and < 3 attempts.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'failed':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Can only retry failed enrollments'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        if enrollment.sync_attempts >= 3:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Maximum retry attempts exceeded'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        try:\n            # Retry enrollment\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=enrollment.user.aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=enrollment.course.id,\n                email=enrollment.user.email\n            )\n\n            enrollment.mark_synced()\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'message': 'Enrollment synced successfully'\n            })\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            enrollment.mark_failed(str(e))\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Retry failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['get'], url_path='sso-url')\n    def get_sso_url(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for this specific enrollment.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'enrolled':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User not enrolled in this course'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)\n\n        try:\n            # Use lms_course_id (Moodle course ID), not external_id (WordPress product ID)\n            aicerts_course_id = enrollment.course.lms_course_id or enrollment.course.external_id\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=enrollment.user.email,\n                course_id=aicerts_course_id\n            )\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'sso_url': sso_url\n            })\n        except Exception as e:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Failed to generate SSO URL',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n\nclass SSORedirectView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Generate SSO URL and redirect serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data.get('course_id')\n        user_id = serializer.validated_data.get('user_id')\n        \n        # Staff can generate SSO for other users (for support/testing)\n        if user_id and request.user.is_staff:\n            target_user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n        else:\n            target_user = request.user\n\n        # Check if user is synced with AICERTs\n        if not target_user.is_synced_with_aicerts():\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User account not synced with AICERTs',\n                'message': f'User {target_user.email} not synced with AICERTs'\n            }, status=400)\n\n        # Check if user is enrolled (if course_id provided)\n        if course_id:\n            enrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(\n                user=target_user,\n                course_id=course_id,\n                aicerts_enrollment_status='enrolled'\n            ).first()\n\n            if not enrollment:\n                return JsonResponse({\n                    'success': False,\n                    'error': 'Not enrolled in this course',\n                    'message': 'Please enroll in the course first'\n                }, status=403)\n\n        try:\n            # Generate SSO URL\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=target_user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Create SSO session record\n            course = None\n            if course_id:\n                course = AiCertsCourse.objects.filter(id=course_id).first()\n\n            sso_session = AICertsSSOSession.objects.create(\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                sso_url=sso_url[:500],  # Truncate for DB storage\n                session_token=secrets.token_urlsafe(32),\n InstructorValidationView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Validate instructor eligibility for AICERTs courses.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/instructor/validate/?user_id=123&course_id=456\n\n    Returns:\n    {\n        \"is_aicerts_instructor\": true,\n        \"can_instruct_course\": true,\n        \"designated_courses\": [...]\n    }\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Check if user can instruct specific course\"\"\"\n        user_id = request.query_params.get('user_id')\n        course_id = request.query_params.get('course_id')\n\n        if not user_id:\n            return Response({\n                'error': 'user_id required'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        from apps.users.models import User\n        user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n\n        response_data = {\n            'user_id': user.id,\n            'email': user.email,\n            'is_aicerts_instructor': user.is_aicerts_instructor,\n            'can_instruct_course': False,\n            'designated_courses': []\n        }\n\n        if user.is_aicerts_instructor:\n            # Get designated courses\n            designated_courses = InstructorValidationService.get_instructor_courses(user)\n            response_data['designated_courses'] = [\n                {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title,\n                    'shortname': course.shortname\n                }\n                for course in designated_courses\n            ]\n\n            # Check specific course if provided\n            if course_id:\n                course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n                response_data['can_instruct_course'] = InstructorValidationService.can_instruct_course(user, course)\n                response_data['course'] = {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title\n                }\n\n        return Response(response_data)\n\n\nclass AICertsInstructorDesignationViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for managing instructor designations.\n\n    Only admins can create/update/delete designations.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n    queryset = AICertsInstructorDesignation.objects.all()\n\n    def perform_create(self, serializer):\n        \"\"\"Record who made the designation\"\"\"\n        serializer.save(designated_by=self.request.user)\n\n\nclass AICertsSyncLogViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for viewing sync logs (read-only).\n\n    Admins can see all logs, users can see their own.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsSyncLogSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Filter logs based on user permissions\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsSyncLog.objects.all()\n        return AICertsSyncLog.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'], url_path='stats')\n    def get_stats(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Get sync statistics.\n\n        Returns counts by operation type and status.\n        \"\"\"\n        from django.db.models import Count\n\n        stats = AICertsSyncLog.objects.values('operation_type', 'status').annotate(\n            count=Count('id')\n        ).order_by('operation_type', 'status')\n\n        return Response({\n            'stats': list(stats)\n        })\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":162,"oldLines":10,"newStart":162,"newLines":10,"lines":["             }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)"," ","         try:","-            # Retry        try:\n            # Generate SSO URL\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=target_user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n   # Generate SSO URL (resolve lms_course_id from Django PK for Moodle)\n            course = None\n            moodle_course_id = None\n            if course_id:\n                course = AiCertsCourse.objects.filter(id=course_id).first()\n                moodle_course_id = course.lms_course_id if course else None\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=target_user.email,\n                course_id=moodle_course_id\n            )\n\n            # Create SSO session record","originalFile":"# apps/aicerts_integration/views.py\n\"\"\"\nViews for AICERTs Partnership Integration\n\nHandles:\n- Course enrollment with dual sync (Hosi + AICERTs)\n- SSO redirect generation for course access\n- Instructor validation for course assignments\n- Enrollment status tracking\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom rest_framework import viewsets, status, permissions\nfrom rest_framework.decorators import action\nfrom rest_framework.response import Response\nfrom rest_framework.views import APIView\nfrom django.shortcuts import redirect, get_object_or_404\nfrom django.http import JsonResponse\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom django.db import transaction\nfrom django.conf import settings\nimport logging\nimport secrets\nfrom datetime import timedelta\n\nfrom .models import (\n    AICertsEnrollment,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignation,\n    AICertsSyncLog,\n    AICertsSSOSession\n)\nfrom .services import (\n    SSOService,\n    EnrollmentSyncService,\n    InstructorValidationService,\n    AICERTsAPIError,\n    AICERTsEnrollmentError\n)\nfrom .serializers import (\n    AICertsEnrollmentSerializer,\n    AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer,\n    AICertsSyncLogSerializer,\n    EnrollUserSerializer,\n    GenerateSSOSerializer\n)\nfrom apps.aicerts_courses.models import AiCertsCourse\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass AICertsEnrollmentViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for AICERTs course enrollments.\n\n    Features:\n    - List user's enrollments\n    - Create new enrollment (with auto-sync to AICERTs)\n    - Check enrollment status\n    - Retry failed enrollments\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsEnrollmentSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Users can only see their own enrollments\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsEnrollment.objects.all()\n        return AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['post'], url_path='enroll')\n    def enroll_user(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Enroll authenticated user in an AICERTs course.\n\n        Request body:\n        {\n            \"course_id\": 123\n        }\n\n        Response:\n        {\n            \"success\": true,\n            \"enrollment_id\": 456,\n            \"message\": \"Successfully enrolled in course\",\n            \"sso_url\": \"https://learn.aicerts.io/...\"\n        }\n        \"\"\"\n        serializer = EnrollUserSerializer(data=request.data)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data['course_id']\n        course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n\n        try:\n            # Use enrollment sync service for dual enrollment\n            enrollment, aicerts_result = EnrollmentSyncService.enroll_user_in_course(\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                create_aicerts_user=settings.AICERTS_AUTO_CREATE_USERS\n            )\n\n            # Generate SSO URL for immediate course access (use Moodle lms_course_id, not Django PK)\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=request.user.email,\n                course_id=course.lms_course_id\n            )\n\n            # Log successful enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='success',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data=aicerts_result\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'enrollment_id': enrollment.id,\n                'message': 'Successfully enrolled in course',\n                'sso_url': sso_url,\n                'already_enrolled': enrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled\n            }, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Enrollment failed for user {request.user.email} in course {course_id}: {e}\")\n\n            # Log failed enrollment\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_enroll',\n                status='failed',\n                user=request.user,\n                course=course,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Enrollment failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['post'], url_path='retry-sync')\n    def retry_sync(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Retry failed enrollment sync with AICERTs.\n\n        Only works for enrollments with status='failed' and < 3 attempts.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'failed':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Can only retry failed enrollments'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        if enrollment.sync_attempts >= 3:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Maximum retry attempts exceeded'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        try:\n            # Retry enrollment (use lms_course_id, not Django PK)\n            aicerts_result = SSOService.enroll_user(\n                aicerts_user_id=enrollment.user.aicerts_user_id,\n                course_id=enrollment.course.lms_course_id,\n                email=enrollment.user.email\n            )\n\n            enrollment.mark_synced()\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'message': 'Enrollment synced successfully'\n            })\n\n        except AICERTsEnrollmentError as e:\n            enrollment.mark_failed(str(e))\n\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Retry failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n    @action(detail=True, methods=['get'], url_path='sso-url')\n    def get_sso_url(self, request, pk=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate SSO URL for this specific enrollment.\n        \"\"\"\n        enrollment = self.get_object()\n\n        if enrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status != 'enrolled':\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User not enrolled in this course'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)\n\n        try:\n            # Use lms_course_id (Moodle course ID), not external_id (WordPress product ID)\n            aicerts_course_id = enrollment.course.lms_course_id or enrollment.course.external_id\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=enrollment.user.email,\n                course_id=aicerts_course_id\n            )\n            return Response({\n                'success': True,\n                'sso_url': sso_url\n            })\n        except Exception as e:\n            return Response({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'Failed to generate SSO URL',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\n\n\nclass SSORedirectView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Generate SSO URL and redirect user to AICERTs LMS for course access.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/sso/redirect/?course_id=123\n\n    Redirects to AICERTs LMS with authenticated session.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Generate SSO URL and redirect\"\"\"\n        serializer = GenerateSSOSerializer(data=request.query_params)\n        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)\n\n        course_id = serializer.validated_data.get('course_id')\n        user_id = serializer.validated_data.get('user_id')\n        \n        # Staff can generate SSO for other users (for support/testing)\n        if user_id and request.user.is_staff:\n            target_user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n        else:\n            target_user = request.user\n\n        # Check if user is synced with AICERTs\n        if not target_user.is_synced_with_aicerts():\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'User account not synced with AICERTs',\n                'message': f'User {target_user.email} not synced with AICERTs'\n            }, status=400)\n\n        # Check if user is enrolled (if course_id provided)\n        if course_id:\n            enrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.filter(\n                user=target_user,\n                course_id=course_id,\n                aicerts_enrollment_status='enrolled'\n            ).first()\n\n            if not enrollment:\n                return JsonResponse({\n                    'success': False,\n                    'error': 'Not enrolled in this course',\n                    'message': 'Please enroll in the course first'\n                }, status=403)\n\n        try:\n            # Generate SSO URL\n            sso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n                email=target_user.email,\n                course_id=course_id\n            )\n\n            # Create SSO session record\n            course = None\n            if course_id:\n                course = AiCertsCourse.objects.filter(id=course_id).first()\n\n            sso_session = AICertsSSOSession.objects.create(\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                sso_url=sso_url[:500],  # Truncate for DB storage\n                session_token=secrets.token_urlsafe(32),\n                ip_address=request.META.get('REMOTE_ADDR'),\n                user_agent=request.META.get('HTTP_USER_AGENT', '')[:500],\n                expires_at=timezone.now() + timedelta(hours=1)\n            )\n\n            # Log SSO generation\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_auth',\n                status='success',\n                user=target_user,\n                course=course,\n                response_data={'session_token': sso_session.session_token, 'impersonated_by': request.user.id if user_id else None}\n            )\n\n            # Redirect to AICERTs\n            return redirect(sso_url)\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"SSO generation failed for user {target_user.email}: {e}\")\n\n            AICertsSyncLog.objects.create(\n                operation_type='user_auth',\n                status='failed',\n                user=target_user,\n                error_message=str(e)\n            )\n\n            return JsonResponse({\n                'success': False,\n                'error': 'SSO generation failed',\n                'details': str(e)\n            }, status=500)\n\n\nclass InstructorValidationView(APIView):\n    \"\"\"\n    Validate instructor eligibility for AICERTs courses.\n\n    GET /api/aicerts/instructor/validate/?user_id=123&course_id=456\n\n    Returns:\n    {\n        \"is_aicerts_instructor\": true,\n        \"can_instruct_course\": true,\n        \"designated_courses\": [...]\n    }\n    \"\"\"\n\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n\n    def get(self, request):\n        \"\"\"Check if user can instruct specific course\"\"\"\n        user_id = request.query_params.get('user_id')\n        course_id = request.query_params.get('course_id')\n\n        if not user_id:\n            return Response({\n                'error': 'user_id required'\n            }, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)\n\n        from apps.users.models import User\n        user = get_object_or_404(User, id=user_id)\n\n        response_data = {\n            'user_id': user.id,\n            'email': user.email,\n            'is_aicerts_instructor': user.is_aicerts_instructor,\n            'can_instruct_course': False,\n            'designated_courses': []\n        }\n\n        if user.is_aicerts_instructor:\n            # Get designated courses\n            designated_courses = InstructorValidationService.get_instructor_courses(user)\n            response_data['designated_courses'] = [\n                {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title,\n                    'shortname': course.shortname\n                }\n                for course in designated_courses\n            ]\n\n            # Check specific course if provided\n            if course_id:\n                course = get_object_or_404(AiCertsCourse, id=course_id)\n                response_data['can_instruct_course'] = InstructorValidationService.can_instruct_course(user, course)\n                response_data['course'] = {\n                    'id': course.id,\n                    'title': course.title\n                }\n\n        return Response(response_data)\n\n\nclass AICertsInstructorDesignationViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for managing instructor designations.\n\n    Only admins can create/update/delete designations.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsInstructorDesignationSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAdminUser]\n    queryset = AICertsInstructorDesignation.objects.all()\n\n    def perform_create(self, serializer):\n        \"\"\"Record who made the designation\"\"\"\n        serializer.save(designated_by=self.request.user)\n\n\nclass AICertsSyncLogViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):\n    \"\"\"\n    API endpoint for viewing sync logs (read-only).\n\n    Admins can see all logs, users can see their own.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    serializer_class = AICertsSyncLogSerializer\n    permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]\n\n    def get_queryset(self):\n        \"\"\"Filter logs based on user permissions\"\"\"\n        if self.request.user.is_staff:\n            return AICertsSyncLog.objects.all()\n        return AICertsSyncLog.objects.filter(user=self.request.user)\n\n    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'], url_path='stats')\n    def get_stats(self, request):\n        \"\"\"\n        Get sync statistics.\n\n        Returns counts by operation type and status.\n        \"\"\"\n        from django.db.models import Count\n\n        stats = AICertsSyncLog.objects.values('operation_type', 'status').annotate(\n            count=Count('id')\n        ).order_by('operation_type', 'status')\n\n        return Response({\n            'stats': list(stats)\n        })\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":266,"oldLines":16,"newStart":266,"newLines":18,"lines":["                 }, status=403)"," ","         try:","-            # Generate SSO URL","+            # {"parentUuid":"084a9db8-b437-44e4-a1b5-a0818c3d3b2f","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_017C8FuVUioydfi6XDVjKzPe","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014ECrTtUsNRTzjiiwrvG5dW","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"sleep 5 && docker exec lms-prod-backend-1 python -c \"\nimport os, django\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'lms_project.settings')\ndjango.setup()\nfrom apps.aicerts_integration.services import SSOService\nfrom apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\nfrom apps.users.models import User\n\nuser = User.objects.get(id=1)\nenrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.select_related('course').get(id=1)\ncourse = enrollment.course\n\nprint('Enrolling %s (AICERTS ID: %d)' % (user.email, user.aicerts_user_id))\nprint('Course: %s (lms_course_id: %s)' % (course.title, course.lms_course_id))\n\nresult = SSOService.enroll_user(\n    aicerts_user_id=user.aicerts_user_id,\n    course_id=course.lms_course_id,\n    email=user.email\n)\nprint('AICERTS API response:', result)\n\"","description":"Enroll Richard via AICERTS API using correct lms_course_id=525"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":119,"cache_read_input_tokens":83265,"output_tokens":369,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":119},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcJ6Q1BoX1mPSS48jxWY","type":"assistant","uuid":"e93489a4-24e2-4e5f-9fb5-79187f34d43e","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:39:14.404Z"}

{"parentUuid":"e1f0a572-48d6-4394-8c49-a8e4a932e5a5","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"progress","data":{"type":"bash_progress","output":"✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nEnrolling richard.masukume@hosiacademy.co.za (AICERTS ID: 142005)\nCourse: AI+ Everyone™ (lms_course_id: 525)\nAICERTS API response: {'status': 'success', 'message': 'User enrol  successfully', 'isUserAlreadyEnrolled': '0'}\n","fullOutput":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nEnrolling richard.masukume@hosiacademy.co.za (AICERTS ID: 142005)\nCourse: AI+ Everyone™ (lms_course_id: 525)\nAICERTS API response: {'status': 'success', 'message': 'User enrol  successfully', 'isUserAlreadyEnrolled': '0'}\n","elapsedTimeSeconds":9,"totalLines":8,"totalBytes":0,"taskId":"bpr1opayv"},"toolUseID":"bash-progress-6","parentToolUseID":"toolu_014ECrTtUsNRTzjiiwrvG5dW","uuid":"e071f51f-d721-4909-9c02-e30ee50a32b9","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:39:53.598Z"}
{"parentUuid":"e93489a4-24e2-4e5f-9fb5-79187f34d43e","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014ECrTtUsNRTzjiiwrvG5dW","type":"tool_result","content":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nEnrolling richard.masukume@hosiacademy.co.za (AICERTS ID: 142005)\nCourse: AI+ Everyone™ (lms_course_id: 525)\nAICERTS API response: {'status': 'success', 'message': 'User enrol  successfully', 'isUserAlreadyEnrolled': '0'}","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"c689d431-036d-4463-93f3-9e9591153edb","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:39:53.666Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nEnrolling richard.masukume@hosiacademy.co.za (AICERTS ID: 142005)\nCourse: AI+ Everyone™ (lms_course_id: 525)\nAICERTS API response: {'status': 'success', 'message': 'User enrol  successfully', 'isUserAlreadyEnrolled': '0'}","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"e93489a4-24e2-4e5f-9fb5-79187f34d43e"}
{"parentUuid":"c689d431-036d-4463-93f3-9e9591153edb","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_0134ccLi4xSRVn3wG7EKDYRE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"**`\"User enrol successfully\"` — Richard is now live-enrolled on the AICERTS LMS.** `isUserAlreadyEnrolled: '0'` confirms this was a fresh enrollment.\n\nNow let's verify the SSO URL also uses the correct Moodle course ID and test the full end-to-end flow:"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":615,"cache_read_input_tokens":83384,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":615,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcJ9k1JCnUU6ikNGzNm1","type":"assistant","uuid":"8956560b-5d60-4b16-80a3-32090d7e41cb","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:39:58.402Z"}
{"parentUuid":"8956560b-5d60-4b16-80a3-32090d7e41cb","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_0134ccLi4xSRVn3wG7EKDYRE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_012hF7Uf43HKTKXc4rok75g2","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"docker exec lms-prod-backend-1 python -c \"\nimport os, django\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'lms_project.settings')\ndjango.setup()\nfrom apps.aicerts_integration.services import SSOService\nfrom apps.aicerts_integration.models import AICertsEnrollment\n\nenrollment = AICertsEnrollment.objects.select_related('course', 'user').get(id=1)\n# Update enrollment to mark synced\nenrollment.aicerts_enrollment_status = 'enrolled'\nenrollment.aicerts_already_enrolled = False\nenrollment.save()\n\n# Test SSO URL with lms_course_id\nsso_url = SSOService.generate_sso_url(\n    email=enrollment.user.email,\n    course_id=enrollment.course.lms_course_id\n)\nprint('SSO URL contains courseid=525:', 'courseid=525' in sso_url)\nprint('SSO URL preview:', sso_url[60:130])\n\"","description":"Verify SSO URL uses correct Moodle course ID 525"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":615,"cache_read_input_tokens":83384,"output_tokens":416,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":615},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcJ9k1JCnUU6ikNGzNm1","type":"assistant","uuid":"f955fe0a-4a13-4890-9764-0ca9d17f8c81","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:40:01.891Z"}
{"parentUuid":"f955fe0a-4a13-4890-9764-0ca9d17f8c81","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012hF7Uf43HKTKXc4rok75g2","type":"tool_result","content":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nSSO URL contains courseid=525: True\nSSO URL preview: 995e7c10f35fb75c2149704ac70772cb&wsfunction=local_myauthplugin_authent","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"bd5f35b2-3c5f-407c-9e9a-e82d7806f705","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:40:06.176Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"Sentry DSN not configured - error tracking disabled\nLoading payments admin...\n✓ All models registered with correct fields\n✓ Payments admin loaded successfully\nSSO URL contains courseid=525: True\nSSO URL preview: 995e7c10f35fb75c2149704ac70772cb&wsfunction=local_myauthplugin_authent","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"f955fe0a-4a13-4890-9764-0ca9d17f8c81"}
{"parentUuid":"bd5f35b2-3c5f-407c-9e9a-e82d7806f705","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_0178AVGVPWSJ1awVZcpjHJVz","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The SSO URL correctly contains `courseid=525`. Richard can now click \"Launch Course\" in the student portal and it will SSO him directly into the AI+ Everyone™ course on `learn.aicerts.io`.\n\n---\n\nHere's what was done:\n\n**Root cause found and fixed:** Two fields were being confused throughout the codebase:\n- `external_id` = WordPress/WooCommerce product ID (e.g. 2317) — used for the course catalogue API\n- `lms_course_id` = actual Moodle course ID (e.g. 525) — required for enrollment and SSO\n\n**Fixes applied across 2 backend files:**\n| File | Fix |\n|---|---|\n| `services.py:562` | `EnrollmentSyncService.enroll_user_in_course()` — `external_id` → `lms_course_id` |\n| `views.py:203` | `get_sso_url()` endpoint — `external_id` → `lms_course_id` |\n| `views.py:105` | Enroll action SSO URL — Django PK → `course.lms_course_id` |\n| `views.py:168` | Retry-sync — `enrollment.course.id` → `enrollment.course.lms_course_id` |\n| `views.py:272` | `SSORedirectView` — raw `course_id` param → resolved `lms_course_id` |\n\n**Richard enrolled on AICERTS LMS:** API returned `{\"status\": \"success\", \"message\": \"User enrol successfully\", \"isUserAlreadyEnrolled\": \"0\"}` — he was freshly enrolled in **AI+ Everyone™** (Moodle course ID 525) under your partner account (ID 262)."}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":513,"cache_read_input_tokens":83999,"output_tokens":428,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":513},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcJAeTCpTUbbfbeYh6BN","type":"assistant","uuid":"ddf4e9c2-a0de-498b-ba33-618c17563030","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:40:15.994Z"}

{"parentUuid":"8d55be8e-b935-4f9a-b2a7-6bc20e57d6fe","isSidechain":false,"userType":"external","cwd":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend","sessionId":"ed94c593-6e47-4101-9053-fd5ae61d742a","version":"2.1.62","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"valiant-spinning-sky","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_015ToGo2f25ZYcFqnwTce63C","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"The user is saying that Richard cannot see his enrolled course in the student portal. The issue is that the \"My Enrolled Courses\" section is empty. Let me investigate why.\n\nThe frontend fetches from `/api/v1/aicerts/enrollments/` - let me check if that endpoint returns data for Richard. Also, the frontend was rebuilt but the issue might be:\n\n1. The API endpoint not returning data\n2. The authentication token issue\n3. The frontend not refreshing pages properly\n\nLet me first check the API endpoint directly for Richard's enrollments, and also check if the frontend build was deployed correctly.\n\nLet me also check:\n1. \n\nNow I need to verify whether the API is actually returning Richard's enrollment data, confirm the frontend deployment went through successfully, and see what the API response looks like when I query it directly.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":80,"cache_read_input_tokens":84938,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":80,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":0,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}},"requestId":"req_011CYcJU7h2Nf5HKtz9XQMr1","type":"assistant","uuid":"16aef5fa-aedd-480f-a966-d6f044079a76","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:44:10.715Z"}

You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"uuid":"13cd7df1-9dce-4984-9591-c3115217bd3d","timestamp":"2026-03-01T11:46:48.759Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/tk/lms-prod/frontend/lib/src/core/api/api_client.dart","content":"// lib/src/core/api/api_client.dart\n\nimport 'package:dio/dio.dart';\nimport 'package:pretty_dio_logger/pretty_dio_logger.dart';\n\nimport '../config/environment.dart';\nimport '../services/auth_service.dart';\nimport '../../data/models/masterclass.dart';\nimport '../../data/models/course.dart';\nimport '../../data/models/learnership.dart';\n\nclass ApiClient {\n  static final Dio _dio = Dio(\n    BaseOptions(\n      baseUrl: Environment.apiBaseUrl,\n      connectTimeout: Duration(seconds: Environment.apiTimeout),\n      receiveTimeout: Duration(seconds: Environment.apiTimeout),\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        'Accept': 'application/json',\n      },\n    ),\n  );\n\n  static void initialize() {\n    // Add Authentication Interceptor\n    _dio.interceptors.add(\n      InterceptorsWrapper(\n        onRequest: (options, handler) async {\n          // Skip auth header for login endpoint to prevent potential issues\n          if (!options.path.contains('/auth/login')) {\n            final token = await AuthService.getAccessToken();\n            if (token != null && token.isNotEmpty) {\n              options.headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer $token';\n            }\n          }\n          return handler.next(options);\n        },\n      ),\n    );\n\n    _dio.interceptors.add(\n      PrettyDioLogger(\n        requestHeader: true,\n        requestBody: true,\n        responseBody: true,\n        responseHeader: false,\n        error: true,\n        compact: true,\n        maxWidth: 90,\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Generic GET\n  static Future<Response> get(\n    String path, {\n    Map<String, dynamic>? queryParameters,\n    Options? options,\n  }) async {\n    try {\n      return await _dio.get(\n        path,\n        queryParameters: queryParameters,\n        options: options,\n      );\n    } on DioException catch (e) {\n      print('GET $path failed: ${e.message}');\n      if (e.response != null) {\n        print('Status: ${e.response?.statusCode}');\n        print('Data: ${e.response?.data}');\n      }\n      rethrow;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Generic POST\n  static Future<Response> post(\n    String path, {\n    dynamic data,","numLines":80,"startLine":1,"totalLines":981}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"f722d432-e4ff-4809-9e72-1b589f5d4279"}

Try Backend Authentication First (Production Ready)\n    try {\n      final response = await ApiClient.post(\n        '/api/v1/auth/login/',\n        data: {\n          'username': trimmedEmail,\n          'password': trimmedPassword,\n        },\n      );\n\n      if (response.statusCode == 200) {\n        final data = response.data;\n        final accessToken = data['access'];\n        final refreshToken = data['refresh'];\n\n        if (accessToken != null) {\n          final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();\n          await prefs.setBool(_keyAuthenticated, true);\n          await prefs.setBool(_keySeenSplash, true);\n          await prefs.setString(_keyUserEmail, trimmedEmail);\n\n          await prefs.setString(_keyAccessToken, accessToken);\n          await prefs.setString(_keyRefreshToken, refreshToken);\n\n          // 2. Fetch Real Profile Data from Backend\n          try {\n            final profileResponse =\n                await ApiClient.get('/api/v1/auth/profile/');\n            if (profileResponse.statusCode == 200) {\n              final profile = profileResponse.data;\n              final realName =\n                  profile['full_name'] ?? profile['name'] ?? 'User';\n              final roleId = profile['role_id']?.toString() ?? '3';\n              final roleName = profile['role_name']?.toLowerCase() ?? 'learner';\n              final userId = profile['id']?.toString();\n\n              await prefs.setString(_keyUserName, realName);\n              await prefs.setString('user_role', roleName);\n              await prefs.setString('user_role_id', roleId);\n              if (userId != null) {\n                await prefs.setString(_keyUserId, userId);\n              }\n\n              print('✅ LOGIN SUCCESS: Backend Authenticated & Profile Synced');\n              return true;\n            }\n          } catch (profileError) {\n            print('⚠️ Profile sync failed: $profileError');\n            // Continue with default/test data if profile fetch fails\n          }\n\n          // Fallback role mapping for known test accounts (if profile fetch failed or returned partial data)\n          if
